| | We're already one month into 2023, Minnesotans! I'll try to be honest and brief... Building a reelection fund throughout 2023 will be key to fighting the frivolous spending and insane agendas the left has in store for Minnesota. January is almost over, and we've reached our first fundraising deadline. It would be a shame if we couldn't hit our first goal of 2023. Why does this matter? 👉🏻 The twin cities are taking over our rural representation, and we need to ensure we are gearing up to protect Minnesota values. Your contribution will help us identify voters and get our Conservative messages out by investing in new technologies for future get-out-the-vote campaigns.

subject: Officially underway
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
43rd year in a row

| [ ](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c3a0154be2b7484a9afccfbb58142852&_e=2AU2owFP90pXBp-RPEPo04C-Tch9kMhgazvyXz_tHxt2CjK9UlSM4kM6nZlZSp7yvRituJjlQUL2a627WqKTxoBJeV2Rijbdiu31AINIY_0Z3fnsH7zSyryJqbLh-AScZ8s6RqrZse0WcfErCPb0bRP8HNgHnPg2CpGbryXe0cJMfJvdMY_gSUnL2jNjS9cDHNIbxCwTbixTSYLbs5uZf3qbdV5-LFEzBNxJf8EfvrFnioo4Kun59_3Yayc9UbecYO3Z_wktMwNMtX52rqVxvaeGeL5gf0fYdVngdimUtSqXj9dWofZn069o7LzyLiN11Axoh2saoXHSYk9kwMLr9R9Eag5G_kgr1tQ57vHdIcpipO7HXQZJRjlpRKI51fYLF7KuTf7uIOBZCSJNjpvDQKYBOA8ZNuuPQtbDRM_h8oW9IBfL5D8r4b2NIFKKE4IfEn98Vd9Vv8vSX-pzRttroqFOjctAVAl1tpbU5mUREOA%3D)
---
Hey everyone,

My 43rd year in a row of 99 county meetings is officially underway. Every county, every year.

I place a high priority on holding dialogue with Iowans across the state, two-way communication is the essence of representative government. **_[Chip in to help fuel my grassroots discussions.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c3a0154be2b7484a9afccfbb58142852&_e=2AU2owFP90pXBp-RPEPo04C-Tch9kMhgazvyXz_tHxt2CjK9UlSM4kM6nZlZSp7yvRituJjlQUL2a627WqKTxoBJeV2Rijbdiu31AINIY_0Z3fnsH7zSyryJqbLh-AScZ8s6RqrZse0WcfErCPb0bRP8HNgHnPg2CpGbryXe0cJMfJvdMY_gSUnL2jNjS9cDHNIbxCwTbixTSYLbs5uZf3qbdV5-LFEzBNxJf8EfvrFnioo4Kun59_3Yayc9UbecYO3Z_wktMwNMtX52rqVxvaeGeL5gf0fYdVngdimUtSqXj9dWofZn069o7LzyLiN11Axoh2saoXHSYk9kwMLr9d-a-kvWjky62AfIMhLghllZKOkvIFsK2-k4-xoNDqRBJ5S6SQg3ykSPsOKo2I31auvAXwlF95QvwOleK9hVt5kdN1kT0zVrci0iIHoBMtKPprrPRSK8kq8FkRiO4RtmOYsVWg4755L32fvQ8629trs%3D)_**

I recently visited the Dallas Center-Grimes High School to get some insight from our country's future generations.

Barbara and I have five kids, nine grandchildren, and eleven great-grandchildren. I'm -- working as hard as ever to ensure future generations have the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. Getting straddled with debt to the tune of $31 trillion is fiscally irresponsible, and that's why I support a constitutional Balanced Budget Amendment.

**_[Chip in if you agree we need to pass a Balanced Budget Amendment.](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c3a0154be2b7484a9afccfbb58142852&_e=2AU2owFP90pXBp-RPEPo04C-Tch9kMhgazvyXz_tHxt2CjK9UlSM4kM6nZlZSp7yvRituJjlQUL2a627WqKTxoBJeV2Rijbdiu31AINIY_0Z3fnsH7zSyryJqbLh-AScZ8s6RqrZse0WcfErCPb0bRP8HNgHnPg2CpGbryXe0cJMfJvdMY_gSUnL2jNjS9cDHNIbxCwTbixTSYLbs5uZf3qbdV5-LFEzBNxJf8EfvrFnioo4Kun59_3Yayc9UbecYO3Z_wktMwNMtX52rqVxvaeGeL5gf0fYdVngdimUtSqXj9dWofZn069o7LzyLiN11Axoh2saoXHSYk9kwMLr9d1IaWeeXGntl9phZu90MSi99WtH-qiSqMlP1Zxbep1avli5PTJVvcxsxYvbrVM0fpwkzUCtnlj9uRHqfv8CWeKi_QTYIwPmZ6uxh1N2hayvCUrpPrNFDGEsQ4PBQB80pGwp8Hoe_rhB57_dQ5eQ1e8%3D)_
**
I love talking with each and every single Iowan and look forward to holding meetings in every county across the state. **[_Chip in today. Your support helps me do what I do best -- representing the incredible people of Iowa across our great state._](http://links.grassleyworks.com/u/click?_t=65a7ce1d347445428d0d4f22dfbcf47b&_m=c3a0154be2b7484a9afccfbb58142852&_e=2AU2owFP90pXBp-RPEPo04C-Tch9kMhgazvyXz_tHxt2CjK9UlSM4kM6nZlZSp7yvRituJjlQUL2a627WqKTxoBJeV2Rijbdiu31AINIY_0Z3fnsH7zSyryJqbLh-AScZ8s6RqrZse0WcfErCPb0bRP8HNgHnPg2CpGbryXe0cJMfJvdMY_gSUnL2jNjS9cDHNIbxCwTbixTSYLbs5uZf3qbdV5-LFEzBNxJf8EfvrFnioo4Kun59_3Yayc9UbecYO3Z_wktMwNMtX52rqVxvaeGeL5gf0fYdVngdimUtSqXj9dWofZn069o7LzyLiN11Axoh2saoXHSYk9kwMLr9aZFXtAreTNyKY8TyCmWWTe9FgUtG4MgRnK74nWhhucDCFBNiDrEQmLHdQbvrCZAtwCqC9foWc3D9hizx0swatcR1WHxQi-rX6qBQ4Ay7N4CUc2tsPgabIKeVYynqKdGUpWW-0FrgnOEFbMV9_UZTWs%3D)**

All my best,
Chuck

_P.S. The ice cream I had at Freddy 's in Grimes was delicious, and meeting young Iowans was even better.
_

clean_body: 43rd year in a row | Hey everyone, My 43rd year in a row of 99 county meetings is officially underway. Every county, every year. I place a high priority on holding dialogue with Iowans across the state, two-way communication is the essence of representative government. I recently visited the Dallas Center-Grimes High School to get some insight from our country's future generations. Barbara and I have five kids, nine grandchildren, and eleven great-grandchildren. I'm -- working as hard as ever to ensure future generations have the opportunity to achieve the American Dream. Getting straddled with debt to the tune of $31 trillion is fiscally irresponsible, and that's why I support a constitutional Balanced Budget Amendment. I love talking with each and every single Iowan and look forward to holding meetings in every county across the state. All my best, Chuck P.S. The ice cream I had at Freddy 's in Grimes was delicious, and meeting young Iowans was even better. | Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2023 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We couldn’t do any of this without you, Peter.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Tomorrow, we’ll reach the end of the month — and our first fundraising
milestone of 2023. Every month, we set fundraising goals that together
make up our budget for the entire year. That means it’s crucial we hit
every single one.

Right now, we’re 66% of the way to our goal for January, but we know a
last-minute groundswell will get us where we need to be.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230130-27313&t=1001&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ]Peter, can you
chip in $3 or any amount you can afford to get us across
the finish line by midnight tomorrow?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230130-27313&t=1002&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ][IMG]

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230130-27313&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ]Contribute $3

Peter, every
dollar we raise from our grassroots base is invested right back into our
work to recruit, train, and elect generation after generation of Justice
Democrats. Your donation goes to work helping us to grow the Squad — and
send more working-class champions like Cori Bush, AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and
Summer Lee to Congress.

We set our fundraising goals based on the scale of change we want to make,
and even then we run on a budget that’s way smaller than most. We come to
you because your donations make it possible for us to run ambitious
programs and continue to reject ALL corporate PAC money.

We’re getting close to our End of Month goal, and if enough of our
supporters chip in, we can reach the $78,552 we need by midnight tomorrow.
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230130-27313&t=1022&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ]But that can only happen with your help,
Peter. We’re counting on your
donation today — are you in?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230130-27313-footer&t=1025&refcode2=27313_1203867_hx9F_K&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=27313%2E1203867%2Ehx9F_K

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Tomorrow, we’ll reach the end of the month — and our first fundraising milestone of 2023. Every month, we set fundraising goals that together make up our budget for the entire year. That means it’s crucial we hit every single one. Right now, we’re 66% of the way to our goal for January, but we know a last-minute groundswell will get us where we need to be. [ ]Peter, can you chip in $3 or any amount you can afford to get us across the finish line by midnight tomorrow? [ ][IMG] [ ]Contribute $3 Peter, every dollar we raise from our grassroots base is invested right back into our work to recruit, train, and elect generation after generation of Justice Democrats. Your donation goes to work helping us to grow the Squad — and send more working-class champions like Cori Bush, AOC, Jamaal Bowman, and Summer Lee to Congress. We set our fundraising goals based on the scale of change we want to make, and even then we run on a budget that’s way smaller than most. We come to you because your donations make it possible for us to run ambitious programs and continue to reject ALL corporate PAC money. We’re getting close to our End of Month goal, and if enough of our supporters chip in, we can reach the $78,552 we need by midnight tomorrow. [ ]But that can only happen with your help, Peter. We’re counting on your donation today — are you in? In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is an emerging threat to our democracy spreading rapidly and covertly across the nation.
With most people not understanding or realizing how RCV _**confuses voters**_**,**_**escalates negativity**_**,**_**increases costs**_**, and results in** _**voter suppression**_ , 28 states are already using RCV, and in 2023, 14 State legislatures are considering expanding or adopting RCV. clean_body: | | | | We need to get the word out. | Peter, Ranked-Choice Voting (RCV) is an emerging threat to our democracy spreading rapidly and covertly across the nation. With most people not understanding or realizing how RCV confuses voters,escalates negativity,increases costs, and results in voter suppression , 28 states are already using RCV, and in 2023, 14 State legislatures are considering expanding or adopting RCV. These include: We must contact these state leaders and educate them about the harm RCV does, and how undemocratic it really is. If we don’t act, the entire U.S. election system is about to change. DONATE TO OUR TODAY! >>> | | | | | | | We need your help to get the word out to legislators across the nation today so we can Preserve Democracy. Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka Preserve Democracy | =

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Watch the new free course now
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementa

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=511f1012462b41aa853f76b24a373d14&_e=Fq1kYmBjL35anwNnQ-JcoMkrClSN988gsdk8As7QvNdcx6vwWqbDpBZQnQ4TfevU-FlBFBTakruQwOBlJjvrCtZwTM4X4oWr9R44lDRO1ZVn0DhkzbCHceHMarIj7Cv7kN-zY41vYeu9CYYXem3dCxtj4PyBiwB2ki2doFSD2M5BL4n06IJOCG2sulKE9H5gORqltCfSa3MksIWl0ZOkePxH_RZkejJy7J9NA9XwTGmJ2kUznCXwLfNnzhyFDSvgz9OQEMigAffFDjXoZidc3VRmXviZQSnTPgfk3h6oc5tMQyUZtARN42uV7QILer9WXNIWir69TBipwmrR-GD16jwLO5e_y5YBFQeS_OM60AcP6O8MQrYpQH_Lc4dMBBO_X_tCiDmNr_fnqa-q5_eoMw%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=511f1012462b41aa853f76b24a373d14&_e=Fq1kYmBjL35anwNnQ-JcoMkrClSN988gsdk8As7QvNdcx6vwWqbDpBZQnQ4TfevU-FlBFBTakruQwOBlJjvrCtZwTM4X4oWr9R44lDRO1ZVn0DhkzbCHceHMarIj7Cv7kN-zY41vYeu9CYYXem3dCxtj4PyBiwB2ki2doFSD2M5BL4n06IJOCG2sulKE9H5gORqltCfSa3MksIWl0ZOkePxH_RZkejJy7J9NA9XwTGmJ2kUznCXwLfNnzhyFDSvgv7T3kE20KU1jvngELwVDcJnsWzgK_uhK8jb2DfCE2j8X9SjXjAIiTxBZOjrxoLInedG-L93XqjJSfijXOYnd3w3Fr3HNKlzRsSuxf3FaVEj9mLHD-XMIzUt-yFLk-CM_YWyyzaJ44eHXnAsnbEzO1g%3D%3D)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=511f1012462b41aa853f76b24a373d14&_e=Fq1kYmBjL35anwNnQ-JcoMkrClSN988gsdk8As7QvNdcx6vwWqbDpBZQnQ4TfevU-FlBFBTakruQwOBlJjvrCtZwTM4X4oWr9R44lDRO1ZVn0DhkzbCHceHMarIj7Cv7kN-zY41vYeu9CYYXem3dCxtj4PyBiwB2ki2doFSD2M5BL4n06IJOCG2sulKE9H5gORqltCfSa3MksIWl0ZOkePxH_RZkejJy7J9NA9XwTGmJ2kUznCXwLfNnzhyFDSvgkLSaqmNvKmpPxzvCdUmLjEDsLNQn4sMymlPYdCD5lAX2arQI2l56CfnyixEY2ltHjuu2LqZsCut3JIZWhuqML0RHCB6gk3LPwhCgAZgVitdN_mSXXpYVM9osoE7qRQKCsuiKHdxvxik9vNq8Rhfrbw%3D%3D)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand—and learn how to confront—the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers.

subject: Our First BIG Test

body:
Fellow American, - _Can you believe the first month of 2023 is almost over?_

Every new year brings new challenges and opportunities, and for me, personally, that’s especially true this year -- **[and it’s why I’m not wasting any time contacting you.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2825f5816c3240f1973b5cf9d38b5ca2&_e=HkJ5_YlCKO8B2Wogx9pzzC6Ue39uFoLE0Z85WZg7znXAh7QKZ3RU0B6I3T-vDKZO6_lPzqrTOhmSkt-9oMxeUFvnYcJGXGGuXNI7_YjwbjkgKuPWU_77WuhtIpZ_26jpCaUXVDo_bvMUUI-wq3O40M6dkuJhEey96vjKnqkI4s5VNcZ1xvzoMkmIBH8iL9VzaXUI6UDqtgcgMrqQZ9J0Lh05_-MZouagmClrrc78RMCHoD0aG9vUxGmCGypBe1vOPhPOkO6wvW39DO0xb0IkLZJIuV2gdSZ96NiD2r9eBA-TLqDSVGcN082vjlr-MgJAwk_cnIgdDwHgZWx72UU8H-aDJD3IbN3iHcW4qhmiLFVnXO8Qbf2-ejdeETID9MRCQAzlNEBs2-LF6LTIguN94baN0u8a77lacuU3q56QuGBwJS3e_gbvcjuzfupxcN_Q)**

Because Fellow American, with the end of January comes my first big test as the new Chairman of Senate Republicans and **[I’m counting on conservatives like you to pass this challenge with flying colors!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2825f5816c3240f1973b5cf9d38b5ca2&_e=HkJ5_YlCKO8B2Wogx9pzzC6Ue39uFoLE0Z85WZg7znXAh7QKZ3RU0B6I3T-vDKZO6_lPzqrTOhmSkt-9oMxeUFvnYcJGXGGuXNI7_YjwbjkgKuPWU_77WuhtIpZ_26jpCaUXVDo_bvMUUI-wq3O40M6dkuJhEey96vjKnqkI4s5VNcZ1xvzoMkmIBH8iL9VzaXUI6UDqtgcgMrqQZ9J0Lh05_-MZouagmClrrc78RMCHoD0aG9vUxGmCGypBe1vOPhPOkO6wvW39DO0xb0IkLZJIuV2gdSZ96NiD2r9eBA_6LKXaGyYwyVX8ztjWiWypZtsPAx2V5zKBtGuJ2lvJPizi0634aL7rA98cGSi-7d9AOpyZuMjGrQVYHDXmBeX4Gu4Eao55iU4HakzTzk3H70-I9XZdh0BXBAVoOdYwkI0SuevDMfXKUMhDU7izMz54)**

**Tomorrow at midnight is the first official deadline of 2023.** I hope you will help me set a mark that gets the NRSC off on the right foot AND sends a huge message to Chuck Schumer and the radical Biden Democrats: **_I took on this new responsibility to WIN and that’s what we’re going to do._**

Fellow American, the 2024 Presidential Election Cycle has begun, and though the U.S. Senate Map is favorable to our goal of winning a powerful new GOP Senate Majority -- with 23 of 343 races featuring Democrats up for re-election -- **we can’t take anything for granted.**

As we saw in 2022, even when historic trends are favorable, it’s still possible to fall short -- and the need for sweeping Republican victories in 2024 means we must reverse the Democrats’ fundraising advantage: in the 2021-2022 cycle, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee outraised the NRSC by **_$40 million_** \-- and we can’t let that happen again.

**[Fellow American, I’m urging you to stand with me and make sure we’re out of the gates strong to carry us all the way to the finish sending $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more TODAY!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2825f5816c3240f1973b5cf9d38b5ca2&_e=HkJ5_YlCKO8B2Wogx9pzzC6Ue39uFoLE0Z85WZg7znXAh7QKZ3RU0B6I3T-vDKZO6_lPzqrTOhmSkt-9oMxeUFvnYcJGXGGuXNI7_YjwbjkgKuPWU_77WuhtIpZ_26jpCaUXVDo_bvMUUI-wq3O40M6dkuJhEey96vjKnqkI4s5VNcZ1xvzoMkmIBH8iL9VzaXUI6UDqtgcgMrqQZ9J0Lh05_-MZouagmClrrc78RMCHoD0aG9vUxGmCGypBe1vOPhPOkO6wvW39DO0xb0IkLZJIuV2gdSZ96NiD2r9eBA-gaLfDmXJkKMuc-z8zPQ8AJQfFCOvPfy7KJjWB8glg8BeI0-jwk00l7To9dzpxcLx0D5yBLh90yU8aCoMqwq42d5HZsUMRF8IFJRnbwJT3-FBtMpgyNOBxeU9rb4kZA3d0ezgl2VvPJJK0M0v-j9fs)**

For border security, Supreme Court and federal judge confirmations, tax and spending cuts, and so much more, we must prevail in 2024 -- **and it’s up to US to ensure we do.**

Remember, we only have one chance to make a first impression, so let’s get going and get this done! Time’s up at midnight tomorrow night though so don’t hesitate -- **[chip in $5 or more RIGHT NOW!](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=2825f5816c3240f1973b5cf9d38b5ca2&_e=HkJ5_YlCKO8B2Wogx9pzzC6Ue39uFoLE0Z85WZg7znXAh7QKZ3RU0B6I3T-vDKZO6_lPzqrTOhmSkt-9oMxeUFvnYcJGXGGuXNI7_YjwbjkgKuPWU_77WuhtIpZ_26jpCaUXVDo_bvMUUI-wq3O40M6dkuJhEey96vjKnqkI4s5VNcZ1xvzoMkmIBH8iL9VzaXUI6UDqtgcgMrqQZ9J0Lh05_-MZouagmClrrc78RMCHoD0aG9vUxGmCGypBe1vOPhPOkO6wvW39DO0xb0IkLZJIuV2gdSZ96NiD2r9eBA_pomb9ZXvHGDl7-y0cGnwJ_RDBX9Q5lS_heLaLP_Y0Q1W0rVRlFEL14QlJFXnp6Ij9FPGWq4TMSanzVHldh7p6SM3gkKv-_2UoNBlH9C0_SaZ_HQI1TIYfaTIiFf_2gbDOw2OGyhHBSeo5sNT-ZRIj)**

body:
We'll be brief
#
Peter,
The end of January marks our first fundraising deadline — and my team has set a goal to reach 700 more contributions by the end of the month to stay on track with our fundraising projections.
As a fierce advocate for the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, **_I don't accept a dime in corporate money —** I never have and I never will. _There’s a better way forward and it starts with folks like you, Peter.
[**So today I'm asking: will you be one of the 700 supporters we need to power our progressive movement before the end of the month?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27580?refcode=em20230130-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27580?refcode=em20230130-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)**
By living our values and expanding our people-powered coalition, we are building a movement that invests in improving the lives of working people across the country — ** _and not just the one percent**_.
With Republicans now controlling a small minority in the House, it's on all of us to do everything in our power to secure our progressive future we've fought so hard for. We can't allow our hard-fought victories to be reversed — and I will fight tirelessly to make sure that doesn't happen.
We've seen what happens when we're able to build a new political consensus around the issues impacting our communities and advocate and organize around the bold solutions we need. So when I say _**every donation matters, I truly mean it, Peter._**
With one day left in the month, [**will you be one of the 700 supporters we need at this critical moment?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27580?refcode=em20230130-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)
Thank you for being an important part of the people-first movement we're building together.
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27580?refcode=em20230130-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230130-2113-footer&t=23&refcode2=2113_420207_d7c6M6&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2113%2E420207%2Ed7c6M6)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

| Peter,

Every month, our team sets a fundraising goal to help us set our campaign and legislative priorities.

Though the midterm elections are over, these fundraising deadlines are essential in helping us rally support for crucial issues like reproductive freedom and expanding voter access. Not to mention, they help us lay the groundwork early for what’s bound to be a difficult 2024 election cycle.

As it’s her first term in office, these deadlines also show Valerie she has your support as she advocates for working families in North Carolina and beyond. [_**Will you show your support for Valerie and an early commitment to taking back the House by chipping in $5 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58042152/389854622/-340664628?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230130-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTU3NmU0OS0wMWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=050UlqwYb8xcBa1p8YRVZNYnvoOv7LvL5JLmfHlg6WE=)

Friend,
We are not only running against Joe Biden...
...We are also going up against the entire Deep State.
Entrenched bureaucrats within the federal government have been trying to SABOTAGE our America First movement since DAY ONE.
They’ve published phony dossiers, incited a $32 million Russia witch hunt, colluded with billion-dollar tech corporations to help Biden, and even **RAIDED MY HOME**.

name: Gordon Center
subject: Our work together must continue
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
In 2022, #TeamLizzie pushed hard across the new TX-07 district to get out the vote and talk about Lizzie and her work in Congress — and it worked! Lizzie has now won three general elections on the strength of this team and the campaigns we’ve built together.
As Lizzie’s campaign treasurer, I can tell you firsthand how much went into making those victories possible. Those efforts took months of planning, organizing, and fundraising.
We have to continue that important campaign work as we look ahead to 2024, and this time, we have the added task of winning back the House majority.
We helped Lizzie and Democrats regain the majority in 2018, so I know we can do it again, but we need to start working toward that outcome now. Tomorrow we have our first big deadline of the year — if you’re able to make a contribution, we’d really appreciate it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/folf230130?refcode=folf230130]
Thanks,
Gordon Center
Campaign Treasurer

name: Madhur Bansal, EMILY's List
subject: [2024 SENATE] Republicans have the wind at their back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
|
---
| | Every single dollar will make a difference. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58043651/389869979/-712162911?sourceid=1048555&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZThjNTlkYi0wOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbB0SGerXb8WvDouao1FI_UdGnkqORaG2sLxEGFL7E0=&emci=f0b20c16-01a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e8c59db-08a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) **This doesn't look good for us, Peter:** _Sabato's Crystal Ball_ is already reporting that the Senate will be a TOSS-UP in 2024.

Right now, experts say that Democrats will be in a very tough position, with 23 currently-blue Senate seats in play, and four current Democratic seats rated as toss-ups or worse. Democrats will need to play more defense, which we know means the GOP will be on the attack.

**We've been here before. Pundits predicted a red wave in 2022, but in the first post-_Roe_ election, pro-choice activists carried Democrats to victory in races across the country. Together, we overcame the odds and protected our Senate majority.**

**[But we need your help to do it again. Can we count on you to step up and donate right now, before our first big fundraising deadline of the year, so EMILY's List can build up the resources we need to fight back?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58043658/389869986/-712162911?sourceid=1048555&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZThjNTlkYi0wOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbB0SGerXb8WvDouao1FI_UdGnkqORaG2sLxEGFL7E0=&emci=f0b20c16-01a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e8c59db-08a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** There's no doubt anti-choice megadonors will pour MILLIONS into key battleground races across the country — pulling out all the stops to defeat Democratic pro-choice women and push their dangerous anti-choice agenda. It will take ALL HANDS ON DECK from this millions-strong movement to go up against the extremists who want to stop our momentum.

**If we want to protect our fundamental rights, we don't have a second to waste. The critical work of investing in this cycle's pro-choice women candidates starts right now.**

Early money will be what makes the difference in these critical races. It means we can get ahead of the competition, rally our supporters, and hit the ground running to help spread the message of our pro-choice candidates fighting their hearts out for us.

**But we need your support, Peter. Will you donate $15 or more to help EMILY's List build up our resources, elect more pro-choice women, and defend our pro-choice Senate majority?**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/First-Goal-of-the-Year](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58043659/389869987/-712162911?sourceid=1048555&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZThjNTlkYi0wOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbB0SGerXb8WvDouao1FI_UdGnkqORaG2sLxEGFL7E0=&emci=f0b20c16-01a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e8c59db-08a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

In races as unpredictable as 2024 will be, every dollar will make a difference.

Thank you,

Madhur Bansal (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58043661/389869989/-712162911?sourceid=1048555&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZThjNTlkYi0wOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbB0SGerXb8WvDouao1FI_UdGnkqORaG2sLxEGFL7E0=&emci=f0b20c16-01a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e8c59db-08a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58043662/389869990/1622596825?sourceid=1048555&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZThjNTlkYi0wOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dbB0SGerXb8WvDouao1FI_UdGnkqORaG2sLxEGFL7E0=&emci=f0b20c16-01a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7e8c59db-08a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

clean_body: | | | Every single dollar will make a difference. This doesn't look good for us, Peter: Sabato's Crystal Ball is already reporting that the Senate will be a TOSS-UP in 2024. Right now, experts say that Democrats will be in a very tough position, with 23 currently-blue Senate seats in play, and four current Democratic seats rated as toss-ups or worse. Democrats will need to play more defense, which we know means the GOP will be on the attack. We've been here before. Pundits predicted a red wave in 2022, but in the first post-Roe election, pro-choice activists carried Democrats to victory in races across the country. Together, we overcame the odds and protected our Senate majority. There's no doubt anti-choice megadonors will pour MILLIONS into key battleground races across the country — pulling out all the stops to defeat Democratic pro-choice women and push their dangerous anti-choice agenda. It will take ALL HANDS ON DECK from this millions-strong movement to go up against the extremists who want to stop our momentum. If we want to protect our fundamental rights, we don't have a second to waste. The critical work of investing in this cycle's pro-choice women candidates starts right now. Early money will be what makes the difference in these critical races. It means we can get ahead of the competition, rally our supporters, and hit the ground running to help spread the message of our pro-choice candidates fighting their hearts out for us. But we need your support, Peter. Will you donate $15 or more to help EMILY's List build up our resources, elect more pro-choice women, and defend our pro-choice Senate majority? In races as unpredictable as 2024 will be, every dollar will make a difference. Thank you, Madhur Bansal (she/her/hers) Vice President of Research, EMILY's List | ---|---|--- EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.

| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...

_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Taking action on ANTIFA
body:

The American promise of order and safety for our citizens demands it.

body:
Fellow American, - _Can you believe the first month of 2023 is almost over?_

Every new year brings new challenges and opportunities, and for me, personally, that’s especially true this year -- **[and it’s why I’m not wasting any time contacting you.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c0ae2ccd9af41149ba29ecc5c58ce37&_e=xSP235wEWrTjjQkZxVhtuTmYv-73nc6Oud36nqE-862tLD33w7cpo8SJelQ5dVMHBek-P4X6p3QI39pFAxsM-FaARBgn_BzbnwQ8eTQVwloOat0V6FBCpUvL-S-QH-vYrrQZ1gWF-_ZLYaQyQ1BxU-JPAH4--q14mzBj7h7MzHmipKqlziak3rfG0X5CXSV-U3ldvOXAC58imuVG8gYEwUZeLIfrmWn_JwQ-303cYLX1-t6FzpBsn7-LucGqWB2w1QWA7861DN0qL2DXwMF8fS_HtidV1nZag7gz9YcTePmdKqCCNy97tnMVDXCLGAG-5F1ywMqm66xv3cSX1gbElVZFNiQbl-4g1novuGhibIiNXa6dOpkZCNVx72bv48pqec1MZcgZ4dF6M4zujO1aeNCXSmqCxcdCPkPWq2cpYuM6T2f1VlVOOmsTH62_nKzz)**

**Tomorrow at midnight is the first official deadline of 2023.** I hope you will help me set a mark that gets the NRSC off on the right foot AND sends a huge message to Chuck Schumer and the radical Biden Democrats: **_I took on this new responsibility to WIN and that’s what we’re going to do._**

Fellow American, the 2024 Presidential Election Cycle has begun, and though the U.S. Senate Map is favorable to our goal of winning a powerful new GOP Senate Majority -- with 23 of 343 races featuring Democrats up for re-election -- **we can’t take anything for granted.**

As we saw in 2022, even when historic trends are favorable, it’s still possible to fall short -- and the need for sweeping Republican victories in 2024 means we must reverse the Democrats’ fundraising advantage: in the 2021-2022 cycle, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee outraised the NRSC by **_$40 million_** \-- and we can’t let that happen again.

**[Fellow American, I’m urging you to stand with me and make sure we’re out of the gates strong to carry us all the way to the finish sending $25, $50, $75, $100, or even more TODAY!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c0ae2ccd9af41149ba29ecc5c58ce37&_e=xSP235wEWrTjjQkZxVhtuTmYv-73nc6Oud36nqE-862tLD33w7cpo8SJelQ5dVMHBek-P4X6p3QI39pFAxsM-FaARBgn_BzbnwQ8eTQVwloOat0V6FBCpUvL-S-QH-vYrrQZ1gWF-_ZLYaQyQ1BxU-JPAH4--q14mzBj7h7MzHmipKqlziak3rfG0X5CXSV-U3ldvOXAC58imuVG8gYEwUZeLIfrmWn_JwQ-303cYLX1-t6FzpBsn7-LucGqWB2w1QWA7861DN0qL2DXwMF8fS_HtidV1nZag7gz9YcTePkAbrqUL2ohCbppkPMuNTpzZ9kbO66DhCzCL5q3y6hFL_7K7alutwhgLnYdOJax7TDcf0AXfwKpxxcVLYCieU6oxuiliLj3EZRh1UzB0Qt3VaSGPczV5ncAOcXyRe5V5Nbt4VU9ugIQ7VZHkxzyA_b1)**

For border security, Supreme Court and federal judge confirmations, tax and spending cuts, and so much more, we must prevail in 2024 -- **and it’s up to US to ensure we do.**

Remember, we only have one chance to make a first impression, so let’s get going and get this done! Time’s up at midnight tomorrow night though so don’t hesitate -- **[chip in $5 or more RIGHT NOW!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c0ae2ccd9af41149ba29ecc5c58ce37&_e=xSP235wEWrTjjQkZxVhtuTmYv-73nc6Oud36nqE-862tLD33w7cpo8SJelQ5dVMHBek-P4X6p3QI39pFAxsM-FaARBgn_BzbnwQ8eTQVwloOat0V6FBCpUvL-S-QH-vYrrQZ1gWF-_ZLYaQyQ1BxU-JPAH4--q14mzBj7h7MzHmipKqlziak3rfG0X5CXSV-U3ldvOXAC58imuVG8gYEwUZeLIfrmWn_JwQ-303cYLX1-t6FzpBsn7-LucGqWB2w1QWA7861DN0qL2DXwMF8fS_HtidV1nZag7gz9YcTePkTDTYN5hv00KRogEu2gSaKYU9CccjJg4q6K2hP-Vo29qp2649nO3BDp3VhwrkEClVzLXsRJpts0rxFaBMaWVnui3-MyEpPd8S2NUiXgVnxMVRhPWnaM8dn0LgXvlCmQ8xrgSrhUEqRO8surXqNtsRw)**

clean_body: Fellow American, - Can you believe the first month of 2023 is almost over? Every new year brings new challenges and opportunities, and for me, personally, that’s especially true this year -- Because Fellow American, with the end of January comes my first big test as the new Chairman of Senate Republicans and Tomorrow at midnight is the first official deadline of 2023. I hope you will help me set a mark that gets the NRSC off on the right foot AND sends a huge message to Chuck Schumer and the radical Biden Democrats: I took on this new responsibility to WIN and that’s what we’re going to do. Fellow American, the 2024 Presidential Election Cycle has begun, and though the U.S. Senate Map is favorable to our goal of winning a powerful new GOP Senate Majority -- with 23 of 343 races featuring Democrats up for re-election -- we can’t take anything for granted. As we saw in 2022, even when historic trends are favorable, it’s still possible to fall short -- and the need for sweeping Republican victories in 2024 means we must reverse the Democrats’ fundraising advantage: in the 2021-2022 cycle, the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee outraised the NRSC by $40 million \-- and we can’t let that happen again. For border security, Supreme Court and federal judge confirmations, tax and spending cuts, and so much more, we must prevail in 2024 -- and it’s up to US to ensure we do. Remember, we only have one chance to make a first impression, so let’s get going and get this done! Time’s up at midnight tomorrow night though so don’t hesitate -- Thanks, Steve Daines NRSC Chairman If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Fellow Patriot,
As you have seen, each month we have monthly donation deadlines. Governor Reeves thought it important we explain these goals and why we do them!

Each month, our finance team informs us how much it costs for us to knock doors, make TV ads, radio ads, and all things campaigning! It is VITAL we meet these goals and deadlines EACH MONTH to keep the playing field fair.

That being said, this month, thanks to y'all, we have reached our January goal!

We will have a lot of deadlines in the future and always appreciate your support.

---
| | Thank you,

Team Reeves

name: Your America
subject: “What happened to my country?”
body:
It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7843%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=6CiTMhXyOe3OC6IgsGs1Vw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94728%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9jTg2J6sy%2btSoJIg1ohzwg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Our newest online course opens with the question, “What happened to my country?”

It’s a question I’ve asked myself many times over the last few years as I’ve read the latest reports on radical gender ideology pushed in our elementary schools, speech squashed by the media and corporate class, basic rights left unprotected in many of our cities, and economic opportunity diminished for millions of Americans.

To understand the source of these radical changes that undermine the rights of American citizens, we’ve produced the new online course, **“The American Left: From Liberalism to Despotism.”**
---
| | [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94729%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lKj143qK0UIrKikNR0N1JA&sysid=1)
---
In this course, Dr. Kevin Slack, associate professor of politics at Hillsdale College, traces the transformation of the American left over the last 100 years. You’ll learn how post-sixties radicals rejected the midcentury liberalism of Franklin Roosevelt; you’ll discover the origins of modern gender ideology, identity politics, and today’s global elite; and, you’ll explore how these movements overtook America’s key institutions.

You can watch the trailer for the course and preregister today using the secure link below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/american-left-preregister/](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94720%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CNbUP39B2p4I52GtSU7qCg&sysid=1)**

I hope you’ll join us to better understand--and learn how to confront--the woke ideologies that dominate American politics today.
Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7959%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=0y1cUBLHDooFATFcjgx9Hg&sysid=1)
The end of personal freedom has begun in America.

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.**

On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the 'digital dollar'. They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo.

**And you should be scared!**

The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government.

**Privacy is gone.** They will know exactly how much money you have. Where it is kept. What you are spending it on.

And if they don't approve, they can take it all away with a click of a button.

Don't support their candidates? Gone.

**The framework is now in place for total control.**

**Accept your FREE copy of this wealth-protection guide ... at no-cost and no-obligation to you. **

But you must act before this digital nightmare completely takes over.

**_[Get your free copy of the Information Guide to learn more.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94736%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F2Kdm6fuigNsqsv9pYIYEQ&sysid=1)_**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign now: Ban assault weapons
body:
Enough gun massacres
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f840219-a5fb-4694-a7ea-c1f209ed7c87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Banning assault weapons saves lives. The 1994 [federal assault weapons ban](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c7a9301-5dee-47e9-9574-4c95962039d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), which lasted until 2004, reduced the risk of a person in the U.S. dying from a mass shooting by 70%. Both the number of deaths and the number of annual incidents decreased significantly. **[Sign the petition: Ban assault weapons.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4478fd68-7688-4efe-aff4-b9ce684d4b62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Time and time again, assault weapons are used in the deadliest [mass shootings](https://default.salsalabs.org/T657db07e-d6a3-4fd0-a118-13c95f3f3c1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) in America. Between 2009 and 2018, assault weapons accounted for 25% of death and 76% of nonfatal injuries in mass shootings. They are uniquely lethal, allowing the most murders in the shortest amount of time. They are weapons of war and have no place on our streets.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76c78192-3248-441e-acf5-2b1e6661102f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Congress must act responsibly and enact a federal assault weapons ban. If they fail to act, state legislatures must step in with a ban in their states. [Washington](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf3391c7-f90c-4c18-9ab7-63773e24576d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Illinois](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92910983-073f-4fa0-a738-89dbd7ce966f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) have already initiated such measures. Other states must follow suit. Other [countries](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta332ec80-7f3b-4649-87b5-fa764de62ef4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) have taken decisive action to ban assault rifles and have seen drastic reductions in gun violence. We MUST do the same. **[Sign the petition: Ban assault weapons.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca343460-d46b-4277-92c8-0c85bf0c02a4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** Thank you for standing up to the gun manufacturers’ lobby, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9605791-e7ec-4c19-9d10-542256b47732/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/banassaultweapons-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T558141f2-94ff-4648-91c2-2231ba8996d9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b7af5ed3-2ec2-42bc-bb05-c5a4c374436f&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=b7af5ed3-2ec2-42bc-bb05-c5a4c374436f&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62270891:J6rCJHGXN:m:1:3331421248:91F5612A74B96153576FEA7927CC6D58:r)
---

Kevin's first couple of weeks in office have confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62270891:J6rCJHGXN:m:1:3331421248:91F5612A74B96153576FEA7927CC6D58:r "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62270891:J6rCJHGXN:m:1:3331421248:91F5612A74B96153576FEA7927CC6D58:r)

| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62270891:J6rCJHGXN:m:1:3331421248:91F5612A74B96153576FEA7927CC6D58:r)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

subject: Did You Hear About What God Just Did?!?
body:
God Just Did Something BIG! Over the last two years, God has tremendously blessed Sheridan.Church in Tulsa, OK with supernatural growth and influence
| | |
---
## God Just Did Something BIG!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10194.1.4488b27d2b822944d97b44e665413215)
---
Over the **last two years** , God has tremendously blessed [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10195.1.f6c9e3a92644eb26b5ed00b290773662) in Tulsa, OK with supernatural growth and influence.
We have outgrown our current location and fortunately we acquired 14 acres in South Tulsa last year.
**Pastor Greg Locke** of **Global Vision Bible Church** in Mt. Julliet, TN, recently asked me if I would like to have his 20,000 sq ft **Tent Cathedral** that seats 2,500 people as well as the chairs to go with it... for FREE!
I obviously said... **YES!**
The **Tent Cathedral** and the chairs are loaded and on their way to Tulsa, OK!
I want to thank **Pastor Greg Locke** for his generosity.
I foresee, hopefully this Fall, the **Tent Cathedral** erected in Tulsa, OK for some **nighttime revival services under the tent!**
I promise to keep you up to date on when and where.
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

## Sheridan.Church Is Coming To OKC!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10207.1.e8697a547f7dde683643c507c4eeaf35)
---
**I am excited to announce** that [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10208.1.9120a572b27716c76df5ce7c76ad311d) in Tulsa, OK is launching a **new campus in Oklahoma City!**
If you or someone you know lives in the OKC Metro and is searching for a Church Home, then I want to invite you to join me for a [Interest Meet & Greet](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10209.1.065052a96994c3ffafd35dc648051788).
**Date** : Saturday, February 25, 2023
**Time** : 5:00 - 6:30 pm
**Location** : 2222 W. Hefner Rd. Oklahoma City, OK 73120
**RSVP** : [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/sheridanchurch/846320](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10210.1.b37599ca4db5a55838d0c62c0ff6d5c6)
To learn more about [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10211.1.f95abe77ae845a36076db54aff2db27c) please visit: [www.sheridan.church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10212.1.780721f8a0832cad87d156d5af579dca)
| | [ Learn More About Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10213.1.fcb41f57d1f648f87d3727446a509754)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10214.1.3d3ffe869be717613e238013b11ba6a1)
---
**I want to personally invite you** to join me for February's National Prayer Zoom Call hosted by [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10215.1.21dc10ab649f43991687c209af516b8b) with special guest **Roger Stone**.
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the Netflix documentary ‘ _Get Me Roger Stone_.’
A veteran of ten national presidential campaigns, he served as a senior campaign aide to three Republican presidents: **Nixon** , **Reagan** , and **Trump**.
Mr. Stone will provide us with **insights** and **updates** regarding the 2024 race for the White House.
We will have Pastors from across the nation lead us in a time of prayer and I believe it is important for you to join us.
This National Prayer Call is not just for Pastors only but for believers across America. Therefore, encourage others to join in!
You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10216.1.633f5355dab9e0b3acc806fd341508bf) and when you register an email will be sent to you prior to the Zoom Conference Call with the link and details of how to join.
The National Prayer Call will take place on Monday, February 6 at 7:30pm EST.
| | [ Join February's National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10217.1.080d946fa98d443274da3621c373b1ff)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10218.1.0878100578dc98595b64249e2e6791a5)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10219.1.008125ffa7661b32124e41cc811c30dc) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10220.1.90cc7de9f6a79296a65026f50a212a91)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10221.1.95bc2b1e6d5127d3f73ef4258ad1a8c1) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10222.1.e0a382d9aa5d5df8f121264b857bedef) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10223.1.b9bc4d50d59abae7936197722986922e) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10224.1.af0cc17c899fa29e2f297eca7fbac0bf) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10225.1.83e49825ae14f88083ed5f86a71566aa) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17420510.10226.1.b27afec659e01530af31bcf492cac95a) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---
---
©2023 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK 74145
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Explaining our campaign debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win.
My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through.
Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.
Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan]
I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off.
Thank you for your help.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

clean_body: Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress before the end of the year, and we’ve got just a little bit left to go. If you could give just $10 right now -- split with Serve America -- to help us pay it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the link: secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-hassan [] Look – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were doubting whether we could win. My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might that the funding will come through. Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top. Will you please give $10 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Serve America, and I’d be grateful for anything you can give. [] I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off. Thank you for your help. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan [] DONATE [] [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . body:

[](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zussq0g2lq2p957dmlk63gvd51jepnqsmvcgnueg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chjmcor4cdh2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a critical $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two crucial, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zi1qovlo5c5h7cgcl91hnkam6l1go6gq8ml4ekdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chjmcor4cdh2bs)

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z9f57ikc84hn1jfr2vmnee3s8tq0t4io3oerjdko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chjmcor4cdh2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

P.S. Dear Patriot, you and I know deranged Joe Biden and his out-of-control FBI and DOJ are committing terrible crimes against the January 6 Peaceful Protesters. [**But you can help me fight back for them peacefully and legally with your best gift now of $25, $50, $100, or more.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6qsct2l5tiaji0fcsnk8pqojvdpg8js3fol1er8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chjmcor4cdh2bs)

I know it seems early to sound the alarm about goals, but as someone who’s run a tight race or two, I’ve seen elections won and lost long before the first voters tune in. In 2024, we’re going to see important races decided by slivers of a percent — and the amount we invest early in holding the Senate and taking back the House can make the difference. As Democrats and progressives, we know that there is so much that we need our leaders in Congress to act on:
Making health care, housing, and child care universal and affordable for all of Vermont’s families, paying our workers dignified wages, reining in corporate greed, stopping the rise of fascism and hate, tackling the climate crisis, and so much more.
**But instead, Republicans have hijacked Washington’s legislative agenda, turning it into a place to fight divisive culture wars, attack our earned benefits, and undermine the ways that we can hold our government and elected officials accountable to the people. **
**If this is a sign of what’s ahead, then I need you to stand with me as we push for progress.[Take a moment to watch this video message to my supporters, and then pitch in $5 or more to help us hit our end-of-month goal before tomorrow’s deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58065052/389921088/-558779617?refcode=E20157-20230130-DeadlineVideo-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZjNjMzM2My03Y2ExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r76sXBNqtwItVpqW9mTscBT32tlEun9b9xvo-m-PdFI=)**

**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. clean_body: Take a second to watch this video message to my supporters | | Hey Peter: Becca here. My first month in Congress has been exciting – but also extremely alarming. Republicans are already trying to use their House majority to restrict abortion rights, reduce oversight into political corruption, and gut Social Security and Medicare. = I recorded a quick message to my supporters speaking to everything that’s at stake – and why your small-dollar contributions are mission-critical in keeping up the fight to protect our priorities in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = As Democrats and progressives, we know that there is so much that we need our leaders in Congress to act on: Making health care, housing, and child care universal and affordable for all of Vermont’s families, paying our workers dignified wages, reining in corporate greed, stopping the rise of fascism and hate, tackling the climate crisis, and so much more. But instead, Republicans have hijacked Washington’s legislative agenda, turning it into a place to fight divisive culture wars, attack our earned benefits, and undermine the ways that we can hold our government and elected officials accountable to the people. If this is a sign of what’s ahead, then I need you to stand with me as we push for progress.= = Thank you for standing with me, Becca Balint Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. [**But grassroots Democrats led the charge to defy history and beat back last year’s predicted “red wave.” I know you can help me take back the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58066452/389926235/1662333042?refcode=20230131_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmY5NTk1MS04MGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4rFInWj5-ZIaDoFcwAsnNyo-ZMF8wqFqlRhrXyEuZE=)

This election isn’t about me. It’s about doing right by the American people.

And right now, under the control of extreme MAGA Republicans, we have a Congress that’s more focused on political stunts than problem solving.

You deserve better, Peter.
[**House Democrats are continuing our efforts to deliver for everyday Americans, put People Over Politics, and work on the issues you care about most.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58066456/389926239/1662333042?refcode=20230131_em_fr_b1_jeffries_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmY5NTk1MS04MGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-4rFInWj5-ZIaDoFcwAsnNyo-ZMF8wqFqlRhrXyEuZE=)

That’s why I’m personally asking for 1,311 more gifts before my first big deadline since becoming House Democratic Leader.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

While the new House Republican majority focuses on the wrong priorities and picking partisan fights, I am working with Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to find common ground on important issues like fighting inflation, bringing back manufacturing, and economically competing with China.

In the last Congress, we passed historic _bipartisan_ legislation to reduce prescription drug costs, deliver for our veterans, invest in our infrastructure, and so much more. In this new Congress, I’ll keep striving to work with members on both sides to get things done.

**[Your support is critical to my work (and Democrats' ability to take back the House in 2024), so please chip in $15 or any amount today to become a founding member of Team Kildee 2023.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58068263/389931989/-630289467?amount=15&contactdata=EX7xDbDL6NniJph9LClP4HGLXCs%2BrC%2FJ0QmT61WqF4ic9Ezjzl92C1y6dIz7dZhjIC%2FCdyRFwuILChsnQ86wLn4K8%2BMkY%2F4zg%2FlyhnjoJDeUhySduotkPvE1GeC7ULcdev5hD8lozMFOzJURpJe0LQ%3D%3D&refcode2=94aa9a7b-82a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_DK_20230131_FR_1.2_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_eom_membership&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NGFhOWE3Yi04MmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NkgZb9g-0UsE4-e0d2vQ1oQ_IacrFyqC1Ma-wolzgLc=)**

Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Help us start this cycle strong and keep the blue wave going into 2024!

Thank you so much for your support,
Dan

Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. clean_body: | Hi — We still have spots available to join Team Kildee 2023 as a Founding Member! Your early support in our race will help Dan win another tough race in our competitive, Republican-leaning district. = For more, check out Dan’s message below! Thanks, Team Kildee Begin Forwarded Message: Hi there, We won a tough race in our Republican-leaning district last year thanks to generous support from folks like you. You helped financially support and volunteer for our campaign which allowed us to make key early investments in the race—and that made all the difference. On Team Kildee, we’re already laying the groundwork to win again in 2024. Because of redistricting, our district will remain one of the most competitive (and expensive) House races, and holding this district will require around-the-clock organizing. That’s why we’re opening up digital supporter spots on Team Kildee 2023. My team is aiming for 500 grassroots donors to step up before the end of the month tomorrow night to show that we’re not wasting any time getting ready for our next tough race. = = If you saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, clicking a button below will cause your donation to process instantly. | | = | = | = | = | = | = While the new House Republican majority focuses on the wrong priorities and picking partisan fights, I am working with Republicans, Independents, and Democrats to find common ground on important issues like fighting inflation, bringing back manufacturing, and economically competing with China. In the last Congress, we passed historic bipartisan legislation to reduce prescription drug costs, deliver for our veterans, invest in our infrastructure, and so much more. In this new Congress, I’ll keep striving to work with members on both sides to get things done. = Last November, we saw what Michigan Democrats can do when they invest early and run smart campaigns. Help us start this cycle strong and keep the blue wave going into 2024! Thank you so much for your support, Dan Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to take back the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! = | = | = Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee Friends of Dan Kildee P.O. Box 248 Flint, MI 48501 United States ** **

subject: we're almost out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I am looking to folks like you to help Team Graham surpass our end-of-month goal. Will you help? |
---
Fellow American - I am asking for your help.

**We have less than 12 HOURS left to reach our first goal of 2023.**

January ends at midnight tonight, so Fellow American, _I am counting on you and other conservative leaders to step up before we reach our first end-of-month deadline!_

It may seem early, but as we saw last election cycle, Republicans were outraised by Democrats month after month. We must start preparing early to take back our country, and that means starting NOW.

[**Would you please step forward immediately with a generous end-of-month contribution of $10, $25, $50, or even $100?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446356:WoKjqVDNF:m:1:877327319:BD8C85BDC02E0DA33CC03365453AC09B:r) It's up to us to help win back the Senate and the White House for Republicans.

Fellow American, we can't afford take our foot off the gas and our eyes off the prize if we want to win back the Senate majority. We cannot win in 2024 if we allow the Left to outraise us month after month for the next two years. **Even though it may seem early, we HAVE TO start now if we want to win the Senate, defeat Joe Biden, and get America back on the right track.**

[**Since there are only a few hours left in January, we don't have much time left to reach this first end-of-month fundraising goal. I am counting on your help and generous support.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446356:WoKjqVDNF:m:1:877327319:BD8C85BDC02E0DA33CC03365453AC09B:r)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Heartbreaking loss? Huge victory? Which one we get in 2024 is going to depend a lot on how this Senate race goes in Wisconsin, a pivotal swing state where we can’t count on the advantage of incumbency.
body:
No safe Senate seat in Wisconsin
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T705d64a3-71bb-46c9-b8ba-62cec4047680/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _A huge victory and a painful loss. _ That's what happened in Wisconsin in the 2022 election. _We won a huge victory reelecting Governor Tony Evers over a democracy-attacking Republican. Yet, in a heartbreaking loss, _Lt. Gov Mandela Barnes lost by only 1%_ to awful Senator Ron Johnson,_ who attacks vaccines and defends AR-15s like they're part of his family. _**In 2024, real progressive, Senator Tammy Baldwin, is up for reelection. Baldwin's a trailblazer, the first open lesbian ever elected to the Senate. Even though she's from a close swing state, whether protecting women's reproductive autonomy, fighting to raise taxes on billionaires or doing all she can to keep our kids safe from guns in school,[we can always count on Senator Baldwin to lead the charge.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6e7a1bd-4a81-47b4-bb6b-76b42e646cd9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**_

---
| _All the prognosticators have predicted we'll lose the Senate in 2024, because we have so many tough seats to defend.** And there's no world in which we lose Senator Baldwin's seat and retain a Senate majority.**_ [**_So, for the awesome trailblazing Tammy Baldwin and our Senate majority, can you join Blue Amp Action in giving Senator Baldwin $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42a56f13-9db7-460a-b575-6a458ae8f480/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you so much, Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbefd1abc-4187-4ca2-a25e-72611b51142f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
