On one side, PA. On the other, DC...

Derek, it’s Team Shapiro here. We’re reaching out because we’re facing our first big fundraising deadline of 2023 in just a few hours, and it’s important we start the year off meeting our goal. We are reaching out because we need your help and, in a moment, we’re going to ask you to **[pitch in a few dollars if you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58069536/389935747/1442861383?refcode=email_013123_eom&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FiOTk0Ny04NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZ0vQBCdQr1rrNILpV1NgNPhNtoeSMTb76i1oV7_jJw=)** | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58069537/389935748/1103110079?refcode=email_013123_eom&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FiOTk0Ny04NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZ0vQBCdQr1rrNILpV1NgNPhNtoeSMTb76i1oV7_jJw=)

But before we do that, we want to talk a bit about why this ongoing movement is worth investing in.
Winning the election was only the start. Now, the hard work has already begun moving Pennsylvania forward: lifting up our schools, preventing violence, strengthening our democracy, and building an economy that gives everyone a shot.
**With far-right extremists in D.C. threatening real progress, it’s more important than ever that we have strong leadership here in states like Pennsylvania to tackle the challenges we face. Consider:**
* Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Shapiro got right to work taking executive action to open doors of opportunity for Pennsylvania workers. Meanwhile, in Washington, D.C., it took nearly a week just for Republicans to pick a Speaker, and they’ve accomplished absolutely nothing since.
* Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Shapiro signed an ethics package to prevent improper influence of his administration. Meanwhile, in D.C., Republicans signed a rules package that could gut their ethics office.
* Here in Pennsylvania, Gov. Shapiro is committed to protecting our basic civil rights. Meanwhile, in D.C., Republicans have already pushed multiple bills restricting access to abortion.

**If we’re going to make progress over the long haul on issues we care about — issues like the right to choose, the right to vote, and high-quality, well-funded public schools — we need to invest in states like Pennsylvania, Derek, and keep working to win the hard fights.**
We _cannot_ let extremist Republicans get an edge over us in this state.
[**Tonight’s fundraising deadline is a big test of our ability to do exactly that — and we would be very grateful if you could help us catch up. Will you please pitch in $25 and help keep Team Shapiro going strong as we take on the tough battles ahead?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58069538/389935749/1103110079?refcode=email_013123_eom&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2FiOTk0Ny04NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TZ0vQBCdQr1rrNILpV1NgNPhNtoeSMTb76i1oV7_jJw=)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: How Biden's Digital Dollar Destroys Freedom
body:
The end of personal freedom has begun in America.

**The 'Digital Dollar' is now a reality.**

On November 15th, 2022, the Federal Reserve announced they are now testing the 'digital dollar'. They'll be joined by major banks like Citigroup, HSBC, Mastercard, and Wells Fargo.

**And you should be scared!**

The 'digital dollar' puts all your money in the hands of the government.

**Privacy is gone.** They will know exactly how much money you have. Where it is kept. What you are spending it on.

And if they don't approve, they can take it all away with a click of a button.

Don't support their candidates? Gone.

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: A birthday fundraiser for the National Network of Abortion Funds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
Friends, my birthday is tomorrow!
I know what you’re thinking - she’s going to ask us to sign her birthday card and then ferry us over to a donation page and ask for money. Not today. (To be clear, there’s nothing wrong with political campaigns raising very necessary resources and celebrating people’s birthdays! This just isn’t that email.)
For my birthday, I’d like to fundraise for the National Network of Abortion Funds. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-nnaf?refcode=20230131_em_sjj_bday1]
I’m not setting a specific goal - I’m just asking all of you to take a moment and think about this organization, and then be as generous as you’re able to be.
Here’s what they do:
- Remove financial and logistical barriers to abortion access.
- Support nearly 100 local organizations around the country to direct funds where they’re most useful.
- Center their work on the intersectionality of racial, economic, and reproductive justice.
I’ve said this many times before and I’m not stopping anytime soon: Abortion rights are a kitchen table issue.
And while I am going to work as hard as I possibly can in the halls of Congress to restore and expand those rights, this is a battle that has to be fought on many grounds in order for us to win. Passing legislation to codify the rights of Roe and to protect people who need and want reproductive care is incredibly important - and we need to support people doing the work on the ground in our communities to secure access to care.
So today, a week after what would’ve been Roe v. Wade’s 50th anniversary, I hope you’ll join me and donate any amount you can to the National Network of Abortion Funds. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-nnaf?refcode=20230131_em_sjj_bday1]
Thank you for anything you’re able to give. Being together in this fight gives me hope.
Sara
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

P.S. If giving financially doesn’t work for you today, that’s OK - consider following them on Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/abortionfunds/] or Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/NationalNetworkofAbortionFunds] to keep up with their work and share with your networks.

Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
Sara Jacobs for Congress
PO Box 120085
San Diego, CA 92112
United States
https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/ [https://www.facebook.com/SaraJacobsCA/] https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/ [https://www.instagram.com/sarajacobsca/] https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca [https://twitter.com/sarajacobsca]
CONTRIBUTE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?refcode=20230131_em_sjj_bday1]

name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7665%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=wm1xw8s8WjSkmy%2f8driPiQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78722%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vSCGyJp%2b8Z0uwJnTib0XrA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78723%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cpN7yfGsa%2fRPPgKqZEoGcA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. subject: States make the difference
body:
| | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=3e73e80e87&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter,We are getting close to the end of the month. Do you take a minute to look over your household budget and start planning for next month? Perhaps you know you have car repair expenses on the horizon or that you have some deferred maintenance on your home.We do the same thing on campaigns. Each month gives us a chance to look ahead and plan for the campaign budget. But I have to tell you, I’m worried. I am running for Governor of Washington State and I need your help if we are going to hit the number we have budgeted in order to stay in this race. **The leftist elites would love nothing more than to see me come up short for the end of month fundraising deadline!**
| [PITCH IN TODAY: SAVE WASHINGTON STATE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=c7306e4c12&e=fdefed58de)
---
We have seven more days until the end of the month in order to prove the political establishment wrong. We have gained great momentum and have made great strides but we are in a fight to win this race. _**The only way we can stop Biden’s destructive policies is by electing Governors who can stand up to him and prevent him from destroying America state by state!!**_ There is immense focus on federal races — but races like mine are where we can TRULY push back against Biden. Look at how Ron DeSantis and Kristi Noem have made their states sanctuaries for LAW-ABIDING, FREEDOM-LOVING AMERICANS! Even with all that Joe Biden is doing, their examples keep their great states safe and insulated from a large majority of his crap.With your help, if you pitch in to my campaign today, you can be part of my victory. When we win, we’ll be the NEXT home of freedom in America!
| [CHIP IN: HELP US STOP JOE BIDEN TODAY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=038eea944c&e=fdefed58de)
---
We are on the verge of major advances here at the start of this campaign but without your help, we may come up short for our monthly fundraising number. We’ve got one week left to finish strong. Your support **WILL** put us in a position to win this race and I need you to dig deep **TODAY** so we can start this race stronger than ever!Any amount you can contribute to help us will greatly be appreciated. Every dime we bring in will go straight to voter contact – because we know that if we can reach the voters with our message of **lower taxes** and **less government intrusion** , we will gain all the votes we need to be the winner!!Please stand with by investing in our historic campaign today!
| [DONATE $15.00](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5c3e05fafa&e=fdefed58de)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn4ifdfu7bu48idd745no68rlngl03aets8tvv1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeap34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8p4mnhtuebl94ade90furgjons343f0hc1hcra8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeap34c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zd9n4litrdp4tgli4o45p80tm35tebtln692ubcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeap34c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Investigate Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**
body:
Dear Peter,

Adam Schiff took America for a ride with years of lies about the Russia collusion hoax.

Schiff then lied about conspiring with the Deep State whistleblower to stage the Ukraine impeachment hoax.

Kicking Adam Schiff off the Intelligence Committee was a good start.

But Adam Schiff should never see classified material again.

**That's why I introduced the PENCIL Resolution in Congress to express why Adam Schiff 's security clearance should be REVOKED so he can never get his hands on classified intelligence again.**

I also appeared on Sean Hannity's Fox News where I went toe-to-toe with Geraldo Rivera and made it clear why the House Ethics Committee MUST investigate Adam Schiff immediately.

**[Please watch my interview and sign your"Investigate Schiff" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r).** [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r) | | [ WATCH MY INTERVIEW HERE](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r)
---
**_Adam Schiff is a national security risk._**

Not only did Schiff weaponize lies from Hillary Clinton and a corrupt Department of Justice to smear President Trump as a Russian asset.

Not only did Schiff collaborate with the Deep State to stage a coup against President Trump over a phone call about Ukraine.

Not only did Adam Schiff illegally pressure Twitter to censor journalists exposing the scheme Schiff and the fake CIA whistleblower cooked up about President Trump and Ukraine.

**Adam Schiff used a Communist Chinese spy app to film a video kicking off his Senate campaign.**

If anyone is compromised, it's Adam Schiff.

It's time to ban Schiff from accessing classified intelligence.

And it's time to investigate Schiff and punish him to the fullest extent.

**[Please watch the interview and sign your"Investigate Schiff" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r).**

**And after you sign your petition,[please chip in](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r) and help me lead the fight to hold Adam Schiff accountable.**

| | [ INVESTIGATE SCHIFF - SIGN NOW >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61446515:sctJ4VDNe:m:1:2365227053:C6B6CE3EB077FDB787181406B538419F:r)
---

_Sincerely,_

Matt Gaetz (R-FL)

* * *
| **Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz**

Adam Schiff used a Communist Chinese spy app to film a video kicking off his Senate campaign. If anyone is compromised, it's Adam Schiff. It's time to ban Schiff from accessing classified intelligence. And it's time to investigate Schiff and punish him to the fullest extent. . And after you sign your petition, and help me lead the fight to hold Adam Schiff accountable. | | Sincerely, Matt Gaetz (R-FL) | Paid for by Friends of Matt Gaetz** This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 17, 2021. name: 4Patriots
subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity.
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zimirru7h2qefhvcr73srj78s2g6lcmd618q3bpo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5goe5c0s2he9b8f7kobpvcvrk5c5gmob82ljb9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2jiddg8b0sjtbu13u3ug0564a1vhflktcmnipq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znnop1ipdndnpfvvnhlofj43uf7qbtk4b8jdr3vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zss9i99megdeffh4jr44pnqbtjh1lrs1iqctfklo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpji0o0cu9knocb5ki9jf7nvctvnu2vo8g31s4ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zahgfd9ulq03dqcjfrgc9idf6g8b87vemuk8rdk0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zscv4rkqr7bin7cuaj3u9u25331naufvmr5btmjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z66jhbr31dc4atnncj6oa7et1berj3opummm65j0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chgeapj6chh2bs).

Friend,

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

Peter, **Some members of the media are proclaiming that the America First movement is DEAD. They want nothing more than for our movement to fail.** That hasn't stopped us at the America First Policy Institute from working around the clock to prove them wrong. **In fact, it's made us work even harder.** In 2022, we launched the first-ever _America First Agenda: Guide to the Issues_ policy book, the ultimate blueprint for American prosperity, security, freedom, and opportunity. Our team published more than 100 op-eds and policy papers, and we even brought the America First message right to YOU on our bus tour across America. And 2023 is going to be even bigger, Peter. **We need to know:[ will you be part of the movement?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273187:6QlCfHGNf:m:1:3331421248:83811AD81BC6E76D9603E4ADF9A1BDFA:r)**

| Hey Peter,
---
| It's Matt Gaetz - in case you haven't seen, we're hoping for a strong showing from the grassroots MAGA base to close out the first month of the year: a $35K fundraising total before the January deadline at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
I know that might sound like a lot, but here's why it's absolutely VITAL for our mission...
I was ALREADY one of the most targeted members in the Swamp, Peter. The Lincoln Project spent millions of dollars against me last cycle, the Fake News admitted to running propaganda against me, vicious lies were told about me to try to smear my name...
But here's the thing - all of these attacks are only going to RAMP UP now that I led the fight to DRAIN THE SWAMP during the Speaker vote!
I disrupted business-as-usual in Washington, and now the Establishment will be back with a vengeance trying to take me out. That's just how the Deep State operates.
And since I don't take a DIME from the lobbyists and PACs, I need YOU to help me stand strong against whatever they throw my way!
So with just a little over $5K left to raise in order to meet our goal this month, can I count on you to chip in [$5](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4F2Fnn8uPF42ulCXUHDVahwa15Pg8Z3Ba5v4YOm6fn91Dyj99Jt2NLNAFvG1PxtuhVwzcXOqN36UpelqRuzweGA8D78HL-THJDBjWf7xeviOYAhB_8MBJZgDc1G2qSOwaE2x9EPhf_BAPWN6Zj4mDkb9ZDl0jOWAluqm3bjLjwXfQnc7rsdOc4v2ibW_Slkmvuh6wU59JNaYzmSvGa1swLsDwaEBvYB9eqv4Ta-ykNK_M8eFy-QdJkyQ-c06yr6&c=MF03ymc3Hvn5osXfTsmwsBYaFed95EZhJJ7tfDJ-HM3tHeZa2TRnDQ==&ch=hC7jAv2qYZwkDarCWb64Zi-zIfSGdoQlcHGV1Q3fUuYcsANnVqGc0w==), [$10](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4F2Fnn8uPF42ulCXUHDVahwa15Pg8Z3Ba5v4YOm6fn91Dyj99Jt2NLNAFvG1PxtWzkQtnuhATwW99f8PK4ADF36gm4IaptkckVdB3kTqoDJntiY5OzIDXVJ24zh6lxjr7nOHAJBZSRX9wtScFsw_6bLDWteOn6VH_Op-F9QgKUNRKh7Y69X-0xxWLwoO99kn3mBFvS4oxICAp73kTJG_u_TJjiDZ7w0kKptOE7KpYdM27Fy61__GiouB468vhaA&c=MF03ymc3Hvn5osXfTsmwsBYaFed95EZhJJ7tfDJ-HM3tHeZa2TRnDQ==&ch=hC7jAv2qYZwkDarCWb64Zi-zIfSGdoQlcHGV1Q3fUuYcsANnVqGc0w==), or [whatever you can afford](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001A4F2Fnn8uPF42ulCXUHDVahwa15Pg8Z3Ba5v4YOm6fn91Dyj99Jt2NLNAFvG1PxtAlaf_yXLlbJtOdfEsxqJyp2TVgZ79ERGaNc2JLp34OBbu0HZ_HbmSLEyQYhDkzAJ82sERhhTNaZsxjbvIaOy9Qy6mtYS0kut0NYguG_bxPeLFH0DDdYpZ0SVucRvvEP9FBnmQt_VjuxplFSNFRPSgMtk45EvopLqzKe1Ku-JBA8=&c=MF03ymc3Hvn5osXfTsmwsBYaFed95EZhJJ7tfDJ-HM3tHeZa2TRnDQ==&ch=hC7jAv2qYZwkDarCWb64Zi-zIfSGdoQlcHGV1Q3fUuYcsANnVqGc0w==) to help me keep up the fight for America First in Congress?

subject: The Food Crisis of 2023
body:
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with fo
# The Food Crisis of 2023
We live in uncertain times. There are currently 38 million Americans, including 12 million children, who are struggling with food insecurity. As inflation and supply chain disruptions continue to push food costs higher and higher, families are feeling the weight of financial distress as they struggle to make ends meet. John Boyd Jr., a fourth-generation farmer, warns that food shortages are coming. "For so long, we've enjoyed lots of food in this country, so we've never ever faced a food shortage. The worst is yet to come." **Leading industry sources are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point".** As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore... Obviously, waiting on the government for a handout in a disaster just isn't an option. And we were completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z112gpd75c68hcebbnagde8p272s8njrbfs1mtgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs). Currently the 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.
* **You get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan with no interest!**

And that's not all, because... [**You also get $318 worth of FREE gifts!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za5u7506n6gsi25frq5n47gjglet6njmn6dp2k0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdj98s26s786p2qcqocmj32km1qiiks6qri7osa0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs) Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd33vh7538es886us1qu7mto71jp3eh8vfo415to_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs) You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7r1nob75jeskp5a7kkc6fpq18ckjb0ddcn1vb78_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zihkpv4ntvmg7ti4dca5k419hpt2q00jsj76a9ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. [**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn3fd6usmfjh1lgrk2njn08smgvnjdf4nmduhbgo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs) To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters **More Raving Reviews From Customers!** | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."
---|---
[**Get Your 4Patriots Survival Food Kits Rushed To You Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1uqkfbuu5cmptrqn9a7sug01q2fvkmjl6ops810_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs)

Real reviews from real customers. Sometimes customers receive a free product to test or as a thank you for submitting honest feedback. For more information see [Terms & Conditions](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zealjj2c3eaec2l06fo785dd7sb6avm73dkg4ju8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge1o36chh2bs).

name: Katherine Clark
subject: My message to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58075901/389957932/-1453841701?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230131_FR_CLARKSPLIT_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY5MDNlMy05MmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvA67QwXJAVOXKmALVKBRFHv_hRLnW1QbZcmAnX1BjU=) Hello Friends, It’s Katherine Clark and I recently was sworn in as the new Democratic Whip. I wanted to send you this email and share my thoughts as we make our way through this new session together. [**And if you want to help Democrats achieve our goals in 2023, then I hope you will send in a generous donation to support Susie Lee and my leadership organization Fair Shot PAC before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58075902/389957933/-1453841701?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230131_FR_CLARKSPLIT_A0_na_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZTY5MDNlMy05MmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DvA67QwXJAVOXKmALVKBRFHv_hRLnW1QbZcmAnX1BjU=) It certainly has been a chaotic start to the 118th Congress. In just the first week, I had to whip 15 rounds of votes for Speaker of the House - and I’m so proud that Democrats have remained united despite the Republican infighting. However, it’s clear the next year is going to come with many challenges. Democrats are being kicked off our committees and MAGA Republicans now have more power over Congress than they may have ever had before. **It’s up to us to stand up to their extremism and make sure things are still getting done for the American people.** For me, this is about protecting our democracy and making a real difference in people’s lives. I know this won’t be easy, but with your support, I believe we can live up to our greatest potential and there is nothing we cannot achieve if we put our minds to it. name: Shift WA
subject: GOP introduces the “Clyde Shavers bill.”
body:
Republican members of the State House introduced the so-called "Clyde Shavers bill" that would make lying about military service a misdemeanor for candidates or lawmakers. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446576:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends, Yesterday, Everett Herald political reporter and columnist Jerry Cornfield tweeted, giving Shift WA a little boost:

This week, 17 Republican members of the State House introduced the "Clyde Shavers bill" which would make lying about military service a misdemeanor for candidates or lawmakers. The penalty for lying would carry a $50,000 fine. The bill comes after the narrow election of Democrat Clyde Shavers after mainstream media outlets waited days into mail-in voting to acknowledge the story which Shift WA broke a week out from election day. Even after these outlets reported on the story, they buried it and then walked away, in what could only be assumed was their attempt to sway the election's outcome. Interestingly enough, Cornfield tagged Shift WA in his tweet about the Clyde Shavers bill. Mainstream media outlets may operate as an arm of the Democrat Party - but at least they recognize who broke the story on Shavers' egregious lies. ** ** **Here 's why that matters: today is the end of the month - and we're behind on our fundraising goal. ** ** ** **> >> [DONATE TODAY ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446577:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r)<<<** We here at Shift WA are doing the work that you cannot trust mainstream media outlets to do - hold Democrats, who control every branch of our state government, accountable to the people. **_[Will you help us keep going by donating $50 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446577:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r)_** **_[Your donation by MIDNIGHT today will help us keep the lights on so we can continue breaking stories (like Shavers' lies) that impact public policy.](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446577:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r)_** **_[Help us hold Democrats- and mainstream media - accountable. Donate today!](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446577:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r)_** Thank you, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61446578:WXcZ4VDNH:m:1:2610672541:349C24C2D9003C6FE317DF396CB5976E:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14126062&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). body:
The House Oversight Committee was just filled with the most extreme Republicans.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58076029/389958329/-849735382?refcode=EM_FR_230131Oversight_Committees_TB_30DO_5_NG_TESTA_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYmU5MjIyOC05M2ExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RxUbO3KCuDeWYtmRvGVNLD5-QFkkWF8IGklZBDRVwKs=) Peter,

When Shontel Brown and her Democratic colleagues ran the House Oversight Committee, they used their investigatory powers to probe into serious issues facing the American public.

Now that Kevin McCarthy sold out to MAGA extremists for the Speaker’s gavel, the Oversight Committee is filled with the most extreme Republicans who have actively promoted conspiracy theories and undermined our democracy.

subject: Conservative voters want this, too!

body:
I am proud to have been physician in the rural UP for over 30 years, but federally we have a lot of work to do to ensure everyone has access
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=Chv-yK7Yc9F4ESN_9UCAGM6FyJwbYWZZz6H9S_UTCpk.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby85MU9PN3I4aHA_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Rural healthcare in UP / N. Michigan should've been a major Congressional priority
---
| | I am proud to have been physician in the rural UP for over 30 years, but federally we have a lot of work to do to ensure everyone has access to care.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=BDikzxIbKjxdrfJDVWqD2tV9iuO6o88c10m5fy7a9sg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiOGJhODcwOWItMDRjNy00YTE3LWZmMTEtMTlhOTBlYzg4MzBjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | I've practiced medicine in rural areas for 30 years — Iron River, Crystal Falls, and KI Sawyer. Congress isn't doing enough to advocate for accessible healthcare for Michigan's most vulnerable patients.
---
| | | [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR RURAL CARE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=TjjDaWqOMdJxcbaCt_ia7Z7vUSh653d0arR0UYGolws.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiYTk0NDAyMjUtYWQzNS00YWRlLWI4ZjEtYjQyYzAyMjZiMjdhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

| | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:[Express Donate: $5](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=-gRr9ZGhUxBAn8ItqWODf0b0l7F8WvSM3gRam6iXHHs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTE_ZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI1JnJlZmNvZGU9ZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lXzI1IiwiciI6IjJmMmEwZmVjLTRjOTEtNDJmNC05NzhlLTY1N2RlZmQzMGY3NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)Express Donate: $10Express Donate: $25[Or, donate another amount](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=WTBN_l7LpBCTkqMyF38_7U9Cxsu9f0i6d0SdQpelj08.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTE_ZXhwcmVzc19sYW5lX290aGVyPXRydWUmcmVmY29kZT1leHByZXNzX2xhbmVfb3RoZXIiLCJyIjoiMmYyYTBmZWMtNGM5MS00MmY0LTk3OGUtNjU3ZGVmZDMwZjc2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | Good morning. Last November, voters in conservative, rural Dunn County, Wisconsin passed a referendum asking Congress to pursue a "publicly financed, non-profit, national health insurance program that would fully cover medical care costs for all Americans." Its passing in a red county proves that a growing majority of Americans — liberal and conservative — are tired of a broken, predatory health insurance system that reaps huge profits when we age and get sick.
* Imagine having a medical emergency when the closest ER is over 60 minutes away, the ambulance service is short-staffed, and response time is delayed.
* Imagine having a sick child, but there are no physicians or hospital beds within an hour's drive of your community.
* What if there [aren't enough nurses](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=1mZLveJwUo7OjXofKNVNsDuL3OrIfWojyqPfS37Di_c.) and other professionals to take care of you?

This is the reality facing too many citizens in the 1st District, counties like Dunn, and all across rural America. It's high time someone does something about it. We must address these problems by working with local, state, and federal resources to implement final solutions. We have very successful models, but they need to be a funding priority. Privatizing healthcare completely -- a goal of many misguided Republicans in office -- will be at the dire expense of rural care accessibility. Our Congressman voted against medical care expansion and nineteen Michigan rural hospitals [are at risk of closing](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=ck0f4vgIGMyapiv8QyZ7uGzull4Yklv8eaYoHDbjLXI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGhvc3BpdGFscy5jaHFwci5vcmcvU29sdXRpb25zLmh0bWwiLCJyIjoiYjg1NDIwMGMtNGJlNS00MjU0LWUwN2EtZWU3NDEwMzIwM2ExIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) because of financial losses and a lack of financial reserves. It could reduce the amount of rural care by over 30%.
Saving Rural Hospitals Millions of Americans live in rural communities that don't have essential healthcare services, such as hospitals, emergency rooms, or primary care clinics. They face long delays in getting care if they're in an accident or have symptoms of a heart attack, stroke, or an infectious disease such as COVID-19. Even if they have insurance to pay for health care services, [there is nowhere](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=kt_OfBeUb-2w3pd6wvGDs95JVU1nngkiM8WOadaxFZA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9ydXJhbGhvc3BpdGFscy5jaHFwci5vcmcvIiwiciI6ImI4NTQyMDBjLTRiZTUtNDI1NC1lMDdhLWVlNzQxMDMyMDNhMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) they can use it in their community. Nearly 90% of RN respondents consider leaving an already critically short-staffed nursing profession within one year if staffing issues, poor environments, and patient flow challenges go unaddressed.
These are the issues I will work on. I am passionate about this, education, childcare, affordable housing, livable wages, infrastructure, and the future solvency of social security and Medicare. Let's work together to problem solve and unelect politicians who make problems worse. Thank you for considering a contribution to the Rural Fund so we can advocate for Democratic principles across Michigan's 1st District. -Dr. Bob Lorinserinfo@votedrbob.comVoteDrBob.com
---
| | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=GMQ1-qpYpPaf6z-TTIA9VAJmNclQN7ECoCt5c27X0S0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiMmViNGQ0NDQtOGYwZi00YWJmLTg3NGItMDM1ZmRmNjk1ZGQ4IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/91OO7r8hp/c?w=iNWMVFnFNvDs2P8FtCsuHRKV28TUPff17OtUiRalnn4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2ZyaWVuZHMtb2YtZHItYm9iLTEiLCJyIjoiNWZmZjQwN2EtMjBiYy00NDlmLWRjZGItNjIxY2M3NTVhZmZjIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvmkoj74m2olt80p6o3hlme5ren4ho0s4m4j7tno_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs)
|
---

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zc2d6j6488jgsmf5sb8hjbho1041l120oltuna3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z9i7inqp9ovp8r0qabrf32hit09u1k90vmk69ut8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can’t help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who’ve been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang...while hoping that the guards wouldn’t show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they’re being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn’t even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he’s been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven’t held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That’s why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zlhfv30qh865f5aqfm8fftarcqggf9j1c2jbk7o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqn2ggu52kh2enft1rb7g1ct9fa9nc6cppvp3310_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can’t fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcrbdqgaj2ee7tafb55p6mbgofg8f3emamcs0k88_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chge9pr3cth2bs)
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2ze0culbs88497nk6vmhe9vfnb2i5r2me8ao8oqs0).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. name: Charles Booker
subject: FWD: National support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

Before we close out the month of January, I’m hoping you’ll help us reach
a $10,000 goal and help take a big step towards fully retiring our
campaign debt.

I hate to have to ask -- but we left it all on the field at the end of the
campaign, and ended up with some bills left to payI want to make sure
those campaign expenses get paid and I want to step into our next fight
together. First, I need your help.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18876?t=1001&akid=2937%2E346206%2Eguiu5c ]If you’re in a position to do so, please click here to rush a
contribution before midnight.

Thank you!

Charles

--- Forwarded message ---

Peter, as you know, my race was not a conventional one. The
campaign we built together was focused on reaching new voters, expanding
the electorate, inspiring people who weren’t political to invest in the
democratic process.

The issues we talked about resonated with so many people across Kentucky.
Those are issues we continue to fight for and I believe that soon we will
win.

But despite the historic progress we made and the hundreds of thousands of
donations we received, national support never came.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18876?t=1002&akid=2937%2E346206%2Eguiu5c ]That is in part why I need to ask again if you will make a contribution
so that we can close out our campaign and focus on the next chapter of our
fight together. Please, if you’re in a position to do so, click here to
make a contribution.

I’ve been asking for your help for a few weeks now and we’ve made a lot of
progress. We’ve chipped away at our debt, but we still have some ways to
go.

Thank you for anything you can contribute. I appreciate you and I’m
excited to move on to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230131-2937-footer&t=1003&refcode2=2937_346206_guiu5c&akid=2937%2E346206%2Eguiu5c

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2937%2E346206%2Eguiu5c

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: As for Ilhan Omar...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Let me be blunt: national security is precisely why I removed these three from their respective committees. I’ve said it many

| |
---
| | | Friend, Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from the Intelligence Committee, is a "threat to national security".

**Let me be blunt:** national security is precisely __why__ I removed these three from their respective committees. I've said it many times before, and I'll say it again:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

I am returning the Intelligence Committee to one of genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to drain the swamp of these bad actors, I need you to stand with me now:**

name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Press Release McGuire Anti-Discrimination/ Anti BDS Bill to be Voted On
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 31st, 2023

McGuire Anti-Discrimination Bill to be Voted On RICHMOND, VA - Delegate John McGuire introduced HB 1898 to prevent contractors who engage in business with the Virginia government and Virginia public universities from boycotting Israel. The bill also establishes penalties if these guidelines are not followed including fines and a ban from further business with Virginia.

The global Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions (BDS) movement is an Antisemitic and discriminatory effort designed to destroy Israel as a Jewish state through economic means.
While Virginia passed a non-binding anti-BDS resolution in March 2016, it has not passed a statutory anti-BDS law that prevents businesses who contract with public bodies from boycotting Israel.
Similar Bills passed in over 30 states. The House General Laws Subcommittee #4, will vote on this bill today, January 31st, 2023.
"The country of Israel is one of our strongest allies. BDS singles out Israel while ignoring human rights abuses in other parts of the world. Unfortunately, Antisemitism is on the rise, and we have news of people spreading hate in Charlottesville as recently as this last weekend. The 180,000 Jewish people in Virginia should not be subject to discrimination based on their religion. It's easy to understand, if you were to replace the words "Jewish People" with "Black People" or "Hispanic People", etc. - then everyone would see they would be opposed to this kid of hate and boycott. Reach out to your delegates and urge them to pass this bill" said Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10.
You can find the legislation online and read the resolution text [HERE.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Jcu9nK2JrjjJKSHqk2JmDTqbvwNf4pch8Q3TgSbmGc9JjGPLtiXo-UdIE5A-F7KM3K9AMlvTa1_qXwTupikqeOs71Fy_5h-HMAMn9v8bdcKKxnNxXTa6-d9gfv6_C-khpK6LS54tBtGRhcvba3-eq2ru3Qpm-Tx2rz1k50XSC2KHbtPvx9XBHVQm-srabBR-QVzDMbLfvdc=&c=SIrbEpTSon7a9ID2SAHAicBay5ploG8GmjUzuaa7zvywmshOqhHLug==&ch=32Pkbtf0PQPHI1t2It0KKPPFCAJ5Z1UP7UU0jhdOaEShQCKgUk-b-g==) ###

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE January 31st, 2023 McGuire Anti-Discrimination Bill to be Voted On RICHMOND, VA - Delegate John McGuire introduced HB 1898 to prevent contractors who engage in business with the Virginia government and Virginia public universities from boycotting Israel. The bill also establishes penalties if these guidelines are not followed including fines and a ban from further business with Virginia. The global Boycott, Divestment, and Sanctions (BDS) movement is an Antisemitic and discriminatory effort designed to destroy Israel as a Jewish state through economic means. While Virginia passed a non-binding anti-BDS resolution in March 2016, it has not passed a statutory anti-BDS law that prevents businesses who contract with public bodies from boycotting Israel. Similar Bills passed in over 30 states. The House General Laws Subcommittee #4, will vote on this bill today, January 31st, 2023. "The country of Israel is one of our strongest allies. BDS singles out Israel while ignoring human rights abuses in other parts of the world. Unfortunately, Antisemitism is on the rise, and we have news of people spreading hate in Charlottesville as recently as this last weekend. The 180,000 Jewish people in Virginia should not be subject to discrimination based on their religion. It's easy to understand, if you were to replace the words "Jewish People" with "Black People" or "Hispanic People", etc. - then everyone would see they would be opposed to this kid of hate and boycott. Reach out to your delegates and urge them to pass this bill" said Delegate John McGuire, Candidate for Virginia Senate District 10. You can find the legislation online and read the resolution text == ### | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior We support Israel Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life Pro-Gun America 1st Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 NFIB 100 == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | Reminder: I cannot accept campaign donations until February 25 due to session. | == | == == == | | McGuire for Delegate | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: American Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657349%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6wivzOa2oJ9EcTlIuT%2baTg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657340%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fGKS8rLmrydUf%2b4OJ6g1vA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c657341%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=54uF1rMkmT8iFSJKAZYn7A&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: As for Ilhan Omar...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from

| |
---
| | | Friend, Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from the Intelligence Committee, is a "threat to national security".

**Let me be blunt:** national security is precisely __why__ I removed these three from their respective committees. I've said it many times before, and I'll say it again:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly anti-semitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

I am returning the Intelligence Committee to one of genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to drain the swamp of these bad actors, I need you to stand with me now:**

body:
this gives us two options
|

[**_Help the NDRC continue fighting for fair maps! Rush an end-of-month donation before midnight tonight >>>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58055817/389887320/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230131_FR_1O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiYjYwYjhjLTZmYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TWN7VgxyKSdNcnnNJD14vqRoYCavbjz81IYvOcb8ekE=)
**_It’s true – the fight for fair redistricting isn’t over!_**

That’s because voters across the country are challenging gerrymandered maps in their states. If they’re successful, these states could be required to implement new, fair maps before the 2024 election.

**Now, we have two options, team:**
**OPTION ONE: We can do nothing.**

We can cross our fingers, and we can hope that new maps in key battleground states are fairly drawn and that map-manipulating politicians aren’t allowed to gerrymander their way into unearned power.

**OPTION TWO: We can keep fighting for fair maps!**

Ahead of the 2022 elections, the NDRC’s efforts to mobilize communities, support plaintiffs in lawsuits, hold map-manipulating politicians accountable, and more helped secure what _The New York Times_ called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.”

**If we continue implementing this proven strategy, we can help ensure the maps are _even fairer_ in 2024!

[_With control of the House on a knife’s edge, securing new maps in a few key states could be instrumental to helping Democrats win back the Majority. Will you pitch in before midnight tonight to help support the NDRC’s work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58055820/389887323/1068403165?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230131_FR_1O_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZiYjYwYjhjLTZmYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TWN7VgxyKSdNcnnNJD14vqRoYCavbjz81IYvOcb8ekE=)**

clean_body: this gives us two options | | = = It’s true – the fight for fair redistricting isn’t over! That’s because voters across the country are challenging gerrymandered maps in their states. If they’re successful, these states could be required to implement new, fair maps before the 2024 election. Now, we have two options, team: OPTION ONE: We can do nothing. We can cross our fingers, and we can hope that new maps in key battleground states are fairly drawn and that map-manipulating politicians aren’t allowed to gerrymander their way into unearned power. OPTION TWO: We can keep fighting for fair maps! Ahead of the 2022 elections, the NDRC’s efforts to mobilize communities, support plaintiffs in lawsuits, hold map-manipulating politicians accountable, and more helped secure what The New York Times called “the fairest House map of the last 40 years.” If we continue implementing this proven strategy, we can help ensure the maps are even fairer in 2024! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Attorney General Eric Holder said, “It’s up to us to defend our own democracy.” That’s why, here at the NDRC, we’re taking Option Two. So we've got a lot of work to do. But friend, I believe we can make America more fair and more free -- not just for this generation, but for the next one, too.
Progress doesn’t always happen in a straight line, but it does happen. I still believe we have more in common than our politics suggest, and that if we keep standing up, speaking out, and pushing for change, we can strengthen our democracy and build a better future for all of us.
Thank you for helping us continue to make progress.
\-- Barack Obama

We’re asking you to activate your membership today because state Democrats are facing FIVE important special elections over the next two months in battleground states New Hampshire and Pennsylvania – and the Virginia House and Senate are in play this November!
**President Biden and President Obama know that electing Democratic leaders in statehouses across the country is _critical_ to building a better future in your community.** **That’s why we rely on grassroots supporters like you to own a piece of this fight and give state Democrats the resources they need to go toe-to-toe against their Republican opponents.**
As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight to defeat extremist state Republicans, expand Democratic power at the state level, and help ensure we elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future in your community. name: Secretary Mike Pompeo
subject: I have exciting news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Would you like a SIGNED copy of my new book?

|
---
| | | |
---

Friend,

I’m excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump’s CIA Director and Secretary of State.

_**Never Give An Inch**_ contains dozens of untold stories you don’t want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea’s Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more!

**[I’m granting you SPECIAL ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general public. Will you claim your book before they run out?](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94862%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F7yV1D19u%2bQzNzKOmyCJEA&sysid=1 "I’m granting you SPECIAL
ACCESS to your very own SIGNED copy before the book’s release to the general
public. Will you claim your book before they run out?")**

**[My new book _Never Give An Inch_ will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94875%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Gxh6j31j7vr%2fPGJC4A5BpA&sysid=1 "My new book Never Give An

Please hurry to order today.

Unapologetically American,

Mike Pompeo
