name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1d42jfofkmrgiv35dv4p602k5ocbobtmi81l71o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie4pr4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjr11ikghin67jgkbgolm1ip967l31poooijjrb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie4pr4c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4duchuhs3etqua0l1pffoep064m0hf8fvq8caio_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie4pr4c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

# **Friend — my first End of Month fundraising deadline of 2023 is at midnight. **

---
[**The finance team has told me we need to add 86 donors between now and then. Are you able to help? Chip in $23, or even just $2, right now if you can — >**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a932fa8925949c62/5896f9d5bbe9020bc3d6b838967d376c/37973) In the U.S. Senate, I’m fighting for YOU, not the Swamp. I’m calling out Biden’s fake COVID state of emergency. I’m fighting for term limits for Congress. And I’m working to secure our border and stop the invasion of fentanyl into our communities. To achieve our goals — and to take back the Senate in 2024 — conservatives must stand together NOW. Too much is at stake to stay out of the fight. [**I hope I can count on you. Chip in whatever you can before midnight.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/a932fa8925949c62/80eadf35141ab569c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: You won’t hear this from anyone else emailing you today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Please let me explain.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I know this email is long, but I promise what you read here won’t be like anything else you hear from any other campaign emailing you today. **So before I ask you to[chip in toward our first big end-of-month goal of raising 15,000 individual grassroots donations,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) will you please give me a moment to explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)**
How a candidate funds their campaign does more than just influence how they pay for staff, ads, and organizing. It has a direct impact on both our message and who we actually serve in office. **Any politician or pundit who tells you differently is lying — and I have the receipts.**
Despite virtually every member of Congress having campaigned on making life-saving drugs more accessible, politicians who take millions of dollars from Big Pharma are still telling us we have to accept a world where people die because they have to ration their medicine.
Then we have out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley, who have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country.
They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own them — and they’ll even raise their fists to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more liars or frauds like Josh Hawley in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why I'm asking you to add a donation of whatever you can toward our people-powered campaign before our end-of-month deadline at 11:59PM tonight. Can I count on you to help us take this seat back for working people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)
---
Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I want you to be part of it:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us defeat Josh Hawley and give Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back to everyday people, please add a donation of whatever you can to our grassroots campaign before our first big end-of-month deadline at 11:59PM tonight.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=8&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=9&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=10&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=11&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=12&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27599?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=13&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27598?refcode=em20230131-2800&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=14&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)
---
Thanks for everything, Peter.
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230131-2800-footer&t=15&refcode2=2800_614464_LuaQqW&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=16&akid=2800%2E614464%2ELuaQqW). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: A month of highs and lows
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tonight, we close the books on our January fundraising drive, and we need your help to reach our goals.
#

Friends -
Tonight, we close the books on our January fundraising drive, and we need your help to reach our goals. This end of month drive is particularly important because it’s our first monthly fundraising deadline of the year—our first opportunity to set ourselves up for success this year.
I’d really appreciate it if you could make your first online contribution to Giffords PAC today. You can use the link below to add your donation:
[**https://go.giffords.org/go/Jan-Deadline**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=1&akid=4189%2E3935704%2E8wpszW)
It’s been a month of both many highs and lows. At the beginning of January, we commemorated the tenth anniversary of our organization’s founding. We celebrated the milestones we’ve made in the fight to end gun violence, including the first bipartisan gun safety legislation passed at the federal level in nearly 30 years.
But we’ve also witnessed heartbreaking tragedy with multiple mass shooting events across the country in the past weeks. It serves as a terrible reminder that while we’ve come so far, there’s still so much more we must do to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
We know solutions that save lives, but it is going to take a lot of work to cut through the gun lobby’s lies and to overcome years of weak gun laws and inaction.
That work starts with you, and there’s no time for us to slow down. Reaching our first monthly fundraising goal of 2023 is extremely important to help us fuel our priorities for the year ahead.
[**So please, will you contribute $3 to Giffords PAC before midnight to help us reach our January fundraising goals?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=2&akid=4189%2E3935704%2E8wpszW)

---

---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jan23.5RCsE0&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=23&akid=4189%2E3935704%2E8wpszW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jan23.CbkSJK&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=24&akid=4189%2E3935704%2E8wpszW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jan23.bUZFep&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=25&akid=4189%2E3935704%2E8wpszW)**

Thank you so much for your support.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

We know solutions that save lives, but it is going to take a lot of work to cut through the gun lobby’s lies and to overcome years of weak gun laws and inaction. That work starts with you, and there’s no time for us to slow down. Reaching our first monthly fundraising goal of 2023 is extremely important to help us fuel our priorities for the year ahead. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you so much for your support. With courage, Gabby Giffords ** Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

body:
Buckle up for the bumpy ride ahead
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58059536/389901951/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=b2d7ae21-75a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=TFjxEz2znU8qReFj+NnwH0EJ+LQYHb9beQLy8QFOmK50Od3HDEdKBYffx1rKA/Ft&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ3YWUyMS03NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFKla87OsIDwdvAWZgFYJ3Wl3NTmFfUmdvY2vrRtGhY=)

Friend,
It’s been a while since I was in touch to thank you for your help in my Senate re-election victory and other election victories in Maryland and around the country. Everyone worked hard and earned a brief break. We can be proud that Democrats outperformed the pundit predictions, protected our Senate majority, and held the Republicans to a tiny margin in the House of Representatives.
And we didn’t stop after that. In December the Georgia runoff secured the 51st seat for Senate Democrats. And we passed the Electoral Count Reform Act, saw the Respect for Marriage Act signed into law, and enacted an important federal budget plan for the remainder of this fiscal year. Not bad for a ‘lame duck’ session!
But there’s just no way to sugarcoat the fact that the next two years of divided government in the Congress are going to be very tough. We have already seen enough drama and chaos in the Republican-controlled House to make it clear that we have our work cut out for us. And the fact that the 2024 Presidential election cycle is about to begin makes the stakes even higher.
So, I hope you are prepared to Buckle Up and get ready for the work ahead!
[**As we move forward it’s important to me to know what your priorities are. It would mean a lot if you could take a moment to fill out the brief survey linked below and let me know what issues are most important to you and what’s on your mind.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58059537/389901952/236558710?refcode=em013022&refcode2=b2d7ae21-75a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=TFjxEz2znU8qReFj+NnwH0EJ+LQYHb9beQLy8QFOmK50Od3HDEdKBYffx1rKA/Ft&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ3YWUyMS03NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFKla87OsIDwdvAWZgFYJ3Wl3NTmFfUmdvY2vrRtGhY=&emci=9ddaae15-c4a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b2d7ae21-75a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58059538/389901953/236558710?refcode=em013022&refcode2=b2d7ae21-75a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&contactdata=TFjxEz2znU8qReFj+NnwH0EJ+LQYHb9beQLy8QFOmK50Od3HDEdKBYffx1rKA/Ft&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQ3YWUyMS03NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFKla87OsIDwdvAWZgFYJ3Wl3NTmFfUmdvY2vrRtGhY=&emci=9ddaae15-c4a0-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=b2d7ae21-75a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=2216363)**

Hello friends,

It’s Katherine Clark and I recently was sworn in as the new Democratic Whip. I wanted to send you this email and share my thoughts as we make our way through this new session together.

**[And if you want to help Democrats achieve our goals in 2023, then I hope you will send in a generous donation to support Sharice Davids and my leadership organization Fair Shot PAC before our end-of-month fundraising deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58059546/389902047/380083826?amount=20&contactdata=6ZNMbWDfMrt9A8gBv54tJfHAdGbRqgu8EA0hjcVc8DPRtU8WsLnZ79EnJzdSbqxFLLs7G+mo72/8z1COOgXBIckB4f1AE10KNakB473LSP4Fa3iqUSP+B3zZVNNcnO2WMU/zcIk1yS41kYCzvxttDg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230131_FR_1.1_0_1MO_clark_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q2NjYzNy03NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ZDK7f2KOXL2qcXsOtkePN5JfxqY05uluYT5MLLIQY0=)**

It certainly has been a chaotic start to the 118th Congress. In just the first week, I had to whip 15 rounds of votes for Speaker of the House — and I’m so proud that Democrats have remained united despite the Republican infighting.

However, it’s clear the next year is going to come with many challenges. Democrats are being kicked off our committees and MAGA Republicans now have more power over Congress than they may have ever had before.

**It’s up to us to stand up to their extremism and make sure things are still getting done for the American people.**

For me, this is about protecting our democracy and making a real difference in people’s lives.

I know this won’t be easy, but with your support, I believe we can live up to our greatest potential and there is nothing we cannot achieve if we put our minds to it.

**[That’s why I’m asking you to please join me by making a generous donation to support Sharice and Fair Shot PAC today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58059549/389902048/380083826?amount=20&contactdata=6ZNMbWDfMrt9A8gBv54tJfHAdGbRqgu8EA0hjcVc8DPRtU8WsLnZ79EnJzdSbqxFLLs7G+mo72/8z1COOgXBIckB4f1AE10KNakB473LSP4Fa3iqUSP+B3zZVNNcnO2WMU/zcIk1yS41kYCzvxttDg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230131_FR_1.1_0_1MO_clark_NA_NA_eom&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2Q2NjYzNy03NWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0ZDK7f2KOXL2qcXsOtkePN5JfxqY05uluYT5MLLIQY0=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Sharice Davids and Fair Shot PAC and will process immediately.

clean_body: | = Hello friends, It’s Katherine Clark and I recently was sworn in as the new Democratic Whip. I wanted to send you this email and share my thoughts as we make our way through this new session together. = It certainly has been a chaotic start to the 118th Congress. In just the first week, I had to whip 15 rounds of votes for Speaker of the House — and I’m so proud that Democrats have remained united despite the Republican infighting. However, it’s clear the next year is going to come with many challenges. Democrats are being kicked off our committees and MAGA Republicans now have more power over Congress than they may have ever had before. It’s up to us to stand up to their extremism and make sure things are still getting done for the American people. For me, this is about protecting our democracy and making a real difference in people’s lives. I know this won’t be easy, but with your support, I believe we can live up to our greatest potential and there is nothing we cannot achieve if we put our minds to it. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Sharice Davids and Fair Shot PAC and will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = With you on our side, I know our best days are still ahead! — Katherine Clark * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. subject: The GOP is trying to tax us 30% on everything we buy! Tell them NO WAY! >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Say no to a national 30% sales tax! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4476f43b-4a20-4668-8731-20af1a9c774c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | The GOP has reached an all-new low with a radical plan to remake the tax code by abolishing the IRS and replacing every federal tax with a national 30 percent sales tax! This scheme dramatically shifts the tax burden from the wealthy to the middle and working class, and significantly raises prices on nearly everything we buy – from groceries to cars, homes, and healthcare. The GOP’s plan is a major step backward and just one more way Republicans can help their rich donors and friends avoid paying their fair share. It's out of touch, it’s outrageous, and Congress cannot support it. [Sign the petition: Say no to a national 30% sales tax! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6af7ea3f-b78d-4bdf-a165-0c195f965d17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Peter, I grew up in public housing with 11 brothers and sisters.
I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college and eventually earned a Ph.D.
And I was called to Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor.
But I know that the opportunities that made my journey possible are growing further and further out of reach for far too many across this country.
That’s why I’ve dedicated my time in Congress to fighting for our families.
And I know firsthand that Hakeem is an invaluable ally for hard-working Americans.
Now, we have a chance to keep fighting for every child to achieve their American dream, but we can’t do it without support from grassroots folks like you.
That’s why I have to ask:
[_**Please, Peter, will you chip in $15 – or whatever you can spare – so Hakeem can hit his goal and reclaim our Democratic House majority? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58086478/389975339/1662333042?refcode=20230131_em_fr_b2_warnock_30_cl_v1&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2QzMzBkOC1hMWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kwenpycqJB0tEjS73lm4lW-QE7iCy-3vh9a-N1UEAKY=)
Thank you so much for all you do, Peter.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58086492/389975409/1662333042?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2QzMzBkOC1hMWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kwenpycqJB0tEjS73lm4lW-QE7iCy-3vh9a-N1UEAKY=)** We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. **[We don’t want to lose you completely, so if you only want to receive our most important emails, please click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58086496/389975412/-175097923?source=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2QzMzBkOC1hMWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kwenpycqJB0tEjS73lm4lW-QE7iCy-3vh9a-N1UEAKY=&emci=332b1866-92a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=a3d330d8-a1a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=21290350)** **[We hate to see you go, but if you want to unsubscribe, we understand. clean_body: I know that the opportunities that made my journey possible are growing further and further out of reach for far too many across this country. | | | = Hakeem Jeffries asked. And now I’m asking. = = Peter, here’s what I need you to know: – Democrats only need to flip five seats to take back the House – Republicans are raising millions to keep us from succeeding – That’s why hitting this first fundraising goal is so important = | = = | = = | = = Peter, I grew up in public housing with 11 brothers and sisters. I became the first in our family to graduate from a four-year college and eventually earned a Ph.D. And I was called to Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s pulpit to serve as the senior pastor. But I know that the opportunities that made my journey possible are growing further and further out of reach for far too many across this country. That’s why I’ve dedicated my time in Congress to fighting for our families. And I know firsthand that Hakeem is an invaluable ally for hard-working Americans. Now, we have a chance to keep fighting for every child to achieve their American dream, but we can’t do it without support from grassroots folks like you. That’s why I have to ask: = Thank you so much for all you do, Peter. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the Majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. clean_body: | | | Peter, I’ll make this quick: these are the final moments in our mission. Our end-of-month deadline is just hours away, and we’re STILL not at our goal. Peter, I can’t believe we’re cutting it this close - but I’m not going to give up yet. Some of the greatest military victories ever recorded happened in the last seconds of the battle. It’s not over until it’s over, and we still have time to win. In Service, Col. Mike Waltz Special Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) \-------Forwarded Message------- From: Col. Mike Waltz Date: January 27, 2023 Subject: This is a DISASTER Peter, I was just looking over our fundraising numbers, and I saw something I had to share with you. Right now, we’re just four days out from our FIRST end-of-month deadline of 2023, and we still have to raise $5000 to meet our goal. It seems like too high a mountain scale, Peter - but I know we can do it. From U.S. Army Special Forces training to taking on terrorists abroad, I’m used to accomplishing the impossible. Now, it’s time to do it again. I’ve never been afraid of a fight, Peter, from the battlefields of Afghanistan to the halls of Congress. But just like any tough mission, there’s no way we can succeed without every team member pulling their weight. I’m doing everything I can to help us meet this goal, Peter, but without you, there’s no way we can do it. | | In Service, Col. Mike WaltzSpecial Forces Green Beret U.S. Congressman (R-FL) | | Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress | | Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. body:
| | | | Friend
Things are crazy here in Washington, so I'll keep this short. My finance director Jessica sent you the email below explaining why hitting our goal will help me in the fight to put AMERICA FIRST. Now that we are just hours away from closing out the first deadline of 2023, will you consider donating just $5 to help reach $349 (what's left of our goal) by midnight?
After starting the year strong with several Republican victories, my colleagues and I are doing all we can to carry the momentum into February. January was just the start, but if we want to keep the wins coming, we have to ensure we have the support we need next month!
Help support the fight for solutions! Pitch in today: [https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/first-eom-goal-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hdUazZFg7tdK-4QbNbfN--OE22xFROmBN96kcbxOgfq6CpcqK3ZyNnKA4CvXdoPMLqPNvb0E1BMpU3clGDWlA_Gu5rZhZvquAad0crhSL0MV3U8U15i9gTiRz1vWTZwqarVJywcvPOOAQ-lH_W73Xx5E2goRiifFk99uXR1cZYWlWvyyeGT9fkQiMATI68xRMGtnii-EtufCgulOawYdQQ==&c=ZulAPD0vcgXrxulQL00C_qgHMCfFf-M7wFLcmcbp3THzzL0YuP2-HQ==&ch=qu6ksDegoKH4ENzg8Sm3eL6aYOl2_0gAIUSWeAPW-z8YNZ6tPpmlSg==)
Friend the Left is doing everything they can to throw a wrench in the works, and ensuring that we have the ability to spread the word and fight back is our top priority!
That's why it's crucial we hit our first End of Month goal of 2023 and head into February with the resources we need to win!
[https://secure.winred.com/katcammack/first-eom-goal-today](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hdUazZFg7tdK-4QbNbfN--OE22xFROmBN96kcbxOgfq6CpcqK3ZyNnKA4CvXdoPMLqPNvb0E1BMpU3clGDWlA_Gu5rZhZvquAad0crhSL0MV3U8U15i9gTiRz1vWTZwqarVJywcvPOOAQ-lH_W73Xx5E2goRiifFk99uXR1cZYWlWvyyeGT9fkQiMATI68xRMGtnii-EtufCgulOawYdQQ==&c=ZulAPD0vcgXrxulQL00C_qgHMCfFf-M7wFLcmcbp3THzzL0YuP2-HQ==&ch=qu6ksDegoKH4ENzg8Sm3eL6aYOl2_0gAIUSWeAPW-z8YNZ6tPpmlSg==)

Kat Cammack

clean_body: | | | | Friend Things are crazy here in Washington, so I'll keep this short. My finance director Jessica sent you the email below explaining why hitting our goal will help me in the fight to put AMERICA FIRST. Now that we are just hours away from closing out the first deadline of 2023, will you consider donating just $5 to help reach $349 (what's left of our goal) by midnight? After starting the year strong with several Republican victories, my colleagues and I are doing all we can to carry the momentum into February. January was just the start, but if we want to keep the wins coming, we have to ensure we have the support we need next month! Help support the fight for solutions! Pitch in today: == Friend the Left is doing everything they can to throw a wrench in the works, and ensuring that we have the ability to spread the word and fight back is our top priority! That's why it's crucial we hit our first End of Month goal of 2023 and head into February with the resources we need to win! == Thanks for your urgent support, Kat Cammack -Sent from my iPhone \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Jessica Norfleet, Finance Director <mailto:info@katforcongress.com> Date: Mon, Jan 30, 2023 Subject: Help us crush our first 2023 deadline! To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> == Friend Kat has been busy helping craft the Republican agenda, and the support of patriots like you allows us to spread the word about her efforts. We can't keep up the fight without more Americans on board, and with just a day left before Kat's first End of Month Deadline tomorrow, we need you to pitch in! After winning so many fights in January, we need to raise $3,100 by midnight tomorrow to keep up the momentum as we head into February! Republicans passed record legislation last month defending the unborn, defunding the IRS, and protecting our nation, but the truth of the matter is that == | | == | == If we want to get America back on track, we must take our fight to the next level. January may have been a massive win for Republicans, but if we continue to hit our goals, we can make February the month where we end even more Biden-made crises! We're dedicated to bringing Florida solutions, but while Biden and the Left continue to pass an America Last agenda, Kat needs your support. Friend == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | Thank you for your support, Jessica Norfleet Finance Director | | == | == == == | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | == Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 2023 Priorities Survey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](;
https://secure.winred.com/nrsc/tst-smc-lg-survey-23-email/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=tst_nrsc_SMC&utm_campaign=20230131_na_grahamsenatesurveycs-v1_SMC_nrsc_nrsc&utm_content=fundraising&amount=100&utm_term=prod2)< **2023 Senate Survey**
Peter,

I know we haven't touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear, Peter -- we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I'm reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273318:6k0cfHGXN:m:1:3331421248:6277201573BCD39D8164CCB4D436F876:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273318:6k0cfHGXN:m:1:3331421248:6277201573BCD39D8164CCB4D436F876:r)
[**Open Your Survey >> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273318:6k0cfHGXN:m:1:3331421248:6277201573BCD39D8164CCB4D436F876:r)

Peter, it doesn't take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats' liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people.

I've seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you.

[**Please, let me know what policies you think the Senate should be focusing on and I 'll make sure we get to work.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273318:6k0cfHGXN:m:1:3331421248:6277201573BCD39D8164CCB4D436F876:r)

Thanks,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273318:6k0cfHGXN:m:1:3331421248:6277201573BCD39D8164CCB4D436F876:r)
Lindsey Graham

name: President Joseph R. Biden, Jr.
subject: Great news, Derek.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats with a donation ahead of this first deadline of 2023, I’ve got it: The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people. | |
---
If you’re looking for a reason to support Democrats ahead of the DNC’s first deadline of the year, I’ve got it: _The Biden-Harris agenda is working for working people._ More economic growth. Historic job creation. Better health care for millions. This is what happens when we build a strong DNC that lays the foundation for electing Democrats across the nation -- and when we do just that. When Democrats win, they deliver. It’s as simple as that. But our party needs YOU to renew your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline to keep up our party’s progress. **Together, we’ve accomplished big things, Derek. I’d love for you to be part of our work in 2023, too. Chip in $10 ahead of the DNC’s midnight fundraising deadline and the DNC will send you a personalized 2023 membership card.**

But we need to finish the job.** **[Will you take a second to chip in $10 to the DNC before their midnight deadline to elect more Democrats nationwide? When you do, they’ll put a 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail for you.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdgPj8OiJFCGEyHJYkjlP_cqAYdX9_SjkeM1NG4GyT13Jgp8FRBAcg9LdK05boEBCKYIo7IZ_bxJr9ZIn0E7sa466SFPZBLOThiHguauNIpsR76dElS1SSFcT6Gdz-s6xbX3H9FgTMuWMPGTXq1gpBN5Z88yTb-BHJoLgYJymmouU0BnMQCfOlEA0-9Allex3AbOMPNbkjqV15ee7QoC9U_HLfFp43Ww0ZW7t50YNbwl3bkudqlByMhYjp0xPCmvZXAk1DRcW8qCJnl6Lsa_nNp-SKvKP3q0cQiJPk3-4RLx_7eg6j2ZTjNVdPkAjgQxcihpSWScC_goJiMm86R3IuXLB3KKZkP7DVj0_NOvquHLxgQnTE5anOZOjBL9T9QJ0iBxGlrmrblqnFT_ESkmhKJC9pjG3CDXFNBMgsXpqO6j-qH4xqkiln0OgwYuknaMo2fXJbugJOne_QvfQlSjCbfD6wYaiKZDwHB4sZTk_t_Bwn7OhHf-4-NWYVzBhgjdjbi-FK2o8AZiUjZP8yg3UPzZkrRQ_id4MTeIBmThl-IaU6fd1_Ch_vvDpJt0uUn0un3hgJBwMsFkAgtfnhnKhCAXcBxRX6YCxMTMsUrxWcNg/3tb/3hwUshfKSkKftzXqj6N_Jg/h6/_lrJlRIHd6KqJOy9I1n9MyAf_PnLgtTCYbmTx0wWTbI)** I’m really grateful to know I can count on you, Derek.

More economic growth. Historic job creation. Better health care for millions. This is what happens when we build a strong DNC that lays the foundation for electing Democrats across the nation -- and when we do just that. When Democrats win, they deliver. It’s as simple as that. But our party needs YOU to renew your support before tonight’s fundraising deadline to keep up our party’s progress. Together, we’ve accomplished big things, Derek. I’d love for you to be part of our work in 2023, too. Chip in $10 ahead of the DNC’s midnight fundraising deadline and the DNC will send you a personalized 2023 membership card. The road ahead isn’t going to be easy, and I need to know you’re as committed to the fight for a better America as I am -- and as hundreds of thousands of your neighbors are as well. Grassroots donations from folks like you had a direct impact on our party’s ability to win big, elect more Democrats, and build an economy that works for everyone throughout the entirety of 2022. name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: I am writing to ask if you can please make a contribution, of any amount, before midnight tonight. Link is inside the email as well as why this ask matters. Thanks. - Ruben
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
#

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
But tonight is the first major test of our campaign. Because at midnight, we close the books on our first end-of-month fundraising deadline.
So with time running out, I am asking:
[**Can you please use this link to contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230131-1-subs&t=1&akid=322%2E734936%2EbrLVlo)

name: LTC (Ret.) Alexander Vindman
subject: Sincerely asking you to contribute $3 to VoteVets before midnight tonight.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
During the Trump Administration, I was the public servant in the National Security Council responsible for Russia policy and for Ukraine policy.
#
Derek -
During the Trump Administration, I was the public servant in the National Security Council responsible for Russia and Ukraine policy.
My responsibility was shepherding what should have been a national security strategy to advance U.S. national security interests.
Meanwhile, the President and some of his compatriots were looking to advance personal interests, to steal a second Trump administration. I reported the corrupt scheme.
This made me the target of a lot of far-right hate. Hate that continues to this day.
But when I needed it most, when the attacks started, VoteVets had my back. They did it when it wasn’t easy. They did it when it made them a target as well.
So now that VoteVets is coming up on its first end-of-month fundraising deadline for the 2024 campaign, I want to help them. I want to help them meet their funding goals.
[**Can you please use this link to make a $3 contribution to VoteVets before their first end-of-month fundraising deadline comes to a close at midnight tonight?**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan23.jVZiAM&refcode=em230131-1-15&t=1&akid=7316%2E3013755%2EP4sS1e)

subject: Will you add “expanding voting rights” to your list of New Year’s resolutions?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT
body:
We’re playing the long game in the fight for voting rights, and whether or not we hit our goals in the early months of 2023 will determine how much we can scale our work for the entire year. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58088417/389980544/1793776944?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230131_f_eom2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTEzY2M1NS1hNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hOLE39RMhr5Ehz9a-q2nAR1_W4_eoTknBnxS0Iu3TEc=&emci=6ef48105-9fa1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=f513cc55-a4a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

| | What New Year’s resolutions did you make for 2023? It’s only January 31, but now’s the time when a lot of us start slacking off on our recent resolutions. We skip flossing, we hit the snooze button, we splurge on another enticing object advertised on Instagram. Here at Fair Fight, we work extremely hard to make resolutions we won’t break. Actually, we made _TWELVE_ — to meet every single monthly fundraising goal we set, from here on out. These goals really matter in our work. We’re playing the long game in the fight for voting rights, and whether or not we hit our goals in the early months of 2023 will determine how much we can scale our work for the entire year. **So the investments we put in _right now_ will make a direct impact on how much we can accomplish in the near future.** [_**We’re just hours away from our first monthly fundraising deadline of 2023. Pitch in $20 or whatever you can before midnight tonight to fuel Fair Fight’s work and help expand the freedom to vote.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58088420/389980554/-1147768185?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230131_f_eom2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTEzY2M1NS1hNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hOLE39RMhr5Ehz9a-q2nAR1_W4_eoTknBnxS0Iu3TEc=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58088423/389980562/138120010?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20230131_f_eom2_v1s2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTEzY2M1NS1hNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hOLE39RMhr5Ehz9a-q2nAR1_W4_eoTknBnxS0Iu3TEc=)

After re-electing voting rights champions and making tangible change in the fight for voting rights last year, we’re raising the stakes in 2023 by setting even higher goals for ourselves (and our supporters). By chipping in early, you allow our team to meet even more voters where they are, fund even more voter education efforts, and build even more critical infrastructure needed to encourage people to make their voices heard in election cycles to come.
**These next few hours are the last opportunity to ensure we can hit our first goal of the year, and we’re counting on you to join us in the fight.** So what do you say? Will you add “expanding voting rights” to your list of unbreakable New Year’s resolutions?

name: Lexie, Team Baldwin
subject: Can you help close the gap?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Hi Peter — I’m only a few weeks into this job, but I’m blown away already by the way this team rallies around Tammy and her incredible work for Wisconsin. Because of folks like you chipping in, we’re really close to closing our fundraising gap for January — so thank you! I just ran the numbers and it looks like we still have a little ways to go to reach our fundraising goal, which is why **I’m hoping you might be able to chip in $10, $15, $20 or more before midnight tonight.** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58064418/389919243/476042345?refcode2=test&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230131_AM1_V1_S2_VSP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmJiYTMxMS03YmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5PHp9VFm14UCN2vTTzZL2ZfXshSOmQq6oKXkNFRX4IY=)
---
Even though Election Day is a while away, it’s still crucial that we build up our resources early in the cycle. The sooner we can bring on more staff, develop our budget, and reserve ad time, the better — especially since it won’t be long before Republicans start doing the same.
Pundits and pollsters are already naming Wisconsin one of the most competitive races this cycle. **But with this team on our side, I know we have what it takes to re-elect Tammy and win big next fall.**
**Peter, can you help us hit (or even exceed!) our fundraising goal before midnight? Any amount you chip in will help us build the resources we’ll need to start the year off strong.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Hi Peter — I’m only a few weeks into this job, but I’m blown away already by the way this team rallies around Tammy and her incredible work for Wisconsin. Because of folks like you chipping in, we’re really close to closing our fundraising gap for January — so thank you! I just ran the numbers and it looks like we still have a little ways to go to reach our fundraising goal, which is why I’m hoping you might be able to chip in $10, $15, $20 or more before midnight tonight. | | = Even though Election Day is a while away, it’s still crucial that we build up our resources early in the cycle. The sooner we can bring on more staff, develop our budget, and reserve ad time, the better — especially since it won’t be long before Republicans start doing the same. Pundits and pollsters are already naming Wisconsin one of the most competitive races this cycle. But with this team on our side, I know we have what it takes to re-elect Tammy and win big next fall. Peter, can you help us hit (or even exceed!) our fundraising goal before midnight? Any amount you chip in will help us build the resources we’ll need to start the year off strong. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you so much for your support! I’m excited about the work we have ahead of us, and with you on our side, I know we can score big wins. — Lexie Finance Director Tammy Baldwin for Senate PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE Tammy Baldwin for Senate P.O. Box 696 Madison, WI 53701 United States | |

name: Team AOC
subject: Another GOP meltdown 🙄
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This Republican attempted to call AOC “uneducated” on the House floor — here’s how that went down:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230131-3845-header&t=1&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
In case you missed it:
Late last week, while debating an amendment to restrict gas and oil companies who engage in stock buybacks from leasing federal land, Republican Rep. Jeff Duncan attempted to come for Alexandria by telling her to “educate yourself” about natural gas and how it’s helped America “keep emissions low”. But our Congresswoman wasn’t having it.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230127.n6JFuQ&refcode=em20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
Rather than admit that they’re fighting to protect corporate profits at the expense of our communities’ health and our planet’s ability to sustain us, Republicans have turned to name calling and character-based insults.
But Alexandria lets these insults fall to the wayside because she knows that our movement is on the right side of history. If we are going to protect our planet and our families, then we must move away from fossil fuels and toward green energy.
[If you agree, will you make a $3 contribution to power our movement and help Alexandria keep fighting for a green energy future?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230127.n6JFuQ&refcode=em20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230127.n6JFuQ&refcode=em20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)**
Here’s the full transcript of what Alexandria had to say about Rep. Duncan’s attack on the House floor:
“I mean I understand in this body it’s not the first time that it seems as though the opposing side can’t seem to be able to debate the issue, and so they must come after my character.”
“While I cannot control the fact that the other side seems to have made the assumption that I am uneducated, or what they may say about my worldview, one of the things that I can say is that while I may not work for Wall Street, that is true. I may not be here with the mission to increase profits for corporations, that is true.”
“My mission here is for the wellbeing and dignity of our family’s and our planet's future. For our children’s ability to live on this planet. That’s what this amendment is about. Moreover, when we talk about education, we should all take it upon ourselves in this body to educate ourselves on the science of the challenge of climate change that is before us. By around 2050 we are looking at, in western states, wildfires projected to further increase by 2 to 6 times. And that is just scratching the surface. Thank you and I yield back.”
[Alexandria won’t back down and won’t stop fighting for a green energy future, so we can’t stop either. If you can, make a $3 contribution today to help keep Alexandria in Congress fighting for us all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230127.n6JFuQ&refcode=em20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230127?refcode=em20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=24&refcode2=3845_2526796_IVDWmq&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230131-3845-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=25&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=29&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=3845%2E2526796%2EIVDWmq)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: We call you! | | | 🚨 JANUARY DEADLINE ALERT 🚨 | | | | Our team needs you to act NOW, friend! We are only short $650! With your help, we can meet our goal before midnight tonight. Your donation makes a huge difference Your contribution will help us send a message to the Democrats that the GOP has a massive grassroots movement of patriotic Americans who are fired up and ready to take back our country! We're in the final hours of January, and it would be a shame if we couldn't reach our fundraising goal for the month. A donation today will help us continue to address the problems in Minnesota and provide solutions to the left's liberal agenda. You've seen what the left will do with full control, but Brad is working with the US House majority to stop the Democrats' radical plans -- we need your financial support to deliver on the promises made to voters. Thank you, Aaron E Finstad Campaign Manager | | | | | | | | ---|---|---

name: Newt Gingrich
subject: Re: Kevin McCarthy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I’ve been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I’ve concluded that it all b

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsbuclok1npgop0tbar5rkahk7783u0oimmk84a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie6o35cth2bs)
---

Kevin's first couple of weeks in office have confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlksb6vsc7667hogm1pp56bpn8q5knplv84f8trg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie6o35cth2bs "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztot8rmb9avfikvjnm3314f03bt1p7uf5dc7gvu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie6o35cth2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsvt57nv6aflnh5f65ektaish3gs75t6qnlfijeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chie6o35cth2bs)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

---

Team -- **The far-right Supreme Court will stop at _nothing_ to pursue its radical agenda.**

The Court has already overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and opened the door to a nationwide abortion ban, and now they've heard oral arguments in a case that FiveThirtyEight says **"might strike the final blow against the Voting Rights Act."**

If the conservatives on the Court get their way, they could _shred_ voters' last line of defense and legalize **blatantly** racist voting laws across the country!

Millions of Americans' voting rights are threatened, so we’ve launched an URGENT Live Poll to show that Democrats are **_relentless_** in protecting the right to vote. **This CRITICAL poll closes tonight, and we still need 42 more responses from Pennsylvania. So please tell us:**

**SURVEY CLOSES AT 11:59 PM:**
**Should the Supreme Court UPHOLD the Voting Rights Act?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/11818?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230131-SupremeCourtUpdate-VRA538RRRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230131-SupremeCourtUpdate-VRA538RRRef-Pros-sl1&akid=9671%2E9716520%2EhOMFXm)

name: American Action News
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorkmo19a0cohvgicoierp90pdf18qrhibjl103o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chieepj4chh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr85fl3hhj9e86a85ilvrc3kculcakj6l5u2ejho_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chieepj4chh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today »**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziiq6m1n9qmk8dnams6uo8rmdoqgu5bqsfunotc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5chieepj4chh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.

clean_body: Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri | | | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we’d like to hear from you: We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation’s great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? I am deeply grateful for your friendship. Warm Regards, Larry P. subject: Kevin McCarthy wants me gone.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| Peter, I've only been in Congress for a month, but it's already easy to see that Kevin McCarthy and his extremist allies have little interest in passing legislation to actually improve lives. The last time McCarthy was in the majority, he launched the Benghazi committee to tear down Hillary Clinton’s poll numbers. This time, his new committee is about "Investigating the Investigators” to feed into right-wing, “deep state” conspiracies. It's a sham, and it's all about winning in 2024. I didn't come to Congress for cheap political stunts. This is about doing the necessary work, so our community and future generations can pursue the American dream. But the fact is that McCarthy and his MAGA allies in Congress are hellbent on unseating me in 2024. **Remember, it wasn't long ago that Kevin McCarthy personally visited IL-17 and said defeating me was his "#1 priority." If you think those feelings changed because he failed in November, think again.** Tonight at midnight marks my first end-of-month fundraising deadline as a Member of the U.S. Congress. I know we have a ways to go until 2024, but it’s critical that we build early resources if we want to beat McCarthy's super PAC and keep this seat blue. That's what I was elected to do. **In the meantime, we need to prove we have the resources to defend this seat, and a great way to do that is by meeting all our fundraising goals. **2023 Senate Survey**
Fellow American,

I know we haven’t touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

| | Want to hear a crazy story? **I’m not your run-of-the-mill Republican.** I’m a true patriot and a conservative with a proven record of fighting for the American people.
**My election in 2020 was a bitter FIGHT.** At midnight on election day, I was ahead of my Democrat opponent by **NEARLY 30,000 VOTES!**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=471265400f154dd091bc5dbacea1d0b9&_e=nNwslvLsk5mflzAG3NS58fVOXZwyRC3gPnGd90zLXlQ5MyCTfs2KANw3TVyVd49XRsQO80o3jNrqaHuey_MIKJWcwJrm8mYRbqercFpXs9E06FWOKy5O6BEB7Zi9ya3XqGCW-WtypkW6hZTGLIw9aS7YUjJyh-M9Dp-mpjCVqWbHNOPbXsxiBpYY93tYAT-rHsKKUypVXvIgyYeSU2kS_Uc5GrEqt4YVs6oNkYmF9uEbxBTevoiUfUG-tdBQZPJlmk-8chUInKHBRB_ylPtNPgUWsI8ZuMIyB8BjrGQPTbaCi77ia-z9RVzWfgK2STKmfzKvtUzYf4IP3CtJxYPCeWslgx2oB36fuMQyY2G4vBmDAlG0Lakbx87pMgHq9RG_Au1d886UYSqH4UEe8FK6NJwzk4vkS4hmEbU3SUVHCX4KR-irInHOALwMn9AcpMrEQaIHuugAkAbQcgwsPx88qQ%3D%3D)

Over the next **_90 DAYS_ ,** we fought against a team of lawyers who pulled out every shady tactic in the book to push my opponent ahead. After every ballot was scrutinized and legal vote counted, **I was declared the winner by a slim** _**109**_**votes! **
From that moment on, I knew I needed to lead the election integrity effort.__**_And that’s why I founded and lead the Election Integrity Caucus in Congress._**
---
[**RUSH IN → DEFEND ELECTION INTEGRITY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=471265400f154dd091bc5dbacea1d0b9&_e=nNwslvLsk5mflzAG3NS58fVOXZwyRC3gPnGd90zLXlQ5MyCTfs2KANw3TVyVd49XRsQO80o3jNrqaHuey_MIKJWcwJrm8mYRbqercFpXs9E06FWOKy5O6BEB7Zi9ya3XqGCW-WtypkW6hZTGLIw9aS7YUjJyh-M9Dp-mpjCVqWbHNOPbXsxiBpYY93tYAT-rHsKKUypVXvIgyYeSU2kS_Uc5GrEqt4YVs6oNkYmF9uEbxBTevoiUfUG-tdBQZPJlmk-8chUInKHBRB_ylPtNPgUWsI8ZuMIyB8BjrGQPTbaCi77ia-z9RVzWfgK2STKmx2Dah_rWOxS4_RMZF9FBSx1l9bDPiEk1-d29k--TKvVbxvH02V6Wid_Q4mDjLINemM_sQHKYKxzCDIlOgGt3wiHymdsxvgTZJS08BjiDoXTqxhTODVK4mFDHPvGhSIeMsNehZxMPHGIVMw_QWFYLlQ%3D%3D)
---
_But my fight didn’t stop there. _ At the same, I was SPEARHEADING an effort to overturn the unconstitutional concealed carry laws that plagued states like mine. **And I won.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=471265400f154dd091bc5dbacea1d0b9&_e=nNwslvLsk5mflzAG3NS58fVOXZwyRC3gPnGd90zLXlQ5MyCTfs2KANw3TVyVd49XRsQO80o3jNrqaHuey_MIKJWcwJrm8mYRbqercFpXs9E06FWOKy5O6BEB7Zi9ya3XqGCW-WtypkW6hZTGLIw9aS7YUjJyh-M9Dp-mpjCVqWbHNOPbXsxiBpYY93tYAT-rHsKKUypVXvIgyYeSU2kS_Uc5GrEqt4YVs6oNkYmF9uEbxBTevoiUfUG-tdBQZPJlmk-8chUInKHBRB_ylPtNPgUWsI8ZuMIyB8BjrGQPTbaCi77ia-z9RVzWfgK2STKmUHqaQNmoLdhN5saG_xUG-uqJ5pD-Zo5ss2zFTol6ejBtgNk5wPxvMKHtu70L0UqGf7SBtcC8F-q9KeD0CWu4RNyjGUFtc4CNrz0-_zmXIKs4HX5wR3Z_0_aDfyz_rs61B7lNFbP1-Mu9DuMxKn3ppQ%3D%3D)

There are too many Republicans who talk a good game but never actually fight for YOU. **[Peter, will you help me continue racking up conservative wins for YOU by chipping in a generous donation in the NEXT HOUR?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=471265400f154dd091bc5dbacea1d0b9&_e=nNwslvLsk5mflzAG3NS58fVOXZwyRC3gPnGd90zLXlQ5MyCTfs2KANw3TVyVd49XRsQO80o3jNrqaHuey_MIKJWcwJrm8mYRbqercFpXs9E06FWOKy5O6BEB7Zi9ya3XqGCW-WtypkW6hZTGLIw9aS7YUjJyh-M9Dp-mpjCVqWbHNOPbXsxiBpYY93tYAT-rHsKKUypVXvIgyYeSU2kS_Uc5GrEqt4YVs6oNkYmF9uEbxBTevoiUfUG-tdBQZPJlmk-8chUInKHBRB_ylPtNPgUWsI8ZuMIyB8BjrGQPTbaCi77ia-z9RVzWfgK2STKmZ4fqJFf-AbSnd4gT0wXP7lizEc082_VcyGJL3ECVHz4Lr351PZp-uZV2jKAH_pnjqkNSOUb3h1UJFhTvsb_K_LfrfL2najSrO6eSbtW5Q9PdIQWxjsen8AOiKyijXH1jdxZUkuE5pAVrxsVcZhJXTQ%3D%3D)**

body:
Peter Willis,

Tonight at midnight is our first
end-of-month deadline since the start of the new Congress, and we're still
short of where we need to be.

This deadline is critical because our founder Bernie Sanders is taking on
Big Pharma and our corrupt healthcare system as the new chair of the HELP
committee.

Big Pharma doesn't like Bernie's plans to expose their price-gouging and
they are already attacking him.

name: Cecile Richards
subject: the fight for safe and legal abortion
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Just last summer, the Supreme Court overturned 50 years of precedent when they struck down Roe v. Wade, ending the constitutional right to abortion in America.

This was the culmination of decades of work by Republicans – they have spent years stacking the courts and passing extreme legislation in states across the country to get to this point – and they won't stop now. **A national abortion ban is next.**
Preventing a national abortion ban means defending our Democratic Senate majority, taking back the House and winning critical races at the state level. [**That's why American Bridge set a major $50,000 end-of-month goal to hold Republicans accountable and defeat them at the ballot box. Could you donate $25 or more right now to help prevent Republicans from ending abortion access nationwide?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58067496/389929195/-498614040?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2214-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkNDUyMTA0LTgxYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BdpaiYFFWTb_BY_0sJvepfSckJuKVodOjExpXVYKP3s=)

In all of my time working as a reproductive rights advocate, including my tenure as president of Planned Parenthood, I have never seen a more dire moment for the future of our fundamental rights in America.
I am appalled by Republicans using their political power to take away our ability to make our own decisions about our bodies. And it will take all of us to fight back and elect Democrats up and down the ballot to hold Republicans responsible for pushing these bans.
**But we can't do this important work without your urgent support, friend.**

**[_So, I'm personally asking: Will you rush a donation of $25 or more today to help us hold Republicans accountable and stop them from gaining the power they need to pass a national abortion ban? We're still $8,890 away from our end-of-month goal, and we need your critical support to close the gap._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58067500/389929197/-498614040?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&amount=25&refcode=jtk2214-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJkNDUyMTA0LTgxYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BdpaiYFFWTb_BY_0sJvepfSckJuKVodOjExpXVYKP3s=)**

I am appalled by Republicans using their political power to take away our ability to make our own decisions about our bodies. And it will take all of us to fight back and elect Democrats up and down the ballot to hold Republicans responsible for pushing these bans. But we can't do this important work without your urgent support, friend. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Let’s get to work. – Cecile Richards | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. American Bridge 21st Century 800 Maine Ave SW Suite 400 Washington, DC 20024 United States

name: PA Democrats
subject: This could cripple democracy in PA
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90471/images/PDP%20Primary%20Logo.png]
Dear Peter,
Tonight at midnight is our January fundraising deadline, and we have important news to share with you.
Pennsylvania is making national headlines [https://apnews.com/article/politics-united-states-government-pennsylvania-2022-midterm-elections-arizona-6ce58816a74a76c7ff97c64f8a4c85e9] this week and not for good reasons. A major 2020 election denier is overseeing a legislative committee in charge of setting election policy for Pennsylvania.
In 2020, current Republican State Senator Cris Dush not only mounted an investigation into the election (on what grounds, we’re still not sure), but he also pushed to block Pennsylvania’s electoral votes from going to Biden.
And how is the GOP awarding such bad behavior? They just appointed him as chair of the Senate State Government Committee, a committee in charge of setting election policy for Pennsylvania.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=jan31emaila [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=jan31emaila]
In just the first few weeks of this year’s legislative session, Dush has already moved along voter ID and election audits measures – both as constitutional amendments expressly designed to bypass Governor Shapiro’s veto. We have no doubt that Dush plans to cripple democracy and voting rights.
Pennsylvania voters overwhelmingly voted against extremist election deniers in November’s election. Cris Dush’s appointment not only goes against the will of the people, but it’s also downright dangerous for the future of elections in Pennsylvania.
With an extremist like Dush leading such an important committee, it’s even more critical that Democrats sweep next week’s Special Election in the 32nd, 34th, and 35th House Districts. Pennsylvanians deserve lawmakers who will expand the right to vote, not curb it. Those three votes could be the deciding vote for anti-democratic bills.
Chip in [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=jan31emaila&express_lane=true&amount=10]
Help us meet our January fundraising goal and help us elect three pro-democracy Democratic candidates by chipping in $10 now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pa2023?refcode=jan31emaila]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

We’re counting on you!
Pennsylvania Democrats

| Peter,

As I'm sure you know now from the messages my campaign team sent, _**tonight is our first major fundraising deadline of 2023.**_

These early moments in the election cycle are vital in building both a strong foundation and momentum. This grassroots network is a major reason I have the privilege to continue serving our community in Congress, and I'm counting on your support as we look ahead to 2024.

With that in mind, will you consider a contribution to my campaign before tonight's deadline? You can use this secure link: _**[abigailspanberger.com/JanGoal](https://act.myngp.com/el/dgfjoB8Lep3sYUXwROxUh-QrnHi2r2CamgGyQ7GyOLI=/PqrUq3TMUhCsUz7FjYLOdRzhEK-SipuW3ob0NND3iK0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20230131-1-EM&amount=25)**_

I am extremely grateful for the grassroots network behind our campaign, and I can't wait to see the productivity the new year will bring.

With sincere appreciation,
Abigail

name: 1600 Daily
subject: How are your K-12 schools and universities doing?
body:
Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of Ameri
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1o67cimbbloi63kd7d96pqspqe3f0mcenqlh2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g60or2chh2bs)
---
| | | Fellow American, Are K-12 schools, colleges, and universities in your state doing enough to provide students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? There is reason to be doubtful. There seems to be a decreasing sense of patriotism among young Americans, and an increasing attraction to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. And have you noticed all the disturbing incidents taking place on college campuses, with students resorting to intimidation, threats, and violence to silence speakers with whom they disagree? Hillsdale is planning to redouble its efforts for the future of liberty. We will respond to these disturbing trends by expanding our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--especially for younger Americans. And as we form our strategy we'd like to hear from you: [**Please take our brief education survey here » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaoe4v87h7opjh51s60act7fc285nmqtgjomi51g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g60or2chh2bs) We have done too many of our young people a disservice by failing to provide them with knowledge of our nation's great heritage of liberty. Even worse, many of our schools, corrupted by Left-wing bias, have pushed a false history of America as essentially flawed and unjust. This indoctrination will only continue once students return to campuses across the country. Hillsdale can remain independent and stay true to its mission because it refuses to accept one penny of taxpayer funding--even indirect aid like federal or state student grants and loans. This frees Hillsdale from burdensome and corrupting regulation, but it also means we are entirely dependent on the support of our friends nationwide. Will you help us understand how Americans look at education today so that we can plan our expanded outreach in the smartest way possible? [**Please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your opinions on education today » **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zheema05aa1o6oh9mc6indtj0r5v3v756jnaehko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g60or2chh2bs) I am deeply grateful for your friendship.
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
