name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Open border extremism
body:
Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I’ll get straight to the point:

| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zs586c0qs1vag2psvbt6ei29494lm4bv52s24ido_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g68oj3c1h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative,

Because I know your time is valuable, and because this issue is vital to national security, I'll get straight to the point:

I'm writing today to invite you to join other conservatives who are pressuring lawmakers to end Biden's open border extremism by completing a simple 1-minute survey using the link below:

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrdok2ch2b8l1m15ibudb3bnrgei69pma7ia669o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g68oj3c1h2bs)**

It's critical that proactive citizens like you respond to this national poll because despite legacy media's deafening silence on the issue, **this crisis has now reached historic proportions with more than 2 million reported encounters between Border Patrol and illegal immigrants in 2022.**

This is more encounters than ever before in our nation's history--_more than double that of any year during President Donald Trump 's term._

So when people ask me what I think of Biden's immigration policy, I reply: _what immigration policy?_

Beginning the day he took office, Biden's "policies" have created one of the worst humanitarian crises our nation has ever seen.

And now, untold scores of narcotics, violent criminals, and human traffickers are being allowed to flood into American communities, practically unabated, _every single day._

Decades of success advancing conservative policies have taught us that lawmakers in Washington tend to be more responsive when they know that voters are paying attention.

**Will you help us pressure lawmakers to address this urgent matter of national security by completing a brief 1-minute survey on Immigration Reform using the link below?**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvan0m0p1p9enin0mvmnd256bj5konrs8ub6oec0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g68oj3c1h2bs)**

**Armed with your response, we will work on your behalf to turn up the pressure on lawmakers and compel them to act now.**

Let elected officials know loud and clear that **you _demand_ an end to Biden's open border extremism by completing this quick 1-minute survey using the link below:**

**[https://secured.heritage.org/immigration-reform-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znd0ntfshup3ufibu4mumb51ldtrir3iv1vruni0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g68oj3c1h2bs)**

Thank you,

Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

**P.S.** We must take action now--this issue cannot wait. [**Thank you for joining the fight by completing the 1-minute survey linked here. >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqgtspat4qqmald7n4ka4h3odmttk364j3d1iobg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g68oj3c1h2bs)
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

name: Team ODP
subject: There's a lot on the line in Ohio right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Only one month into the New Year, we've seen just how dangerous Ohio's Republican leadership is:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58092739/389995251/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzQxODM5Yi1iMmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x0x9gPuBo78V0K938Zt0Ny-0zyEBac0sgMFrHxnFXG8=) | We'll keep this short, team.

We're coming up on our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2023 at midnight tonight — and we're still behind on our goal.

There's a lot on the line in Ohio right now: There are bills attacking our fundamental rights in the statehouse, and Republicans are lining up to take on Sherrod Brown. To get our state back on the right track, we need your help.

I'll get straight to it, Peter.

**The San Francisco Chronicle just reported that I have a serious fundraising deficit compared to others who are running or considering a run for California's Senate seat.**

I'm making a decision about running for U.S. Senate in the coming weeks — but I can't launch this campaign if I don't have the resources to get the job done.

I'll be honest: Fundraising isn't always the easiest for candidates of color. But I believe that to make bold, progressive change in our country, you must put your money where your mouth is.

For me, that meant raising money and investing in my progressive colleagues, and that's precisely what I have done over the years as a Congresswoman and an activist — lifting others as I climb.

**Today, I hope you show me the same support and dedication I have given. I'm strongly considering a run for U.S. Senate — where there are currently no Black women serving today, and only two other Black women have ever served.**

That's why I set a goal to raise $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you before midnight, but with time running out before our deadline, I'm falling just short.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | I'll get straight to it, Peter. The San Francisco Chronicle just reported that I have a serious fundraising deficit compared to others who are running or considering a run for California's Senate seat. I'm making a decision about running for U.S. Senate in the coming weeks — but I can't launch this campaign if I don't have the resources to get the job done. That's why I'm personally asking: | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I'll be honest: Fundraising isn't always the easiest for candidates of color. But I believe that to make bold, progressive change in our country, you must put your money where your mouth is. For me, that meant raising money and investing in my progressive colleagues, and that's precisely what I have done over the years as a Congresswoman and an activist — lifting others as I climb. Today, I hope you show me the same support and dedication I have given. I'm strongly considering a run for U.S. Senate — where there are currently no Black women serving today, and only two other Black women have ever served. That's why I set a goal to raise $10,000 from grassroots supporters like you before midnight, but with time running out before our deadline, I'm falling just short. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Barbara Lee and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Even against all odds, I will never stop fighting for a better future that works for all of us. Thank you for always standing with me. — Barbara Lee The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: last email from me this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
This is the last email you’ll receive from me this month.
| | |
---
Hi there –

This is the last email you’ll receive from me this month.

I’ve spent the month working with new colleagues like John Fetterman and more familiar colleagues like Jeanne Shaheen to fight for things like abortion access, lower prescription drug costs, and protecting our climate. **Fundraising just hasn’t been a top priority.**

Now that we’re closing the books on January, it’s looking like we’re going to fall short of our monthly goal. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll donate $3 or more right now to help us get back on track: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58071550/389942800/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2197-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjRhMjhhZi04OGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BWZqlK2CQQjru8-d4RXrO4hVK2iT2SUi06uGZLDU2Js=)**

name: Speaker McCarthy
subject: As for Ilhan Omar...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | Peter, Ilhan Omar said that my decision to remove her from the House Foreign Affairs committee, and Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell from the Intelligence Committee, is a "threat to national security".

**Let me be blunt:** national security is precisely __why__ I removed these three from their respective committees. I've said it many times before, and I'll say it again:
* Adam Schiff's abuse of his position on the Intel Committee to LIE in pursuit of President Trump proves his inability to put national security and integrity over partisan games.
* Eric Swalwell's relationship with a Chinese spy is quite literally the definition of jeopardizing national security, which is why the FBI briefed me on the matter.
* And Ilhan Omar's openly antisemitic statements and stance directly imperil our alliance with our #1 ally in the Middle East: Israel.

I am returning the Intelligence Committee to one of genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

I promised I'd restore accountability to your government. Now I am delivering, and the Democrats are FURIOUS.

**If you stand with my decision to drain the swamp of these bad actors, I need you to stand with me now:**
---
| | [STAND WITH KEVIN](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62273553:6Ra7MHGNX:m:1:3331421248:2C1B6E9695C48185DE3ABDDE99422A57:r)

Fellow Democrats,

Our end-of month-goal is due **TONIGHT** at midnight, and we have no time to waste. Each goal we set between now and April's election is crucial to protect our children and our local governments.

**[With less than 24 hours left it looks like we still have $892 left to raise in order to reach our $3,000 goal. name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zg2cko3r4a2renb3b7nf65sl6au31ug7hviilav8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g64ob4c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1rpbs3oe3f0itld020gjtoibf79gq5d8a1sbr2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g64ob4c5h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z74smch474shitip7hnipskvhtbrig3bbp2vjmq8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g64ob4c5h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zeaibft4mfiq3igq0hs5q8iqsm0cu8a0s7e79dcg).

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjcvvigpm5d40ek6rqn7kr1um8uhbbassqeffru8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7clh60oj1chgm49fg)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have ugly news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58072850/389947518/-648933138?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230131_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBiMmM3N2M5LThhYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wiQmcY57ZG77bFfLF4h79vkLnH1N4BnAcBtYsZKNVjQ=) I’ve got some bad news:

In the dead of night, Kevin McCarthy and the Republican Party did what they’ve threatened for the last two years.

**They removed me from the House Intelligence Committee where I have served as Chairman and the top Democrat for years.**

This is political retribution for my leading the impeachment of Donald Trump, pure and simple, and a dangerous effort to go after anyone who holds them accountable. It also turns the Intelligence Committee into a political plaything for their right-wing supporters.

Peter, I really need you with me to help respond to this baseless attack on my ability to serve my constituents and the American people.

[**Please, contribute $10 or whatever you can spare today to our campaign and UniteDemocrats to help me respond to Republicans’ baseless attacks on my ability to hold them accountable. This isn’t the end of my fight for truth, accountability, and our democracy. Yesterday, Gretchen Whitmer launched Building Bridges PAC, and we can’t thank you enough for the support you’ve already shown this important initiative.

Hundreds of supporters like you have stepped up to become founding donors and support Michigan Democrats up and down the ballot. **[And there’s still time to support Building Bridges and become a founding donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093292/389997085/-1067816794?refcode=EM_FR_230131BB2_N_GW_90DA_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAwMWM4ZS1iNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6-BnN60zFguGc2hT9u_sOjXjpdR5bGos45jFbIvVmI=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093293/389997086/-1067816794?refcode=EM_FR_230131BB2_N_GW_90DA_6_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAwMWM4ZS1iNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6-BnN60zFguGc2hT9u_sOjXjpdR5bGos45jFbIvVmI=) Michiganders are facing the pinch right now, but we know that with our new Democratic majorities, we can deliver for our great state. From lowering costs to defending access to abortion to supporting our children and their education, we have a chance to make a real difference for Michigan.

**_But none of this will come easy._ Our majorities in the State House and Senate are incredibly narrow, and we have our work cut out for us to expand them in the next election because we know the GOP will continue to play partisan games to stall important legislation.**

We need to defend and expand our majorities to keep getting things done for you. Your support today is an investment in our state's future.

**[So we’re asking: Can we count on you to become a founding donor with a donation of $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093294/389997087/-1067816794?refcode=EM_FR_230131BB2_N_GW_90DA_6_NG_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAwMWM4ZS1iNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6-BnN60zFguGc2hT9u_sOjXjpdR5bGos45jFbIvVmI=)**

Thank you,

Team Whitmer
---
| | Now that we have Democratic majorities in both the State House and Senate, we're getting to work – but we can't stop there. We need to double down on our efforts to solidify and build upon our majorities to keep getting things done for Michiganders. Donate now to help us get it done! [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093295/389997088/-1067816794?refcode=EM_FR_230131BB2_N_GW_90DA_6_NG_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTAwMWM4ZS1iNGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r6-BnN60zFguGc2hT9u_sOjXjpdR5bGos45jFbIvVmI=)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdde6lt29jn4h2gs3g32647q1vja1qkusm421pko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6coj7c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2nkail9ck69ic6ma1llfrhukr96v4o626vtu1mo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6coj7c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zes4kgukmq5fnianq6rvmgl89mfu8sl1adjfo4f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6coj7c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](https://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z0nobuj77n19hmjfo9umcus3tlfkvv5260ktqrqg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhf5srdva0es0k2tl3l0jvrd3hunr38006uv4ap0_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7clh60pj2ctg649fg)

And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[_**_(If you want to cut to the chase, you can make a donation of any amount right here.)_**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58073257/389948623/-1914796982?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230131_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzFlZTkxMWYtOGNhMS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xBC6RQQSEClncn5re8c7kKGI3RWyXoBPxwATZfz28OA=) When our team sits down and sets our monthly fundraising goals, the numbers aren’t pulled out of thin air. We calculate exactly how much we’ll need to raise each month in order to stay on track, and have all the resources we need to keep operations running. Peter, we have big plans for the next two years, all in service of taking back the House in 2024 and kicking Kevin McCarthy out of the Speakership, and we want to make sure we can accomplish them. And everything we do takes resources. So if we don’t meet our monthly goals, we run the risk of not being able to carry out our strategy to take back the House in 2024. These deadlines are important to have a chance at doing all we need to do over the next two years to take back the House. name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities --
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh6dlot06iidotob181cnn5flikvmkdg9v4hen7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cpj4chh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrvj90bc3541atu5ha55ic9sm05h7s0nbrl3au7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cpj4chh2bs)
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zucphl4lti9c0h5n4nj5bbanh9goigick84h1i7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cpj4chh2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. name: Jack Foley
subject: January is a critical deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We can’t afford to fall behind.

|
---
**Derek,** I cannot stress enough the importance of January. It’s a solid base for our work throughout the year – [**we can’t afford to fall behind if we want to see results come November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093720/389998554/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230131-crit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuKoInIKqjlo7Wn2VX6B5DJVTJ5255dhL1rNdPHywdw=) My job here at the DPVA is to make sure Virginians are energized and ready to vote for Democrats, who are willing to work for each and every person in the Commonwealth. But, we need to meet our goals to be able to accomplish that. [**Will you help us get 2023 off to a great start for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093722/389998557/-1524691769?refcode=dpva-em-230131-crit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nuKoInIKqjlo7Wn2VX6B5DJVTJ5255dhL1rNdPHywdw=) Our January deadline is critical, and we need buy-in from everyone to clinch a majority in the state assembly. To do it, we need every Democrat from across the Commonwealth to help us meet our goal – **BEFORE MIDNIGHT!** This work cannot be done without each and every one of you. Let’s do this. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8lbn4nmuh9taba2g8fhq58de1h1kui2rq3dpvn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cp70sph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd99sqgi6ku2566avkvq6atrqelm0n0ebqnu1c6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cp70sph2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1u8tk3fkm31j22eaf1pl5cb4oqd4ovnclat6k80_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cp70sph2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrr4ahe4njrc7tmn5p8c6f6fgebnoa8noc73f44o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cp70sph2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc5p9qv03vaa0a3fos6nt45ims4e2jcaqkttbvpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cp70sph2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Putting them on trial
body:
And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK, The College Scam.
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl2l1qrun39c71rf5oig4dvlq7sjjro94b97buao_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcrqhb9qb9p3m9gf0tp2loaqh9g5jloahv0b4ipo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuliuqbq0upc14vslt05bhvdh940a3r3fphkrafg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0i5a7dccjpgoc24bec3cgjdjgi8d2lkjlvnmuh8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqgj08q4h2le6tdaj2kijls1ksp6smjveu59t7m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpmcigrcud1o2kfr7b9t44k7ukluafbe32i6knd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zekq326aft596tg350qrnn7gil6bkm74uvgl4d0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvm7k5fpjiansd0dm9k9l6lhfluo534aj6n3po9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6cob5c9h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

When you read The College Scam, you'll learn: my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War! The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: We’ll lose the Senate in 2024 without Jon Tester’s seat. It’s that simple.
body:
Must keep this Senate seat
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6a496af7-f501-45b2-9185-673da6326feb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _A race we can't afford to lose in 2024, or we lose the Senate._ _Senator Jon Tester is running for reelection in Montana. _**_Tester has been everything you'd hope for as a Senator from a bright red state running as a Democrat._** He breaks with us on some issues where he has to represent his constituents. [**_Will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T854aacde-a55e-4720-afa8-f6ac7e23b147/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_But whether it's key national issues like codifying choice or passing universal background checks on guns, or joining us on defining legislation such as the COVID stimulus & Inflation Reduction Acts, there is just never any question Jon Tester will be there, behind us 100%._**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T334ebb4f-ccd8-4771-99a4-3a1aceab75f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _No huffing and puffing his chest for the cameras. No negotiating on Meet The Press, or, worse, FoxNews. No attacking his own party or bragging about how much he disagrees with it. In other words, the anti-Joe Manchin._ **_Tester, like Manchin, comes from an overwhelming Trump state. Trump won Montana by 20% in 2016, yet Tester still stood up for his progressive values--FOR US--and was reelected in 2018 on his record and very Montana-esque being. He's perfect for the state, and perfect for the Democratic Party._** **_If we don't re-elect Tester, we will lose the Senate._** It's that simple. _And if we don't reward Tester for taking bold, progressive stands, even knowing he'll have to overcome the HUGE Trump lean of his state, then we can expect future Democrats from states like Montana to all be Joe Manchins._ A disaster. [**_So will you join us in showing Jon Tester how much we appreciate his political courage and in ensuring we hold onto the Senate majority, by giving Senator Tester $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc12ad417-3500-464e-8395-70eb48778e7d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for helping us reelect the good ones in hostile electoral territory._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda6feefc-fe73-4f7f-9c30-01eb7f03c3ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Never Give An Inch contains dozens of untold stories you don't want to miss, including negotiations with North Korea's Kim Jong Un, rescuing American hostages, eliminating Qassem Soleimani, and much more! Will you claim your book before they run out?" | | | | "Claim Your Signed Copy" I understand you're one of the top Republican patriots in the country, so I want to make sure you get a signed copy! But there are only a limited number available and supplies are quickly running out. "My new book Never Give An Inch will be yours with a $45 donation to help Republicans take back America." Please hurry to order today. Unapologetically American, Mike Pompeo | | | "Claim Your Signed Copy" | | | | | | "Membership Footer" Join the conservative team working tirelessly to rebuild America! She is the voice Virginians need representing them in the House, and we can help get her there. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58073936/389950780/-712162911?sourceid=1048560&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTc3ODU5Yy04ZGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GyanCTxX_36mjetKUU9xB0tJxawAHGZq2pkl6wq66TY=&emci=5a77859c-8da1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=5e77859c-8da1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Jenn's nearly two decades of experience on the floor of the state legislature gained her the reputation of getting things done for her community. name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101”
| | | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3ksuv469utku90ddq6sc4ib6hpe7dvmikqrr898_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6ap34cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zb2qlhabc25molkfd0etkm7v0plgdma5ijfddrvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6ap34cdh2bs) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College’s world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z5neu2liu51uqscolbpjspdknse3985evbfeclu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5c9g6ap34cdh2bs) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844
---
---

clean_body: Our fight for democracy continues year-round. = | Fellow activist, With anti-democracy officials still in positions of power in Harrisburg and DC, the fight for democracy continues year-round. Their efforts to ban abortions, destroy our freedom to vote, spread hateful division, and more continue to wreak havoc across our country and our Commonwealth. If we’re going to have real systemic change, we’re going to have to change the way the electorate looks — and that takes long-term effort and investment. That is why your support is just as crucial now as it was last year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny County only: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal/Local/Judicial Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal/Local/Judicial Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: NIH Records Reveal FBI Inquiry of Wuhan Grant Records Show ‘Gain-of-Function’ Concerns about Wuhan Lab Going Back to 2016
body: Background on report that the NIH didn't properly oversee money given to EcoHealth [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61981&L=28796&F=T&] NIH gave EcoHealth Alliance money for risky coronavirus research without proper oversight, watchdog finds [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61981&L=28796&F=T&] Source: Fox News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61981&L=28796&F=T&] An internal investigation found that the National Institutes of Health (NIH) did not execute proper oversight of the nonprofit group EcoHealth Alliance, which was awarded nearly $8 million in federal research grants to study bat coronaviruses in China. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Peter, our movement is winning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
I want to take a moment to think about just how far we’ve come, and just how powerful our progressive movement is -- a movement that wouldn’t exist without people like you.
[**But first, can you chip in $3 to keep our momentum going?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27646?refcode=em20230131-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27646?refcode=em20230131-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)**
When I ran for Congress six years ago, I was one of just **_four_** members of Congress who refused corporate PAC money. Today, over 70 members reject corporate PAC donations.
More than a decade ago, fast food workers courageously launched the Fight for $15 -- two years later, Seattle became the first major city in the country to pass a $15 minimum wage. Today, it is a mainstream Democratic position and even Republican-held states are passing ballot initiatives for a $15 minimum wage.
Nine years ago, when economist Thomas Piketty advocated for a wealth tax, few thought it was possible. Now we’ve finally passed a minimum corporate tax and we’re getting ever closer to passing a wealth tax here state-side and federally.
Five years ago, the idea of canceling student debt was seen as radical and impossible. Now, the President of the United States has canceled some or all student debt for 33 million people and identified it as a step toward racial justice.
**That’s how I know our movement’s work matters and our bold, progressive ideas are winning.**
[**I couldn’t do any of this without you, and it’s my job to make sure our movement continues to grow and push our country forward. Can I count on your support?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27646?refcode=em20230131-2116amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27646?refcode=em20230131-2116&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)**
**_This**_ is our movement for justice. **_You**_ are our movement for justice. And as difficult as these times are, I promise you our strength emerges in times of crisis. These are the moments that offer the possibility of enormous transformation. Now is the time for all of us to recommit to who we are and what we stand for.
And with insurrectionists serving in Congress and the Big Lie still being pushed by extreme MAGA Republicans -- endangering our very democracy -- it’s up to us to fight for what’s right and never surrender. The stakes are too high to disengage or be cynical or hopeless.
Every time the odds are stacked against us, we rise up, we work hard, we organize, and we deliver. That’s what our progressive movement is all about. We don’t just **_dream**_ of a more just, equal America, we **_deliver**_ it.
[**If you have anything to contribute today, I ask that you chip in and help us stay strong this term. While I fight for you every day -- will you support our campaign?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27646?refcode=em20230131-2116amounts%3D5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)
**Thank you for everything you do for our movement, and for all that we will do together in the future.**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230131-2116-footer&t=6&refcode2=2116_420207_cEEdap&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2116%2E420207%2EcEEdap)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chairman=20Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: 🚨🚨 Our FIRST 2023 End of Month Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
January Reporting Deadline is at 11:59 PM TONIGHT!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Katie Porter
subject: #1 priority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Our next Senator should be fighting for Californians, not corporations.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16888%2E3422442%2EWVm0tJ)
Derek, let me cut through the BS and tell you exactly what the **number one problem I plan to solve in the Senate** is: the influence of billionaires and the most powerful corporations.
Washington caters to the desires of billionaires and the most powerful corporations, and leaves families behind. That corruption has eroded the integrity of all our political institutions, especially Congress.
The power of special interests in Washington is at an all-time high, and while Republicans have been the worst offenders of this, some members of both parties share responsibility.
**Our next Senator should be fighting for Californians, not corporations.**
I’m proud to be the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money. I’m one of just a handful of Congressmembers who doesn’t accept federal lobbyist contributions. It’s my job to fight corruption, and I know how to stand up against powerful interests in Washington.
I’m counting on grassroots supporters to power our campaign. We set an end of month goal of raising $150,000 before midnight tonight, and as of this morning we’re about 82% of the way there. **[Can you make a contribution today to help power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230131-1?refcode=EMAF31_1_ONE_20230131_V1_F&refcode2=16888_3422442_WVm0tJ&akid=16888%2E3422442%2EWVm0tJ)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230131-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF31_1_ONE_20230131_V1_F&refcode2=16888_3422442_WVm0tJ&akid=16888%2E3422442%2EWVm0tJ)**
I’m so appreciative of your support.
Katie
**[Become an official endorser ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-endorse/?source=EMAF31_1_ONE_20230131_V1_F&t=2&akid=16888%2E3422442%2EWVm0tJ)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF31_1_ONE_20230131_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=16888_3422442_WVm0tJ&akid=16888%2E3422442%2EWVm0tJ)**

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: Wisconsin is still a battleground state.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leading the PAC
body:
#
All eyes are on Wisconsin this cycle. Wisconsin has proven to be a battleground state, a _critical_ win for all campaigns — Democrat and Republican, Presidency and Senate — and 2024 will be no different.
Many tough races are on the ballot this cycle, from a Wisconsin Supreme Court seat to Wisconsin’s very own Senator, Tammy Baldwin. These races will not only determine party control across the state and the country, but determine the state of our fundamental Democratic rights — from abortion access to voting rights.
Time and time again, the Democratic Party of Wisconsin has held an influential role in pivotal campaigns across the state by making early investments and building coalitions of supporters. They have changed the course of many campaigns. But they can't do it alone.
[**So I am asking: Can you please split a donation between the Wisconsin Democratic Party and Leading the PAC? Every donation will help defend Wisconsin's Senate seat and elect Democrats up and down the ballot across the state.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.g8r_p-&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=1&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/2924?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.2oHFdI&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=20&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.ahNuPY&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=21&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.FI6ljX&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=22&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.oI6UUK&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=23&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.HQO1CG&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=24&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.g8r_p-&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=25&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
I learned last year how much is needed to run a successful Senate campaign, and it starts with the groundwork — building campaign infrastructure, getting organizers on the ground, and mobilizing voters through get out the vote initiatives.
That’s exactly what the Democratic Party of Wisconsin does. They have been key to winning votes in Wisconsin, and next year they will be key in re-electing Senator Baldwin.
There is so much at stake. So we can't wait until next year, we must do all we can to defend this seat early on.
[**So please, will you split a contribution between the Democratic Party of Wisconsin and Leading the PAC? Every donation will help us defend Tammy’s seat and Democrats across Wisconsin.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.g8r_p-&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=26&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
Thank you in advance for your contribution.
Mandela
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=leading-the-pac-dpw-split.g8r_p-&refcode=em230131-1-vsp&t=27&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=4117%2E196590%2E9dly3v)
Paid for by Leading the PAC
P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201

Claim your 3X match by becoming an LCV member for just $5 today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)
Peter -- there's a critical fundraising deadline at midnight tonight. If we fall short, _it 'll mean scaling back major environmental campaigns in the coming days and weeks.___

**We can 't afford to miss this goal.** Not when House Republicans are leading an assault on public lands and clean energy. Not when the Biden administration is making final decisions on key environmental reforms. Not when so many pro-environment judges and other nominees are awaiting a vote in the Senate.

****We _need_ to keep our campaigns going. We need as many LCV members as possible to join our campaign for climate action, clean energy, and environmental justice. **** ****_****_

Our annual Membership Drive determines how big we can go and how hard we can fight each year -- and it ends at midnight tonight. So we're asking: [Become an LCV member for just $5 today. Don't miss this chance to make 3X the impact >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)

| | **
** **_MIDNIGHT DEADLINE:_
League of Conservation Voters
2023 Membership Drive **

Supporter Record: Peter Willis
Match Status: [_TRIPLE MATCH ACTIVE_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_3LmM-)

Deadline: January 31, 2023
Fundraising Goal: $35,000

**Member Status:**[Claim your LCV membership today -- it only costs $5 right now](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrMW_3LmM-)**** |
---|---|---

The January Membership Drive is one of the most important campaigns of the year for LCV -- it's when we bring in the bulk of our funding to keep our work running for the first half of the year. Here are just a few reasons why your contribution is so critical right now:
* **Because we 're keeping up the pressure to make sure that the commitments made in the Inflation Reduction Act are met.** This includes ensuring that Congress provides the necessary appropriations to federal agencies that will implement the climate, cost-saving, jobs, and health benefits unlocked by the law. [We must see this historic legislation through, and we need your help to make that happen >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)
* **Because we 're calling on the Biden-Harris administration to exercise its full executive authority to protect the environment, our health, and the climate. **In doing so, the administration can stop future drilling on public lands, force dirty power plants to clean up, ensure more cars and trucks are electric, and accelerate deployment of clean renewable energy sources. But that's only going to happen if the environmental movement organizes and speaks out. [Power our response: pitch in to protect public lands >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)
* **Because we 're pushing for confirmation of key executive branch vacancies. **Agencies such as the EPA and Federal Energy Regulatory Commission protect the environment and public health, deliver environmental justice, and advance clean renewable energy and climate action: [This is how we get climate action done, but we need support from the environmental movement to back us >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)
* **Because your membership goes three times further right now.** A group of donors is triple matching every contribution through the end of the month. Your support will make triple the impact to ensure that we can accomplish all of our congressional priorities for this year: from implementing the historic pro-climate investments from the Inflation Reduction Act to supporting the environmental justice movement.****[Donate now and your contribution will go even further >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)
* **Because membership is only $5 right now.** Environmental justice issues impact every single one of us: everyone deserves access to clean air, clean water, and a safe climate protected by a just and equitable democracy. [Help us build a sustainable future: any amount will help >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)

The best thing you can do right now to help is to [become an LCV member for just $5 today. For a limited time, a group of generous donors will TRIPLE every gift to jumpstart our campaign.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_ywTdz~)

Thanks for all the work you do. We promise to never stop fighting for our environment.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---
**[**JOIN FOR JUST $5 TODAY**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9144060&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDczMTM3MwS2&spReportId=MTY2MDczMTM3MwS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9144060&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY2MDczMTM3MwS2&spReportId=MTY2MDczMTM3MwS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

body:
| | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=70287e9220&e=fdefed58de)
---
Peter - Just sending a reminder that tonight marks our January **end of month deadline**.

The radical left is not slowing down and we can’t either.

So if you haven't yet, [**please pitch in a quick donation.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=20c64ff42b&e=fdefed58de)
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=730ec8f096&e=fdefed58de)
Our last election came down to the wire – **we only won by 546 votes.**

We can’t risk losing another seat to Hakeem Jeffries and the radicals.

The **stakes couldn't be higher** for our country -- please help us stay ahead by [chipping in before midnight tonight.](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=5bf95302d8&e=fdefed58de)

God Bless,
Lauren Boebert

clean_body: | | | | | Peter - Just sending a reminder that tonight marks our January end of month deadline. The radical left is not slowing down and we can’t either. So if you haven't yet, Our last election came down to the wire – we only won by 546 votes. We can’t risk losing another seat to Hakeem Jeffries and the radicals. The stakes couldn't be higher for our country -- please help us stay ahead by God Bless, Lauren Boebert | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2023 American Conservatives United. All rights reserved.

name: Losing the Senate (VPP)
subject: running out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
will you step up to save the Senate?

Hi friends,

JD Vance here. I’m reaching out to tell you that I am proud to endorse my friend Jim Banks, who recently announced his run for the United State Senate in Indiana. Here is why he has my full support ⤵️

Jim knows what it means to fight for the people of this great nation. He served our country in Afghanistan with the U.S. Navy Reserve. Now, he continues to fight for us each day as one of the staunchest advocates for our conservative values in the House of Representatives. His ongoing commitment to defending American freedom speaks for itself. Jim walks the walk.

I can assure you that Jim is not one of those “big mouth” Republicans who say a lot but don’t do much. He has been one of the most active and dedicated conservative members of Congress in the past few years, and he will continue to be in the U.S. Senate. Jim gets things done.

I can tell you first hand, we need more conservatives who fight for the people and our values in the Senate. That’s why I encourage you to support Jim’s campaign, ensure he is elected, and help flip the Senate with a strong conservative majority in 2024.
| [ **SUPPORT JIM BANKS** ](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=b57b92943ca04d8391bae51ed0e12dcc&_e=f6VxDbdr0J8G9KDPHxqvxuf6oxrWenRun0ovOCxWge6GsouWncI5w8pBG6fknEKEbB_rsrzpEf0UqHZqNYUJHrT743SCYK9riohRKzb4MeIPQnr1lqukUEGnnWq5w8Hw790OFHqYgjuRc3Rn0ydBGQrqc1_-WHKwulnbDjBl0PeO3VW2xISVuyGAtiT68lY1yUSxLxb1TCnidzjuxqP0C_zyerKBSgWrM26wUADCYI-YGGkHJy4r1FyLDkjAeqPxY1TwmNnUPvIa9fdAthbb-GbSvsb5u6m-ExhO9kCbsmkM0-2Csz2_qapnpNrUJEyxGgIl1h-8Wn68BM0VMoE2C4ll7wQ0iGaZHn1PLyryPIz414yNubmBLEIMZNedOFzO3wV7rghzPk_6eg7XU3DxIAEyD4jr1BNfO7LZnr08HbOMUiRnQQHfnaxnaVup-_BgYqjybqL-v3pOJRB-BvxgFjRwSIwL5sMQ7Gf6_7cmJkcFvMPG_KybCCZ5AktZ1Zne88v-E7PdJcILDYRhL9kCRxdNGSXpv0PqkWflbMBy0aE%3D)

Just wanted to bump my team’s email before tonight’s midnight fundraising deadline. As a lifelong North Carolinian, it is the honor of my life to represent North Carolina’s 4th District. I’ve been off to a strong start this year in Congress and we’ve already accomplished so much together.
I led the fight on Capitol Hill to keep our party aligned with the ideals, principles, and expectations of the American people and now we’re getting serious work done.
**But now I face the first major test as we near the first fundraising deadline of the year and I’m short by over $4,200 with only one day left.**

There’s so much more to be accomplished in the coming months as we begin to **investigate, expose, and seek justice for Biden family corruption and cut the waste** in our inflated government.

We made our demands clear when we took back control of the House and couldn’t have gotten so much good done without the support of millions of patriots like you.

**Now we need to keep up the momentum as we begin our fight to drain the swamp in Washington and put the interests of our country and the American people FIRST again.**

name: Chris Murphy
subject: re: my announcement yesterday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
body:
I wanted to reach out once more to ask for your support.

Friends -
I wanted to reach out once more to ask for your support. Please give me a chance to explain why your contribution today is so important.
Yesterday, I announced that I’m running for re-election.
One of our biggest strategic imperatives right now is to show that our campaign has significant grassroots support. We don’t want to leave any room for Senate Republicans or the gun lobby to think that I’m vulnerable and put this seat in play for 2024. That’s why we’re trying to post a big number right at the start of this campaign.
And unlike a lot of my colleagues, I really try to raise money the right way — 100% from people and not a dime of PAC money. I also limit my time at fundraising events and don’t spend all day calling billionaires to fund my campaign. My job is to focus on the work you elected me to do.
Instead, my campaign relies on lots and lots of grassroots donations from people like you. Every Senate campaign is expensive. There’s no way around it, but doing this the right way makes elected officials and our party more responsive to the people.
If you are with me and agree that this is the way we should run our campaigns, [**then please consider making a donation of whatever you can afford on week one of my re-election. Whether it’s $3, $6, or more, it makes a difference.**](https://act.chrismurphy.com/go/380?c0=csm-em-jan23.BPVh8l&refcode=em230131-2-vsp-mkre&t=1&akid=779%2E1711221%2E5WPjl1)
In my first Senate race, we defeated a self-funding billionaire who spent tens of millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. I know that we cannot get complacent or take anything for granted.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy

Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact info, [click here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/signup/update-contact-info/?t=3&akid=779%2E1711221%2E5WPjl1). We try to send only the most important info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.chrismurphy.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=779%2E1711221%2E5WPjl1). If you would like to support Senator Murphy's fight for our shared values, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/csm-web?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=779_1711221_5WPjl1&akid=779%2E1711221%2E5WPjl1) today.
clean_body: I wanted to reach out once more to ask for your support. Friends - I wanted to reach out once more to ask for your support. Please give me a chance to explain why your contribution today is so important. Yesterday, I announced that I’m running for re-election. One of our biggest strategic imperatives right now is to show that our campaign has significant grassroots support. We don’t want to leave any room for Senate Republicans or the gun lobby to think that I’m vulnerable and put this seat in play for 2024. That’s why we’re trying to post a big number right at the start of this campaign. And unlike a lot of my colleagues, I really try to raise money the right way — 100% from people and not a dime of PAC money. I also limit my time at fundraising events and don’t spend all day calling billionaires to fund my campaign. My job is to focus on the work you elected me to do. Instead, my campaign relies on lots and lots of grassroots donations from people like you. Every Senate campaign is expensive. There’s no way around it, but doing this the right way makes elected officials and our party more responsive to the people. If you are with me and agree that this is the way we should run our campaigns, In my first Senate race, we defeated a self-funding billionaire who spent tens of millions of dollars to try to buy this seat. I know that we cannot get complacent or take anything for granted. Every best wish, Chris Murphy Paid for by Friends of Chris Murphy
