subject: We need your voice to stop MVP!
body:
2 important comment periods are closing soon - submit today! | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/8HToISgnFTOc8o1RQ8FP12MH4E6Sf6vQJvE_ojio4Yj6cBoP2vcn6KEpSm74SwRHohHAX8g5ATnPCv71yIyljYKEL7y4fDqHaI8IztpoOKrdO9ubOgFe5BwtfSC4GGsWDqFj6he_AwoTTmvNMu4dpnKh5SqjEGx7NBeGTcA1nVmDW9QlXoKMGJN3HBz7OmZsohdj-TgeZqxYNQtddvP7GoI9IkT9ppNRwZcS9AxaLY1uxEknp1EI1KUIUXkzcfifphRKY1ds00B5UyjqoPLQUQ/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h0/7E0M07hxtAKMVANHKRBHAqWennOPYukG8SAehmKeVgY)
---
|
---
Your Voice Matters! **** We need your help to stop the MVP. Your voice is the most powerful weapon we can use to defeat this Black Snake. There are two open comment periods that close in February. **** The MVP is about 56% completed according to a December report filed with the Federal Energy Regulatory Committee with pipe installed along 84% of the route. The pipe has not been installed along the steepest parts of the route, which includes Jefferson National Forest. Protecting the forest could continue to stop the MVP in its tracks! Read more updates here on the [POWHR blog](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/1XQbiUZqIgkFRQxQopJGKWxQTf1E0VhcuRNDN3TD1SvwoawKQU4BIS3C0YwRnzU7XnZb_kLkhMl_lpmpBOLeVKJ9MehBtpvkgXpbq6noOKfIGh4btRWRtwDRsLvEdTOUMqHhfQVYnE7SvVOzVWVPwFoxceace0Vybs6FuSSOpzTGj9ULUNU55xix7LfT1v4hHF8ZGLPZmNeXXtmE4m9mE7M3Vvlz7bsDTDAax_4S64Q2r36kf7Lki4A1VIFSABsLIEHer4N5n4b-bgI1dZrwJw/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h1/xmCuVzcMsZbEqdFuICbt9Fofctf1rSYbksie_WZVymw).
---
|
---
_Take Action!_
---
**1\. Submit a comment to the Forest Service** The United States Forest Service (USFS) Environmental Impact Statement comment period closes on February 6th. Although the Fourth Circuit Court has thrown out the MVP’s permits from USFS and Bureau of Land Management (BLM) to cross Jefferson National Forest, we need public outcry to reiterate the dangers that the MVP poses to ecosystems along its path. Your input could help prevent new permits from being issued later this year. **Submit your comment to the USFS[ here](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQiNE3BsJu4B28WdDlt5fhGdrIcmfBCLf60TKFQRV08zzl0AVLwPUR9VD7idkGW5C6o3Z0CMXWBFh6p63P2vYIuwyLo6dJKCTPf3eY16uS8TJus4CFeWVsQ5Zl_lsOaeHcbO9853H7_4X6IzgCoyJBG3Nch-qdYDrpx95S9mXMY8GTyE3BfCupMQ2s0EA3dP_T-1Kr71PHWjwHmRv03VB8VBxIHMHbdfQRtOczzL3qQdILIUfLw5vOG7f-k3lbTzyB2SU936rygEYJpjzN5qGDqUuMmFwq2wBglmLct27wCBf/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h2/CdBFs8-p7EU24UmDHIPByz22lMytwPYEZwc3Kkpm1sE).**
---
[ SUBMIT COMMENT ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQiNE3BsJu4B28WdDlt5fhGdrIcmfBCLf60TKFQRV08zzl0AVLwPUR9VD7idkGW5C6omIUzbYY-eL5ziYzMod1paRh5pIbX2y5jkpgRV7UFpnnZHGU9beQ5Fij4SmSEccbxyVZxu-SzTcJsBDCU8kDeiCGISuI51pLHe9i4d-QiFeckvCCHvQQEu49-dlf-CqVSy-qbE8brBXF1Fvyt5nhdL8Lzbpjx7Uw9pscyhu77iglXUaq85BrdeDNVJ4DiOzB0qK4evQsGBDFdPxN7ZducUfQORyTjfWaaXQGhkXhX8_/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h3/5g_O2RSr6dNtJqO5mqdj_viRQKwbJDsV-2zNCU__9GQ)
---
**2\. Submit a comment to the Army Corps of Engineers** The Army Corps of Engineers comment period ends on February 10th. The MVP needs a 404 or Clean Water Act permit from the Army Corps to complete water crossings along its path. We want to protect water from guaranteed pollution. The MVP will not only pollute waterways, it will disrupt tourism, and threaten endangered species. You do not have to live in MVP directly impacted areas to make comments. This is to prevent future pipelines from being allowed to complete the same process and to make sure federal agencies are upholding their obligations to the public’s best interest, not corporate best interest. **Submit a comment to the Army Corps of Engineers directly by emailing Mr. Adam Fannin by email at CELRP-MVP@usace.army.mil with subject line: Public Notice: LRH-2015-00592-GBR, LRP-2015-798, NAO-2015-0898.** **You can also submit a comment through[ Appalachian Voices](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhUoiIE5xB6pXnxG6m1_Hi-Hlc4lPDV5RAEZOqLvmAANUKiExlt7rZRSplSNZ-tjFvug3R3EHtKNoRk22xbNMDHfeC36YTiDS4fF9JJ26S7w7hoxn9tGKI-MI7uI-BStcLBWfuOtoucOJ95QUsE4VMyqFj5wUKw7d1Ym0mhaNselEjJ5vUYDmUZ4RVyX2Ge0xeuWDgLGP8TS8bZ8pgNb862PfVLYQnjlu0R3hcnwGApiBq6m2sd96cMxuM6m1U8O8bCIQGj25didvYtkfmpoNta7gnMGL9EBNRuDlef2AV_VegO8gK7C4cuhtflWimecuv63ws9WAeuXhoXUK2lciFQ9hCwg80wl7BUJ_fXorI6z2rFULFZsI1yZ5uaeVTh6MUugH5BDa0UtAXaznw9nyprIPPbkPJgIpe-lXjYOe3QfnY1KmzkkU6izdEnfAdMfd0ZayHhKsJpbSvExcaPuEbfop5cSDM5PlJvVwoWb4Q37AjSf9JLXPPCEe_FSxcPbQttYW33brp9iqs43CtMATdUw/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h4/XBAcUXA9L0M7khkoAUFUFqjtoOYBOFtrxy7n0NT6bjY) or [NDRC](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXTBAb6zPaB9OcGRCvJj4mdgsI6eM73A2cjfnUR9W1bDJf8MhiXTQV2dPOGhOQ2mKMjhVv7w-brfJa3bSRzTlr1UEIfKats7A3Qewtvfkrx2a3hGeExydUg6kzrlb8forithLrhGjRZxAamkZucCA0X91NBpv0QXpstrWuteSRv0BF8p72cdcJxN_SpsDF-4Ja3gzVb8u8kDi0Bi7M4L45on3UfBaRngugT08YGqvlJAq_5nz5IDJQN3WitIG5nTMv3sq-eWS4kbGV-nT8ZGrAzVeqSKI5FGpWkyXKq_xUBXgrooiKOcON7Upy-gOWkMXak7TqT9uAOnu44FL-ZKz2k2-GXDGc5sTpP0KDo9KuyBK1L7rARQYFNBE8ElFgfhF4gcRJi2efGQ60uyETXKk03I/3tb/dUJp-7l3S760JZGJn8BWUw/h5/tD8HBQPQ2y5e-EYT9oaC96pASWsqgaq4vhGWC9QzIe4).**

clean_body: 2 important comment periods are closing soon - submit today! | | | Your Voice Matters! ** We need your help to stop the MVP. Your voice is the most powerful weapon we can use to defeat this Black Snake. There are two open comment periods that close in February. The MVP is about 56% completed according to a December report filed with the Federal Energy Regulatory Committee with pipe installed along 84% of the route. The pipe has not been installed along the steepest parts of the route, which includes Jefferson National Forest. Protecting the forest could continue to stop the MVP in its tracks! Read more updates here on the . | Take Action! 1\. Submit a comment to the Forest Service The United States Forest Service (USFS) Environmental Impact Statement comment period closes on February 6th. Although the Fourth Circuit Court has thrown out the MVP’s permits from USFS and Bureau of Land Management (BLM) to cross Jefferson National Forest, we need public outcry to reiterate the dangers that the MVP poses to ecosystems along its path. Your input could help prevent new permits from being issued later this year. Submit your comment to the USFS. 2\. Submit a comment to the Army Corps of Engineers The Army Corps of Engineers comment period ends on February 10th. The MVP needs a 404 or Clean Water Act permit from the Army Corps to complete water crossings along its path. We want to protect water from guaranteed pollution. The MVP will not only pollute waterways, it will disrupt tourism, and threaten endangered species. You do not have to live in MVP directly impacted areas to make comments. This is to prevent future pipelines from being allowed to complete the same process and to make sure federal agencies are upholding their obligations to the public’s best interest, not corporate best interest. Submit a comment to the Army Corps of Engineers directly by emailing Mr. Adam Fannin by email at CELRP-MVP@usace.army.mil with subject line: Public Notice: LRH-2015-00592-GBR, LRP-2015-798, NAO-2015-0898. You can also submit a comment through or .** | | Do you need help writing your comment? Attend a comment writing party this week! CCAN: February 1st at 6:30 PM ET West Virginia Rivers: Bila:huk, 7 Directions of Service | | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from 7 Directions of Service, please .

body:
I’m asking for support for two specific reasons.
Peter — I’m up crunching the numbers, and I have your final progress-to-goal update ahead of tonight’s deadline: We are just about $95 away from hitting our $10,000 January goal! That means if 19 people reading this pitch in just $5 bucks, we’ll cross the finish line before midnight. You can go here to help us get it done now:
[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-Deadline**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58095854/390007169/-2016255648?refcode=E20167-20230131-DeadlineEOM-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2YyOWI5MS1jMGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HRV4L1dfCtw7IZXiLVayyZlLXkzSPCzfmEQk9Fbces=)
I’m asking for support for two specific reasons. First, we need to be able to get our campaign operation up and running again in Vermont. Opening field offices by this summer, hiring staff, and investing in a digital team will help us spread our message and keep our campaign on track.
Second, we need to be able to fight back against GOP attacks on me and the policies we’re fighting for in Congress. Unfortunately, as a proud progressive and openly-LGBTQ woman serving in Congress, extra scrutiny and political attacks are all a part of my new reality.
I’ve never taken your support for granted, and I’m honored to have you with me in this fight. I know that our grassroots movement has the strength and scrappiness needed to overcome whatever the GOP may throw our way in the weeks and months ahead, and hitting our goal will help us be as prepared as possible.
It would mean the world to me to see a small contribution come in from you before our first big FEC deadline of 2023. Here’s the link to give:
[_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BBVT-AL-Email-Jan2023-Deadline**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58095855/390007170/-2016255648?refcode=E20167-20230131-DeadlineEOM-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2YyOWI5MS1jMGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6HRV4L1dfCtw7IZXiLVayyZlLXkzSPCzfmEQk9Fbces=)
In gratitude,
Becca B.

name: Pennsylvania Update (via DLCC)
body:
In ONE WEEK, Democrats have a chance to solidify our margins in the Pennsylvania House | | |
---
| | [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLv40GcQr5QNxgnHXd0dGMOi8MtHAn6TuJyQrGyxqOfLhrcHEALjj0njXOI7v7eh3UD_l8gZ1kuob0DheDAC7kqqW8rnKG2fmWkyHZ7_1YxK8MqpTCDfAvMM7nNPOmUwuRqxnp_8NEgcpo88k5EY0syLhecDni18KBePdAQX1YQVuZ0q5s-dka7a4XnvkwCwCZSbiEX9a6uNPtUPMC4N5mE6fujqg4K4SwufkHxJDLRVFhyQgw3k2mJfOe34BYCTUExWA4r5NglN50qNzIxi-NEZr2t7jEdZxdarg8qUqVaLKc6Tu-l2a58GHOd3Qz2wZAraBJOFRIwZvNIJpnjiw6-_kYJWe016fIza9JHXRq0Dc/3tb/FzxWvfa8QH-p7Kgy9TQGYQ/h0/LU2igPwdd0qsUJZU1fqu4oaHw-Z-5ArfRkkj_2ugvsc) **In ONE WEEK, Democrats have THREE make-or-break elections in the Pennsylvania House.** If we lose a single one of these, Republicans will have free reign to pass extremist, anti-choice, anti-democracy legislation. [ Chip in $7](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLv40GcQr5QNxgnHXd0dGMOi8MtHAn6TuJyQrGyxqOfLhrcHEALjj0njXOI7v7eh3UD_l8gZ1kuob0DheDAC7kqqW8rnKG2fmWkyHZ7_1YxK8MqpTCDfAvMM7nNPOmUwuRqxnp_8NEgcpo88k5EY0syLhecDni18KBePdAQX1YQVseAhwUBvgipOkcKOvXMmt6Hfb0VtK2jwObOSdOcwHf8e8keZOTs9MxyaLPJfAmgarAMFfR4Mq_8d0RQyi-WnsoR853jScRlJlIsTYvHgGqfXutCalNfBrSVybzu2a-6L2om0Myo5XKqFPV3VHflk4tVkZGwQhoZpSBFdUePiVz4-TUPuLt0D8At4fangRICdg/3tb/FzxWvfa8QH-p7Kgy9TQGYQ/h1/PPu9lPSYDkD6uPualR7XZnAjGL7aL5b8pU-2_SYLSAo) **(worth 3X more today!) to help Democrats win. Need more convincing? No problem – here’s what we’re up against in Pennsylvania:**
* In House District 32, this previously Democratic-held seat is being contested by an **anti-choice, anti-LGBTQ+ Republican.**

* In House Districts 34 and 35, our Democrats won – but also won elections for the U.S. House and Lieutenant Governor. This created vacancies Republicans are eager to fill.

* In HD-35, **we’re up against an anti-abortion, pro-gun extremist** who’s been seen rubbing shoulders with known insurrectionist Doug Mastriano.

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely, MUST win next Tuesday to ensure that these Republican extremists are kept out of office and that Pennsylvania Democrats can get to work fighting for working families. **Unfortunately, these special elections are even _more_ expensive than anticipated because they could determine continued control of this key chamber – Republicans are pouring money into these races. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87b14fcae9094299ab91f6ef47b6c0db&_e=-qhDw6g0dK3sJ8a-XDEkVqb2r44IcxQ_4tS2f0TBMjIlZB07YjpVmjtJlBtDD5-Zna9b4M_KJBQ5kVPoetS4jtgCer4ZYE1MOFpETEwKSdtDoBOg4cugaxPjbnd5v1dHGFZZRgZufZTIhlxi5jMczig-_NQV9ZYyCv66v1-W3_2sCyyrlgjO7dalfpslmKg-jlBoDADYseJOESdPk8Pl_Nmmdxb4HvK_bv354kALfYxmzK6oLMi-XDOirHCcrWm15KmS61E8h1bxZCEfMvpj9oK0V2ca6kTDHrYKYvHd7wwcUABsJp-KHdRtr3ABVaIO6fkpQ5vtyfRSKGsrEHBXU2G_NxvQJv_1-l8uQvUo_i_w_TSCt5tO_X9H7UldEVY_vFFV5aBWUz7_zbU8hsWFFA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87b14fcae9094299ab91f6ef47b6c0db&_e=-qhDw6g0dK3sJ8a-XDEkVqb2r44IcxQ_4tS2f0TBMjIlZB07YjpVmjtJlBtDD5-Zna9b4M_KJBQ5kVPoetS4jtgCer4ZYE1MOFpETEwKSdtDoBOg4cugaxPjbnd5v1dHGFZZRgZufZTIhlxi5jMczig-_NQV9ZYyCv66v1-W3_2sCyyrlgjO7dalfpslmKg-jlBoDADYseJOESdPk8Pl_Nmmdxb4HvK_bv354kALfYxmzK6oLMi-XDOirHCcrWm1AcC-Kwm8Nr_O67mxhBz51qpEMvCUmhgkyEsXlLRMhhNOWyCaiFC_GLeu8qNG70UOXdRHzTVK0ee3vBYIJBrLOP8ZIXi9r52Bnq6tuaT-e6QFY1mh6FAkNw7EcBhOnNqWwZGk6mVaELfRdZCv9ENzRg%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=87b14fcae9094299ab91f6ef47b6c0db&_e=-qhDw6g0dK3sJ8a-XDEkVqb2r44IcxQ_4tS2f0TBMjIlZB07YjpVmjtJlBtDD5-Zna9b4M_KJBQ5kVPoetS4jtgCer4ZYE1MOFpETEwKSdtDoBOg4cugaxPjbnd5v1dHGFZZRgZufZTIhlxi5jMczig-_NQV9ZYyCv66v1-W3_2sCyyrlgjO7dalfpslmKg-jlBoDADYseJOESdPk8Pl_Nmmdxb4HvK_bv354kALfYxmzK6oLMi-XDOirHCcrWm1L9yXkdzCvTfnivopOK4dqKJrNYzgVISSSgORWrSiqZQt7XDjJh1BEiCZR_6rtnJsnwIql6IIJ4Wpjxi1PsWS5PNc7-LjO3XnnlfMM2goUOH_T5ExcqwbyjDPdNIR59f3lvesLfLGL-hfzKPiutKk-g%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Peter, we’re still trying to figure out what happened.

A couple of days ago, I sent out an email asking for 1,000 supporters to make a donation of any size to activate their 2023 Team James Membership – and the initial response was _overwhelming_ _. _

Hundreds of fearless fighters from every corner of our nation answered my call for action – but right as we neared our goal, donations stopped. **Now, we’re looking at a 138-donor shortfall that we need to make up before 11:59 p.m. tonight. **

**Peter, I’ll never waver in my fight for progress, but with you on my team, we can accomplish _so much __more_ together. So with reproductive rights and many other fundamental rights still being threatened, I’m asking you to _please_****recommit yourself to our fight for progress. **

[**If you’re ready to activate your 2023 Team James Membership, please donate any amount before the membership period ends at 11:59 p.m. tonight!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58078180/389964814/-1577261820?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk950-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDI5NWQ3My05OWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1FJdpbFHkRPg4a4zuOK763tv6OOW-FKin3Dwof0SjMA=)

clean_body: | | | = Peter, we’re still trying to figure out what happened. A couple of days ago, I sent out an email asking for 1,000 supporters to make a donation of any size to activate their 2023 Team James Membership – and the initial response was overwhelming . Hundreds of fearless fighters from every corner of our nation answered my call for action – but right as we neared our goal, donations stopped. Now, we’re looking at a 138-donor shortfall that we need to make up before 11:59 p.m. tonight. Peter, I’ll never waver in my fight for progress, but with you on my team, we can accomplish so much more together. So with reproductive rights and many other fundamental rights still being threatened, I’m asking you to pleaserecommit yourself to our fight for progress. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for being such a loyal member of this team. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

**I 'm thrilled to share with you that I am endorsing Donald J. Trump for President in 2024. **

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
#

Peter -
I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.
Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going to stand for that.
Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs to name two.
Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.
The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht, the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.
As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.
I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:
[**Can you make your first contribution to my United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so important.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan23.ZeANVi&refcode=em230131-1-nor&t=1&akid=325%2E734936%2EhEb5Hm)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do yet, either.
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: We set the standard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Because this is the first end-of-month deadline of 2023, it is critically important to reach, and better yet surpass, our goal. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58096769/390015194/-463433878?refcode=230131-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmFlOTIzYi1jNWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KaOVT7QHJ2kNol69AzZF6lnDevljZgs8LQorjwLiI7U=) Peter – Because this is the first end-of-month deadline of 2023, it is critically important to reach our goal. **Martha Beck, American author and life coach, is credited with saying “how you do one thing is how you do everything.” ** How we approach this goal sets the tone for the entire year. Sitting back and letting the deadline pass us by is _not an option_. That is not how we ran this campaign last year, and it is not how I serve this community in Congress. We have to be proactive, and we all have to do our part. body:
Hey team — Sorry for all the emails these last couple days, but I just got an update from my team and we’re less than a $1,000 away from our goal before midnight tonight.
Hey team — Sorry for all the emails these last couple days, but I just got an update from my team and we’re less than $1,000 away from our goal before midnight tonight.
I’m proud to run a grassroots campaign, because this campaign is for working people everywhere. And that’s what it’s going to take in order to kick the MAGA-right out of the House majority.
There’s one thing last week’s action has proven: _Kevin McCarthy is willing to break with precedent in order to appease Trump and his cronies. The Speaker has been hijacked by the MAGA mob, and all bets are off with what they’ll do next._
What does this all mean? Well, it means that we’ve got to fight even harder against their corruption at every step, and take back the House in 2024.
So, team, can you chip in $15 or whatever you can afford right now to help us hit our goal before midnight tonight? These funds will do so much to fuel our campaign in the lead-up to the presidential election.
You can use my personal ActBlue link below so that I can see your donation come through:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Jan2023-FR-January?refcode=EricPersonal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58096949/390016810/-1947088922?refcode=E20165-20230131-Deadline2-SL-DeadlineEOM-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWVlYzQ3My1jNWExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEtRLK46GC4smqgXh_FHrZCRLa7TewUTu8JlA-K2PtM=)
Thanks for your help,
Eric

So, team, can you chip in $15 or whatever you can afford right now to help us hit our goal before midnight tonight? These funds will do so much to fuel our campaign in the lead-up to the presidential election. You can use my personal ActBlue link below so that I can see your donation come through: = Thanks for your help, Eric Sent from my iPhone Paid for by Swalwell For Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . Swalwell For Congress P.O. Box 2847 Dublin, CA 94568 United States

It’s been three weeks since Katie announced she’s running to represent California in the U.S. Senate! Our early fundraising is some of our most critical, and today marks our first end of month deadline. So we have a quick ask: **[Can you join Team Porter and become a Founding Donor today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230131-2?refcode=EMAF31_2_DSW_20230131_V1_F&refcode2=16901_3422442_IIgZG1&akid=16901%2E3422442%2EIIgZG1)**

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF31_2_DSW_20230131_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=16901_3422442_IIgZG1&akid=16901%2E3422442%2EIIgZG1)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I’m running for Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down. I’m going to change that.

| Peter -

I wanted you to hear it directly from me: I’m going to be challenging Kyrsten Sinema and running for the United States Senate in Arizona.

If that’s all you need to hear, I am asking you to become a Day One, Founding Donor to our historic campaign. The amount of the donation is not nearly as important as the number of people contributing today. Use this link to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gallego**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58079497/389968894/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230131-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiZTRjY2FjLTljYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OzDJMYU7pWsK3zHUnohspxhBb64-zRha4egopfms1rE=)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58079498/389968895/1783009624?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230131-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiZTRjY2FjLTljYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OzDJMYU7pWsK3zHUnohspxhBb64-zRha4egopfms1rE=)
---
Here is the truth: The rich and the powerful don’t need more advocates in the Senate. It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

For too long, Senator Sinema has used her position of power to help those who already have it all. She has stood in the way of raising the minimum wage, protecting voting rights, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and more.

Now, we can argue about different ways to do the job as a United States Senator, but at the core of it all, if you are more likely to be meeting and helping the powerful than the powerless, you are doing this job wrong.

I am sorry that politicians like Senator Sinema have let you down.

I am going to change that.

But in order to win this race against Senator Sinema and whoever the Republicans nominate, it’s going to take a historic grassroots effort. From day one. And that is why I am asking:

[_**Can you please split a $5 contribution between my campaign and Fight for Progress to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for U.S. Senate today? It all adds up when we’re all chipping in, and that’s how we’ll win this race. Together.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58079499/389968896/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230131-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJiZTRjY2FjLTljYTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OzDJMYU7pWsK3zHUnohspxhBb64-zRha4egopfms1rE=)

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Before tonight's deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York
body:
Dan Goldman for New York [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94087/images/dsg_logo.png]
Peter,

I am getting ready to meet President Biden in New York City to discuss infrastructure money that he delivered for the City, but I wanted to reach out one last time before tonight’s end-of-month deadline — the first monthly fundraising target we’re facing since getting to Congress.

From holding George Santos accountable for his scheme to defraud voters, to introducing legislation to invest $32 billion for repairs at NYCHA developments across New York; from working to increase mental health care access to underserved communities to eliminating special interests from politics — we’re moving full steam ahead to deliver for New Yorkers and defend our democracy.

Your support — particularly early support – makes it possible for me and my team to lead these fights, take on Republican leadership, and focus relentlessly on the work ahead of us in Washington and in NY-10. That’s why chipping in now is so important.

Tonight at midnight, we’ll be closing the books on this month’s fundraising. To show the strength of the movement behind our work — and to power the fights ahead in the coming weeks and months — please add a donation of any amount to help us meet this month’s fundraising goal. I’m grateful for whatever you can give.

Here’s a personal link: actblue.com/donate/dsg_em_jan23?dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsg_em_jan23]

Thank you.

Dan

Sent from my iPhone
Dan Goldman for New York
PO Box 3306
New York, NY 10008
dangoldmanforny.com [https://www.dangoldmanforny.com/] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com]

I’m grateful for whatever you can give. Here’s a personal link: actblue.com/donate/dsgemjan23?dpwillis67@gmail.com [] Thank you. Dan Sent from my iPhone Dan Goldman for New York PO Box 3306 New York, NY 10008 dangoldmanforny.com [] | info@dangoldmanforny.com [info@dangoldmanforny.com] Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

In our race and across Michigan, we saw that early investment means big wins on Election Day. Your early investment in our campaign will help us lay the groundwork for what we know will be another competitive race in 2024.

Thanks to redistricting, our district will remain competitive for the entire decade. And with the next race lining up with a presidential campaign in our swing state, we know National Republicans will pour money into Michigan to flip it red. But we can keep Michigan blue in 2024 (and flip the House!) with your support.

Claim your spot as a founding member of Team Kildee 2023 by chipping in $15 or any amount at the link below:

Thank you so much,
Dan

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. subject: Redistricting work is democracy work.

Last Fall, election deniers attempted to jeopardize our democracy by pushing their anti-democratic agenda to weaken our election infrastructures and deny voters the opportunity for fair representation. Sadly, these threats persist as state lawmakers across the country consider voting changes that disenfranchise people’s voting power.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58097182/390023067/39773360?refcode=20230131_AOTL_F_DemocracyWork_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMmUxZjhjLWM3YTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qCqucAX_xU_1_wSpwAC2IWxkqNCfveY18v492frD1lM=)

A.G. Holder and President Obama are right. We can not afford to stand on the sidelines. And if we want our democracy to flourish, we must fight for it. So if you agree with us, let’s take action together. Our voting rights depend on it.
**2023 is another pivotal year for the fate of our democracy.** Conservative lawmakers in places like Ohio, Texas, and Florida want more power over election outcomes. According to the Brennan Center, extremist conservative-led states will continue to fight for restrictive election regulations, including limiting voting access. We didn't accept these anti-democratic agendas last fall and we will not accept them now, team.
And I know we’ve talked a lot about redistricting over the last month. It’s because redistricting and protecting democracy are interconnected. **We know the future of the progress we’ve made relies on fair maps, strong election infrastructure, and equitable voting access – we will not stop fighting until these are guaranteed for voters across the country.**
All On The Line is combating voter suppression across the country so people like you can be heard at the ballot box. Your support will make our democracy work possible in 2023 and beyond. **[Rush a donation of $25, $50, or more today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58097185/390023070/39773360?refcode=20230131_AOTL_F_DemocracyWork_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMxMmUxZjhjLWM3YTEtZWQxMS05OTRjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qCqucAX_xU_1_wSpwAC2IWxkqNCfveY18v492frD1lM=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Appellate Court Affirms DeVore's TRO; Effective Statewide
body:
5th District Appellate Court affirmed Effingham County's TRO against Gov. Pritzker's TRO. The ruling is effective statewide.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/77ff747dc7ee/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-tro-effective-statewide?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: Appellate Court Affirms DeVore’s Equal Protection Argument, Assault Weapons Ban Temporary Restraining Order Effective Statewide (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In a serious blow to Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker’s assault weapons ban, the 5th District Appellate Court affirmed on Tuesday Effingham County’s Temporary Restraining Order (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (TRO), and goes beyond the original 866 plaintiffs in the original lawsuit, and is now binding statewide.

============================================================
** (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-appellate-court-affirms-devores-equal-protection-argument-assault-weapons-ban-temporary-restraining-order-effective-statewide.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The lawsuit is based on alleged violations of the Illinois Constitution. One alleged violation is the Equal Protection Clause, because the Assault Weapons Ban provides exemptions for certain groups – for instance, active and retired law enforcement are exempted from the ban, as well as active military and private security guards.

Retired military, however, much like the general population, are not exempted from the ban. DeVore argues that these exemptions create unconstitutional classes of citizens where legislators have decided who is subject to the ban and who is not.

The Equal Protection argument was enough for the Appellate Court to affirm Effingham County Judge Joshua Morrison’s TRO.

** (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OPDSbUjS4XMgGvfuNIc61KMuLJqa2cPn/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Last ** Wednesday (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-white-county-judge-hears-devores-arguments-during-hearing-on-assault-weapons-ban-no-ruling-yet.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, White County Judge T. Scott Webb heard arguments from representatives of Attorney General Kwame Raoul’s office, and from Tom DeVore, who is representing over 1,600 plaintiffs, including former Illinois State Senator and Republican nominee for governor ** Darren Bailey (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-attorney-tom-devore-darren-bailey-file-another-lawsuit-after-an-effingham-judge-issues-a-temporary-restraining-order-pausing-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
; 68 federal firearms dealers and 92 counties, saying the case is “under advisement” and that he would issue a ruling after further review.

However, this Appellate Court ruling will also bind Judge Webb, and will force him to issue a TRO.

A link to the mandate can be accessed
** here (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1OPDSbUjS4XMgGvfuNIc61KMuLJqa2cPn/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
.

Please continue to follow Illinois Review and
** DeVore Law Offices (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
for more updates as they become available.
** (https://youtu.be/2eTyY9mNe-g?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas joined Roger Stone on The Stone Zone to discuss what the IL GOP is doing in the wake of the November election to turn the party around (Jan. 30, 2023).
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=d628dbb2b5-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_01_31_07_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-d628dbb2b5-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

clean_body: 5th District Appellate Court affirmed Effingham County's TRO against Gov. Pritzker's TRO. The ruling is effective statewide.

name: Josh Harder
subject: the next step in our campaign
body:
I’m reaching out one more time before tonight’s end-of-month deadline because I could really use your help.
Hey team,
I’m reaching out one more time before tonight’s end-of-month deadline because I could really use your help.
You can [make a donation here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58097603/390027226/-1990234082?refcode=E20168-20230131-FinalEOM-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY1YmZiYWYtYzhhMS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO3qbp1kEZZVeaoa_Wcre79C6e1w5aSqHptU1d1zey4=) \- and this is why I need your support:
Right now, my team and I are desperately trying to raise enough money to hire new staff to help us build the grassroots foundation of our campaign. We know we have to start organizing early. Midnight’s deadline is the first big stepping stone to revving up for another incredibly important race.
It’s going to take an enormous team effort to keep this seat blue in 2024, especially if Trump is on the ballot in our purple district. But we have to win if we’re going to take the Speaker’s gavel away from Kevin McCarthy and Marjorie Taylor Greene!
So I’m asking, will you please make a generous donation before tonight’s deadline to help us staff up and take this pivotal next step in our campaign?
I’ll leave my link here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Jan2023-FR-EOM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58097604/390027227/-1990234082?refcode=E20168-20230131-FinalEOM-SL-DeadlineEOM-PlainText-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzY1YmZiYWYtYzhhMS1lZDExLTk5NGMtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KO3qbp1kEZZVeaoa_Wcre79C6e1w5aSqHptU1d1zey4=)
Thank you for helping us get this done!
\- Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
10 N California St
Stockton, CA 95202
United States

50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=4dc3d79e41ef455b89ff82e80bc64d66&_e=nuXMCcsFCpAEWdi2WrMSN5tT_z5gibKG6Nn2BR9UzCaiUA-iQjT0dqC-w3lmDaZmG2ncKCw3fuziEOyzZgvHv653vfXmUdTaguVOLWnBJywOUAGQjsHO5WhiedSG1mKqKrHmUPd0jrAutKP4l0lDSZH1qVaazLbZQBO8yw2Uq5R_ppiFK1PuhL-puwYJ0SDahLV4qSyDXFS92XGzzcVJ1B-QsoOG-uPIEL_6exKw8MwztA0yJjw87QJNyRHWHBM4FvgCm_xxrjcXTsLEGVsyi3Tx2CRLqpRQdBscqq2POd7wFrY9k22hz0_7eR1vLW1jeXmiTX6J_MGHQI7dfJ96GfO9p1r7_vwfdUqV0mSpFPI%3D)

clean_body: we need 1,219 more people from your area to...| | | Friend, We’re looking for 1,219 more people from your area to calling on the General Assembly to impeach former Parole Board Chair Adrianne Bennett. She abused her power and released violent murderers, rapists, and robbers, yet she’s still serving as a judge in Virginia Beach. Make your voice heard. Sign the petition: Thank you, Jason Sent from my iPhone \----------- Forwarded message ----------- From: Jason Subject: Re: epitome of criminals first, victims last To: Friend, My office after investigating the former Parole Board – and our findings were worse than we could have imagined. ✔️ Victims were ignored 83 times.✔️ 137 parolees were discharged back onto the streets.✔️ Hundreds of offenders became eligible for release. And the worst part?She falsified records so murderers could be released. Friend, Ms. Bennett fought for brutal murderers, rapists, and robbers, the very epitome of criminals first, victims last. If the statute of limitations hadn’t expired, Ms. Bennett could be criminally charged with violating court orders and falsifying discharge records. Friend, Adrianne Bennett is currently serving as a judge in Virginia Beach, and it’s up to the General Assembly to impeach her. Thank you for your attention in this matter,Jason Miyares Virginia Attorney General | | | | | | A Personal Note from Jason: 50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream. The Latino Vote Podcast Episode 27, Rocha and Madrid discuss the upcoming primary season, focusing on the California Senate race. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/latinos/thelatinovote-newsletter-new-podcast-episode-27-5855356?e=5bd167f239)

# NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW
---
|
## This week on the Latino Vote podcast, Chuck Rocha and Mike Madrid discuss the upcoming primary season. They focus on the California Senate race, specifically candidates like Dianne Feinstein, Katie Porter, Adam Schiff, and Barbara Lee that are in the running. They also discuss three Congressional districts; 13, 22, and 27, in which Democrat Latinos may be expected to run in.

Friend, this will only take a minute of your time:
Tonight marks our first big fundraising deadline since I officially launched my reelection campaign. **But we're still falling short of our $25,000 end-of-month goal, so I'm counting on your help to close this gap before midnight tonight.**
Republicans only need to win two more seats to deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. And here in New York, they just had their best election cycle in _two decades —_ winning enough seats to deliver the House majority to the GOP. Now, they're zeroing in on my seat to flip the Senate next.
**Missing our first major goal would send a message to McConnell and the GOP that this seat is vulnerable — plus, it would mean starting this campaign at a serious fundraising disadvantage. I don't take any money from corporate PACs, friend, so I can't reach this goal in time without your urgent grassroots support. **

Democrats Serve is a national organization that backs Democrats running for office with frontline public service backgrounds, including first responders, firefighters, social workers, police officers, prosecutors, judges, public defenders, educators, and more.

Democratic candidates with professional experience serving their communities in government have a pragmatic approach to governing and know how to get things done, making for strong narratives and an ability to connect with voters uniquely.

However, when running for office, they often lack access to the professional campaign staff and wealthy donor networks that non-working class candidates do.

| | | | | Peter, **_Your Blue Amp Action "BlueLetter" (Newsletter) Is Here!_** * [Hobby ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T570f6fa5-6e55-4512-8ef1-9164789813bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[Lobby, religious zealots](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teb1263bb-39cf-4234-82ab-8a05a59f844f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) who REFUSED to pay employee birth control (yet, LOVE Trump!) & took the case to the Supreme Court, **[are so freaked out they may leave a MI town! We provide you an explainer--How to get Hobby Lobby to leave](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf80deecf-7fd5-4862-9e6b-5c30fc8bca4f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)! **[https://www.youtube.com/shorts/E81HuABb28E](https://default.salsalabs.org/T325f3bd5-1b8c-4a7b-861b-25ee03bda01d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * [**DISASTER WILL HAPPEN if we bust the debt ceiling**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b981012-e470-4018-a6b8-8cb32e92abe9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)\--per Moody Analytics' Mark Zandi: [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/E8qVhh1T73A](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e276cf7-dd50-48c3-b8b0-37701bf05291/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) * From "The Gist," w/ host Mike Pesca, a podcast featuring a substantial interview each day, news & "the spiel", an audio column. **[Re](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc101fd3b-6248-4d7e-aeac-0217db8afdbe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[cent interview w/ David Cay Johnston](https://default.salsalabs.org/T08fd2fc7-ad0e-4f7c-b527-90bf348d35d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), who vetted ALL Trump's tax returns 2015-2020**. Utterly fascinating. Listen & subscribe! [https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/trump-tax-exposure/id873667927?i=1000596643909](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d2c4633-1fbd-4c28-94b1-91a516ba89db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **Have [you visited our sponsor Dissent Pins yet?? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta37fef4c-1baa-4148-81e2-cb5ddbdd7d2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)Need a ["Mazel Tough" t-shirt? A "No One's Treading On You, Sweetie" sticker or something from their Pride Collection?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3d33357-ded2-4e61-bf3b-79c6de5164ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** **It's all [here at Dissent Pins!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc006ce5-ed4f-40b3-ab6a-892b2bd28f27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** ******************* * In a newly released **video of Trump's deposition to the NY Attorney General's civil fraud investigation, he took the 5th HUNDREDS of times**. Because that's what innocent people--or innocent gobs of humanoid-like orange jello--would do. * Even if you're a Republican nobody's running for President for reasons no-one understands...[when your 5-mos pregnant wife collapses during your speech--STOP & HELP HER!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7f8d36c1-0856-4055-94fe-c7a8ae8da9f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [https://www.youtube.com/shorts/_sfPhUQLSQo](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf2959f80-cdb5-4fcf-8b80-c123986a4c33/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ******************* **PS[: Go shop for gifts or yourself at our new sponsor, Dissent Pins! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta3227140-859a-464e-a7f2-7376eb20262c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)They give half their profits to great causes, which comes out to nearly $1 million since they began!** Also: [Subscribe to the Blue Amp Channel on Youtube!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdf7e38d-ddc2-4ace-a6a3-c27e82f13bf6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)!! [Follow ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td36dab38-792e-4f3b-b39a-3207f4a9430b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[@cliffschecter](?) on Twitter [Follow @cliffschecter on Post](https://default.salsalabs.org/T972506d7-f4a4-4f8c-b254-4fa427fbb27e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thanks! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcfeccc64-7f29-4783-b44e-f635a6318e84/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

The reality is that **we can stop the radical GOP Majority, protect this seat, and take back the House in 2024.**
I’m ready to hit the ground running in February and reaching our end-of-month goal by midnight will help me do just that.

clean_body: | | | = Folks, it’s Susie Lee. Tonight is the deadline for our end-of-month goal which means I’d usually take this moment to reach out and let you know that the finish line is within reach. But this time around is a little different. We still have over $1,000 to raise before midnight tonight and I urgently need each of my supporters to step up. = | | | = | | = Our January end-of-month goal isn’t just a made-up figure. It’s exactly what we need to raise to continue organizing across NV-03 and fight back against the GOP’s far-right agenda in the House. And right now, Kevin McCarthy is doing everything he can to ensure that we’re in as tough of a position just ahead of 2024. Republicans would like nothing more than to flip NV-03 blue and add to their House Majority. The reality is that we can stop the radical GOP Majority, protect this seat, and take back the House in 2024. I’m ready to hit the ground running in February and reaching our end-of-month goal by midnight will help me do just that. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. We're done with the closet.

Peter,
**There's nothing the Tennessee Republican Party can do to put the LGBTQ+ community back in the closet, not even their extreme anti-drag bill. **Once again, the Republican Party has found a way to be both deeply unserious and horribly bigoted at the same time. Community members from across the state showed up today to fight back against this horrible bill, and their calls for freedom and equity rang loud and clear. But the Republican supermajority still stands in our way, and they're becoming more totalitarian by the day. **[The only way to defeat bigoted legislation like this is to elect more Democrats to the state legislature who will fight for LGBTQ+ rights. Once again, the Republican Party has found a way to be both deeply unserious and horribly bigoted at the same time. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Remember the January 6 peaceful protesters!
body:
Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren’t allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPx4rtXHBTVCN1kN1kIZ2CaCDR7EXQjgRgg1aUW1A6BR9Kwqm0JVmZeTaW0vfu4sZoXinsgf7jWZeJE3eNOchBUhjMI0SATvsYUJynz-DiewhZVlZZUhzSALZ-fk93_3sZCl7sR-fEaBYyObDnp5PT6vg%3D%3D)
|
---

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPxFn8fShjhlY6n9BAgf2iXBVJ9effnO3OsaPjQ8p3tdUW5zwZ3GzmpWNYuKwABw7LPA7gGlQVlFHOlqvE1K5XG_etUbozkkqIs9p40KLIX-db-5saO6i2zWKEkE1B5Tn8x2_s731LE2EnFC0-oDxWk1Q%3D%3D) Dear Patriot,

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**

](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPx_rRrL6XdBkUmGHs99DTnvL3JKMDuK3IJZ-EzUdZzGCi3EMY8-_z65oa-kgeVcq50V--rz8tvvLsluew5UrNyjw0o-ZN4ti1U-U0Mzfi0-J6YZEm6v8ACSUg84uF9k6eCNUEuyX3W1BI1xA5ljCjQWw%3D%3D) I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPxezIg_u3XBcx5zTUdtxynyeRTj6yrGrG9GrZc0Yh6iApW5COXIUTjfiUirQrZq6AvoIuVt_vBHgYO6V7YziCdWcU_kawwNYoVm7aRNI1S8kL4H5uhsuS2A1hBjxJlHYbISKbuyYihkVDtL0WQe2t5QQ%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPxbs8L0txNG6lf4LuPKr_4VTa7UARY0w-lh46Owor4sDmv84fs8Uu3mzxkQpTXUx_E-k2MJQJpZML8E-sH0cA3vdgTPt4zBSo9hSAWYS5QxHsqeikChJHMr7hFNOygY45LGEk6fe4-0SSmBm2UJWDAGg%3D%3D)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc.

[**P.S. Patriot, I can 't fight for the January 6 peaceful protesters without your vital support. Please give at least a crucial $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more immediately.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=cf6ed359e42a4c448e4823f7fc2c90db&_e=Ehsyr9Z8O9k7m_2cDw328WbcFCkzDykUe5xqSNbl4MqcTYCJKeeXx7RvdXyORxWCB22EvtwxwWbrIl6YV83RIPPnZRU4iuxRGSyUSFedSk3y51g_Ir2JFtSIcgGMUgztTeemjWk5JWt6DZ1-CFYM33epKRFc_I94dYfSH1zIIYcOyLV5DIpYEX31wUJWIGPxvxFK-qKkqOW5IRSDUpbaCrCBYBdUswkz6h6zZXO4kaE_Z9jzWOKZGQStnj_FbbD48c4LFCvMWqmYnrqC800rCxO5LvYhJKsAJ8O2mEW7R5WVLzxsW3d9m1hBFpMa0CdvAKXMH7YuGOY9KR9Sfka0JA%3D%3D)

name: Jacky
subject: I just got word from my team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
This is huge , friend: I just got word from my team that we’re 97.8% of the way to our critical end-of-month fundraising goal – our first major goal of the election! I'm so grateful for the thousands of grassroots supporters who have stepped up.

But with experts calling me one of the most vulnerable Democrats on the ballot in 2024, I need to ask for your help in closing the gap and getting us to 100% before our midnight deadline. In Nevada, a true battleground state, every dollar could mean the difference between winning and losing.

So please, this is the last call: Will you rush $5 or more now so we can hit our ambitious end-of-month goal, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue?

Here's the best link to donate:

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2310-fr-text

Thank you so much,

Jacky

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Blue Nevada
Date: Mon, Jan 30, 2023
Subject: we'll cut right to the chase

Friend, with time running out before our critical end-of-month deadline, we'll cut right to the chase:

FiveThirtyEight reports that Republicans have a "clear path" to retake Senate control in 2024, and experts are calling Jacky Rosen's seat in Nevada one of their BEST pickup opportunities. That's why we cannot afford to miss our first major fundraising goal of the election.

But right now, we're still falling $45,384 short – and we have to close this gap to put us in the strongest position to win. So please, can Jacky count on your grassroots support by midnight to help fuel our reelection campaign to victory?

Please, friend, rush $5 now to help us reach our critical end-of-month goal, win in Nevada, and keep the Senate blue.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rosenfornevada_email?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2310-fr-text

Team Rosen

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here. name: Derek Kilmer
subject: I am once again asking…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
It's folks like you who I'm counting on, Peter.
I'll get straight to the point, Peter.

Our campaign set an ambitious $10,000 fundraising goal for our first end-of-month deadline of 2023. But I checked in with my finance team this morning, and we've got to raise a bit more in the few hours before the deadline.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/3D6iuc-BN-m4C6d9PN4zX6xPfIHR-HBHcZwh5u7n-js=/PsruA_0wGzDc0fz4pw07AMrIxm5c3AS6GHPOZpfIveU=?refcode=em23_230131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})
---

We're running a people-powered movement, which means that it's the people - folks like you - who help me keep this campaign and our important work afloat. **The more folks who chip in on emails just like this one, the more resources we 'll have to leverage for the work ahead to take back the House in 2024.**

**[So I'm asking once more: If you're able, will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help me continue fighting for you in Congress, Peter? This team has helped us cross the finish line before, and I'm hoping I can count on your support again.](https://act.myngp.com/el/3D6iuc-BN-m4C6d9PN4zX6xPfIHR-HBHcZwh5u7n-js=/PsruA_0wGzDc0fz4pw07AMrIxm5c3AS6GHPOZpfIveU=?refcode=em23_230131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230131_eom3_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email={{EmailAddress%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&firstname={{FirstName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&lastname={{LastName%2CDefaultTo%3D}}&zip={{ZipCode%2CDefaultTo%3D}})**

body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We are hitting the ground running and we only have 3 hours left to hit our first end-of-the-month goal in 2023.
Time is running out before the first big fundraising deadline tonight and we're still $4,252 short of our End-Of-Month goal — so here is a quick note that will just take a minute of your time.
Showing strong fundraising numbers early is key to building winning campaigns. We want build a strong movement of moms and families behind Katie because we know that she will be our voice in the Senate on the issues that matter to us the most.
Can we count on you to donate now — before tonight's End-Of-Month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
Your contribution will help us build our movement, support the campaign, and reach voters across the state.
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]

Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: $78,552 is the exact amount we need to raise this month. Will you chip in?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First: Our own fundraising has been steadily declining over the last year
and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around
soon we’re going to have to look at budget cuts.

Then: Axios just reported that ‘Moderate PAC’ is planning on raising $20
million to stop our movement and protect corporate-backed, entrenched
incumbents.

Now: We urgently need your support before midnight to fight back against
this PAC that received $1,000,000 from a GOP-mega donor and billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230131-27323&t=1001&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 right now to help us
reach our $78,552 January fundraising goal? That’s the exact amount we
have to raise online this month to keep our budget on track.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230131-27323&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]Contribute $3

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs and we don’t have billionaire
backers who can write us huge checks if we miss our fundraising goals.
Every single fundraising goal that we set matters. Reaching our January
fundraising goal will help us find the next slate of progressive primary
challengers as we work to recruit candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230131-27323&t=1021&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]We’re so close to reaching our goal and your contribution will help
put us over the top. Please rush a $3 contribution to fight
back against Moderate PAC.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125417?refcode=em20230131-27323&t=1022&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]Help us reach our $78,552 goal

No matter what — we’re so grateful to have your support as we work to
transform the Democratic Party.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1023&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1024&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230131-27323-footer&t=1025&refcode2=27323_1203867_yCQFUc&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=27323%2E1203867%2EyCQFUc

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759e50dfacd14c989597f6ce61a0ed32&_e=X-KBAVpykx_L_nM6CNDmblDSMlavrPdwsKBfwYcue_ngowC5AuQczFjuJcwMmDRsYAUYn0V3gFA87piAxYi2UH2uksdF9lcHrQNojROGmN5XYvvSLCZjQj6vsMuo2GyrlkBjvcwOKhged618vT6E4hwfRMdsOSIi393w56wUPfXV64-99qsrqjsZ3KILR_NqdW89CYTFX_mUiOvbwIkupi3nhCb785UwrO4quI2B-FYYIHi3nPQBKD7WBxrL0vVamnx2CtPZr94CDluVRFs4ONU9U4Ci4Z6gWH1HpK2WlOMFMZ2eRu83aT7Y1naqAUfb0QGwj5L5I_PCG5lLCh3BZHYgsjZeQ2wtBzbcuTmboT73w9B204Axk4W3zrw52wOnRRk0R369dHaOGEBF_Pl8fg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759e50dfacd14c989597f6ce61a0ed32&_e=X-KBAVpykx_L_nM6CNDmblDSMlavrPdwsKBfwYcue_ngowC5AuQczFjuJcwMmDRsYAUYn0V3gFA87piAxYi2UH2uksdF9lcHrQNojROGmN5XYvvSLCZjQj6vsMuo2GyrlkBjvcwOKhged618vT6E4hwfRMdsOSIi393w56wUPfXV64-99qsrqjsZ3KILR_NqdW89CYTFX_mUiOvbwIkupi3nhCb785UwrO4quI2B-FYYIHi3nPQBKD7WBxrL0vVau__TiskEyvnzcFtR995D9OjZG1QP2a-2z6zkXZ1CDiDdbEfRSAZFdxqlJI1ccEerKZFv2jszC34ytrr3fsSDFex3tCIqUxo9Q3_bpQF3s8kNKXWYtJSlZU9wEhfzMVW8NxQFt99yyXmD0lnpSKt7Zg%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=759e50dfacd14c989597f6ce61a0ed32&_e=X-KBAVpykx_L_nM6CNDmblDSMlavrPdwsKBfwYcue_ngowC5AuQczFjuJcwMmDRsYAUYn0V3gFA87piAxYi2UH2uksdF9lcHrQNojROGmN5XYvvSLCZjQj6vsMuo2GyrlkBjvcwOKhged618vT6E4hwfRMdsOSIi393w56wUPfXV64-99qsrqjsZ3KILR_NqdW89CYTFX_mUiOvbwIkupi3nhCb785UwrO4quI2B-FYYIHi3nPQBKD7WBxrL0vVae8GMCLXNxmk7icoyfTRab6_p1ze_2qTpi5SKRHlsR6UnApb2Q5BFUV2nUEuD9JbiR_aXZSFkLN7nfs4wFhAsbKrAGc16ql-umNyo0xgOcwpXN3vT_g6qT_e2KIv4Xuk6TifanX41EQNd3zdL-H33Yw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: James Carville (via Democrats.org)
subject: This fundraising deadline is no joke
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
My friends at the DNC only have until midnight to knock this fundraising goal out of the park, so I’m begging: | |
---
I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! **As of right now, the DNC is projected to fall short of their first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction.** Tonight’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. **Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline tonight? 7 more supporters from Manassas will help get the job done.**
**[ DONATE: $7 ](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJCWzcNKSPMWWwCLey7mifNCOjqCfooXk2Mo6QxRWwtbM7Po-ErF0GntYaM3ZmEBdLltXHIOT9zHd-ijNSv3oFZpLJSAy09hkBfGScFOpxh5ttUVCjdFa1QPOiGCLmPaCWMu5Nfsg6FRUjlTXbV9VaM_DCvQYNTVvnlkjL4f4Z89MOm_Dw73GtinDWYRwjrYSJbTeyJN7JCaYplstkI0_cyxmS_DBnXNw5U3R-wppAmsHIXowV3tNyjMYqocH9Xo6HUixA37hHirPVlNyBtEYHwiSe5CShuad02ewr6klSBJUKjrpIPk4WpQkvsG1nxApJX30Z7UfqD8sfWESBK_LTVC087CxlGEVadtsyu6gSYK7c1Cu9wrvBza2rLRyucc24bVECUE9D5rMedYPMMIgHKUjuLZhJT8cX2WwsHSyTlhV-od8mGGKXXNz-tjx3QnJpg5mLf8SnLUeb_8JV0peEtYma9WddCC0vyMqZT-aHFLRFp1rAZLWN5ufqSUX_MP7TfG6lLIy10yEg2x8c6LoSEE5rTPjRTksv5dbJ0-A4lhJJiLTlSg-WvyHS3bK3CdN1uVH9rlVw-6BFR6Ec3zNHIEUtJ-hQ-i34RCLoTuy8HB4/3tb/lu45d16uQOKsq-_ZgJ44uw/h0/hoV9UqHlvMUmtmcqS9jXYdF9UVzE1xo9pwWbUhAynE4)

Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: **Democrats defied the odds in 2022.** Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. But know this: Things will be tougher going forward. Donald Trump has already announced he’s running for president again, and we can expect a whole slew of extreme MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. clean_body: My friends at the DNC only have until midnight to knock this fundraising goal out of the park, so I’m begging: | | I’m sorry to message you like this, Derek, but with the DNC’s fundraising numbers where they’re at right now, I’m too damn worried to sit on the sidelines! As of right now, the DNC is projected to fall short of their first end-of-month fundraising goal of the year. That could make a huge difference in our fight to keep moving the country in the right direction. Tonight’s fundraising deadline is no joke. Hitting this goal will help support the DNC’s continued investments in innovative organizing, voter protection, data and technology, and so much more that we need to elect Democrats in 2023 and 2024. Grassroots donations had tremendous power in last year’s elections, and it’d mean a lot if you made your first contribution of 2023. So, I’m humbly asking: Will you rush $7 to the DNC before their fundraising deadline tonight? 7 more supporters from Manassas will help get the job done. Derek, I’ve been in politics for a long time, and I’ll tell you one thing: Democrats defied the odds in 2022. Grassroots donors dug deep to support Democrats nationwide, and it paid off. But know this: Things will be tougher going forward. Donald Trump has already announced he’s running for president again, and we can expect a whole slew of extreme MAGA Republicans to run for office up and down the ticket. We need to fight back as early as possible, and that starts with closing the DNC’s January fundraising gap ASAP. Friend,

I'm excited to release a new book about my time as President Trump's CIA Director and Secretary of State.

body:
| | | Winning in 2024 starts right now. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sfNyS-ef8yAxieJICpQSrEMOILcbWEgU-kXfqzCGVVUm1qKhJeMWh4L0kzrQ19zs_noHfceETk5hYKepIgaJWqrpxpCoug78DnoE-NchxKYluu8qAslaxNyLgVcvm1l_NU0Z_QmbVzMlLHW8I0Gy2sML8dknBbeDL4JEIeO7vp-jO6FpEAdON9O-IS9V5F_FFQTARJgFQgR1f9sSO4yXuECixz-ZzlRHB4hOnU1qwMe7nDN7aOTD-TRt_Jn3qmpAse08C7CFXB_MqK99kB8zXGAcAluhDk8W1IoZ6IHJ-O2ieB6ZO6yFa3plZCoEJDxwsqjYmCczutZvsVJJUWu8324/3tb/Hf6rrb-SRKycJVhtd4gb5g/h0/VFeE-BZkdzFfXja2kbwQAy6EPPz-b71LG4ewAQKSveY)

---
| Team,

My name is Yolanda, and this past weekend, I was elected as the new chair of the Arizona Democratic Party.

You may not know who I am, so let me introduce myself quickly. I’m currently the field director for the Communications Workers of America, where I recruit and train union members to build more power. As the daughter of immigrants, I ran on continuing to invest in and empowering people of color, young Arizonans, and rural communities to continue to strengthen the AZ Dems and continue to win elections.

I’ve spent my career organizing in every community, fighting for Arizona families, and successfully supporting Democratic candidates across the state. That’s why I ran for this job, and that’s why fellow Arizona Democrats entrusted me with this job.

In 2022, we saw historic wins due to early investments and Democrats working together to make sure Arizonans knew what we stood for and got out to vote. **But we also know there’s more to do** — in 2024, we have to flip the State House and State Senate and elect more Democrats to Congress, in addition to securing our U.S. Senate seat and Arizona’s 11 presidential electoral votes.

**2024 is a big year. With the right resources, it can be the year everyone sees Arizona goes completely blue.**

**[Team, I may be new to this position, but I’m not new to fighting for Arizona, and trying to flip it blue. Will you join me in the fight by making a donation today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QoSF2AB0Spch3Masj_JC5sfNyS-ef8yAxieJICpQSrEMOILcbWEgU-kXfqzCGVVUmILxrEr6DBU7Eh1nMtqk7tEEdMdJJETaD7PNMCG6eSXkPmPKaopXX4tkQXPfjRyubel4wOaNReEGIDzwNbOgWQEXRP4cEvompW3y-9-GFD4SmSmYwhTM4L3Rlct2NLE1opNB16-__rz3sAzLmYtJjgfeZxlRJlcAInPGIamx2wNVFwt_dTOQKd1A3gRcOsQ5L764iNGWaMicpcqtXqdV5RSSTDEJd6joHUj9AY3WndRlHXnIhlDECR8eURQ0Woe5sC4vJhz0GfFt-rmcz3EhcJw/3tb/Hf6rrb-SRKycJVhtd4gb5g/h1/6Fs8ZzYXegnXvUTjMHKvvYvxAQTrMHYmS1uMAbz4sWA)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yvHQlo2um9daqGN3QOpm6QZ8qye5TB3xowGYXwLTwGP_MQp50JGfT5s8uROXzb_DQIvoWIkkMp99avXg57mJMQxq-OrA-qqjMoF0wud6fWeFvdOBoVwwog6Vm2tkzTf1GSv0fwmG_2dYTC4Oua3ko8vK93PVnBBVDpegBbCSk7v4dteGhYDHmHbKtND2pHmWEwlOQnEa79ahVyTY1cmyTmH2Sx82lbni1D3eT-gV9GfXweGEBKBSvEbiFnTybYkimD9dWqxHodSxGmXF1BsIj5UDTEPS8ypp3G-k07htq64G6a7Ia9Fy4B2-8yP0vjlCf9-Nzy_u3IY47AOYOo7EGzmBox77VxQ3AVk2IpkoxWC9putZ0RFhePn7m1K3-C3WcwrkNu2E9o5UytfkECQZlm/3tb/Hf6rrb-SRKycJVhtd4gb5g/h2/0-qhLpOVpaiNwMP_PfbNBt7T-GIhkbO9d1TRL1sNGic)
