clean_body: | | | Winning in 2024 starts right now. | | | Team, My name is Yolanda, and this past weekend, I was elected as the new chair of the Arizona Democratic Party. You may not know who I am, so let me introduce myself quickly. I’m currently the field director for the Communications Workers of America, where I recruit and train union members to build more power. As the daughter of immigrants, I ran on continuing to invest in and empowering people of color, young Arizonans, and rural communities to continue to strengthen the AZ Dems and continue to win elections. I’ve spent my career organizing in every community, fighting for Arizona families, and successfully supporting Democratic candidates across the state. That’s why I ran for this job, and that’s why fellow Arizona Democrats entrusted me with this job. In 2022, we saw historic wins due to early investments and Democrats working together to make sure Arizonans knew what we stood for and got out to vote. But we also know there’s more to do — in 2024, we have to flip the State House and State Senate and elect more Democrats to Congress, in addition to securing our U.S. Senate seat and Arizona’s 11 presidential electoral votes. 2024 is a big year. With the right resources, it can be the year everyone sees Arizona goes completely blue. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Let’s turn Arizona completely blue, Yolanda Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Cori Bush
subject: I have a story to share:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
It’s important that you know why this work matters to me.
#
Hi, Peter —
My team told me we’re still short of hitting our February fundraising goal.
They suggested I reach out to explain why I hope you'll chip in to support the progressive movement we’re building in Congress.
**So I’m going to share my story with you.** It’s important that you know why this work matters to me.
[**When you finish reading, I hope you can chip in $5 to help us reach our $74,000 fundraising goal and ensure our team has the resources we need to make progress in Congress.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230131.Qmipju&amount=5&refcode=em20230131-2103&t=1&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230131.Qmipju&amount=5&refcode=em20230131-2103&t=20&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw)**
There aren’t many people in Congress who have lived the struggles that I have, Peter.
_I’ve been evicted, unhoused, and lived in a car with my two babies._ I will never forget the nights when I was unhoused where my eyes would water as I fought to stay awake, worried about what would happen to my children if I fell asleep. When I used McDonald's bathrooms to mix baby formula and wash my body because I had no other options.
_I’ve been on the ground brutalized by police violence._ When Michael Brown Jr. was murdered by police just six minutes from where I lived in 2014, I didn't take to the streets for a title or a name. I was sent by my employer to serve as a triage nurse and to assist with grief and trauma work. But, I showed up to protest the day after Michael Brown was killed, and I came back every day for the next 400 days.
_I was sexually assaulted at 17 and chose to have an abortion._ I saw up close how Black women are treated by our health care system and the challenges we face in accessing abortion care.
There are very few members of Congress who understand what this is like, **but I know that there are millions of people in our communities who share these experiences.**
That’s why I decided to run for Congress: It’s past time we elect folks who understand first-hand the challenges everyday people face. And now, I’m up against a Republican-controlled Congress and must make sure we continue building our movement for meaningful, people-first change.
Today, I’m asking for a favor: [**Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach our fundraising goal before our deadline tonight? Every dollar gives us the resources we need to write a new chapter in politics centered in justice, love, and compassion.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230131.Qmipju&amount=5&refcode=em20230131-2103&t=21&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw)
Thank you for all of your support.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230131?refcode=em20230131-2103-footer&t=22&refcode2=2103_1082990_VW50cw&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=23&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2103%2E1082990%2EVW50cw)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: TOSS-UP: new ratings out for Arizona’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, It’s official: the Cook Political Report and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball – two of the three major elections forecasters – have deemed Arizona’s 2024 Senate race a TOSS-UP. Yes it’s early, but what that means is that of every Senate race in the country, Arizona will be a TOP target for both parties – and that means it will also be among the MOST EXPENSIVE. We’re not going to lie to you – we need to raise several million dollars in order to stay competitive. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcZOJ2kVOUTqHsJPOkx1CFw2egnwJTEIXV1JfgnvWs_ZVJzdiNt_DZu2P6JOoUEg22XfJ-WXnYb6lv4GdlClje48pDWeKmIj7jAa2iCcZMK8-vhI99lMF5LiOifClVAkN5HuoFMPYk_6cm29e5LbQPXYiIhsC0sE41QM0doKO1AZB2u-Xpo7qkY71KtC6yAtbtT8Ls-9dXIch55wyeUEuGQj8iVPwNCBFK1V4dJWSwkDj-VC7RBNPTKY3_JPJT44vgDv3ARFApwtqnSPlW1oaTeP3kE9nL5SNUn98QLyb8t-4/3tb/1evOuXePSOWRZScpHcRlkw/h0/g3yYmMbvJyumRH8aBYg9484kvr-znvCkRIOi29PvlfM) **[Make a contribution now to ensure Ruben Gallego, or whoever wins the Democratic nomination, has all the support they need to defeat Sinema in a tight three-way race >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcZOJ2kVOUTqHsJPOkx1CFw5YLIzukoDhachYa2YQ9ZL6f7qtYZMIaV1doWTAucdAkmHeLEua3I1wlm6EqvziU-CaFXFFyzjJkx94Tfy5FubGcAzz5L1Vw8mYWdxCCcH_t2iZgHX2nbcgIEJCd_Xb6b6eWSZjdCY_AW7lUjYEoPaKMXZeud-RFdRl0aOzh5bywW2oH8FRIK3w33WObszIU7Wd_gQI79VWmpQmULtgWIuRH6Tx9vsZoRSxjm9eDWxAMifW3jIsiai6fBvsJmyuIB46cZcLD2G7_QW5CA4uPlwI/3tb/1evOuXePSOWRZScpHcRlkw/h1/X62c_WqbYMLbc18bYq5fj5DFaOVNnKRWUDzhiLePMAo)** If the election were today, Sinema would be spoiler. clean_body: | | Peter, It’s official: the Cook Political Report and Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball – two of the three major elections forecasters – have deemed Arizona’s 2024 Senate race a TOSS-UP. Yes it’s early, but what that means is that of every Senate race in the country, Arizona will be a TOP target for both parties – and that means it will also be among the MOST EXPENSIVE. We’re not going to lie to you – we need to raise several million dollars in order to stay competitive. If the election were today, Sinema would be spoiler. The polls agree, Sinema would come in third place if the election were today. But she can take enough votes away from the Democrat (Gallego) to throw the election to the Republican (Kari Lake or someone else). Some might say that if Sinema really cared about Arizonans, she’d just drop out now. But Sinema has shown time and again that Arizona is not her priority. Wall Street donors, Big Pharma lobbyists, international vacations, running marathons, and getting a weekly massage – those all take precedence. (Must be nice!) Your donation will help us defeat not only Sinema but also whoever the Republicans nominate, whether that’s Kari Lake, Doug Ducey, or someone else. Together, we’re going to win this race and make sure that Arizona gets the leadership it deserves. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | -Replace Sinema Project & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . #
I’m sure you’re receiving quite a few emails about tonight’s end-of-month deadline, so I promise to keep this one short. Wisconsin has proven to be a true toss-up state in the last two elections. President Biden only won by 0.6% in 2020 and GOP Senator Ron Johnson won by 1% in 2022. _Our race could be even closer._ Election experts are already calling me one of the most vulnerable Senate Democrats on the ballot next year, and it’ll take a lot of time and resources to build a grassroots campaign strong enough to win. name: John Fetterman
subject: This was a BIG month 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I wanted to send you a quick email before tonight’s end-of-month deadline.
#
Hi Derek,
I know your inbox is probably getting pretty full at this busy time of year, but I wanted to send you a quick email before tonight's end-of-month deadline and ask if you would **[chip in any amount to support my work in the Senate and help us reach our $100,000 January goal.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230131-2?refcode=em20230131-2-8230&refcode2=8230_434096_lFzakg&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)**
January was already a BIG month for our team. 💪
I got sworn in as PA's newest vote in the Senate, we got our committee assignments (Agriculture, Banking, and Environment), and we co-sponsored healthcare bills, an assault weapons ban, a pay bump for federal employees, and DC statehood.
And Derek, trust me, we're just getting started. 💯
If you could support this work with a donation of any amount before midnight tonight, it would help me + my team's eyes on the prize: Doing everything we can for working people in PA + around the country.
**[So what do you say, will you help us reach our $100,000 goal by chipping in?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230131-2?refcode=em20230131-2-8230&refcode2=8230_434096_lFzakg&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230131-2?refcode=em20230131-8230&refcode2=8230_434096_lFzakg&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)**
This team has come through time and time again -- and truly, me + Gisele + the whole Fetterman team appreciate it.
Together,
John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230131-8230-footer&t=1&refcode2=8230_434096_lFzakg&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8230%2E434096%2ElFzakg)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c9bfbc1eb0b435a99cac56c8bf65bfa&_e=Fr-dMWKd3ipbljZHboffbNuHBfwx1i5XSubH1zabq8I55O-NApdcI6_xCiJh3SL8ivwpnD9fa0_iBoQpEVoIGq9WfvhN3CC0R8Nu6eVaw6_7LdwdE1WdIOlGhs3czKgtfEjvWU4H_hhXnWnQCGmDKzqFKz059UDyQhq0ezw8Tr4wPmTv0uaxy0eVqILtdcf1uScK5AjE9N-LcpI66iYFawoEP1Zrsegd2i6Ul31l281QM2XGkMlBkMfFYoMexeElMsC_gwHr9gf_XfrbJEJXv_oC8aBk-89Nf_vvohauKnm-7IuLmuVXz_ds-M_jfQuEKSLKYLT-rgdJNW4XlPV2h7AiXmj-l8ECQzBDIJ-1XKw2-DUfWZLkZDSi3379qoKS5KmnPnc5-fRiLQFpgbMaFg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c9bfbc1eb0b435a99cac56c8bf65bfa&_e=Fr-dMWKd3ipbljZHboffbNuHBfwx1i5XSubH1zabq8I55O-NApdcI6_xCiJh3SL8ivwpnD9fa0_iBoQpEVoIGq9WfvhN3CC0R8Nu6eVaw6_7LdwdE1WdIOlGhs3czKgtfEjvWU4H_hhXnWnQCGmDKzqFKz059UDyQhq0ezw8Tr4wPmTv0uaxy0eVqILtdcf1uScK5AjE9N-LcpI66iYFawoEP1Zrsegd2i6Ul31l281QM2XGkMlBkMfFYoMexeElZPdkQzLMjSvMpHAxoHOccIB7L83g-HpYL3X8byxltljSRi6Ueg8D0tpDQ2w0pEaOvJSfStd8oodLEMg75EgK-6PAOHfs6umBM7OvzejVtmMugrKI7H01VaXHVJQTaTaLZ2IZjBRv71p7pl1oKcEBIw%3D%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c9bfbc1eb0b435a99cac56c8bf65bfa&_e=Fr-dMWKd3ipbljZHboffbNuHBfwx1i5XSubH1zabq8I55O-NApdcI6_xCiJh3SL8ivwpnD9fa0_iBoQpEVoIGq9WfvhN3CC0R8Nu6eVaw6_7LdwdE1WdIOlGhs3czKgtfEjvWU4H_hhXnWnQCGmDKzqFKz059UDyQhq0ezw8Tr4wPmTv0uaxy0eVqILtdcf1uScK5AjE9N-LcpI66iYFawoEP1Zrsegd2i6Ul31l281QM2XGkMlBkMfFYoMexeEloM1Q0L_r7HkI-4oy7CVvaztB-YBpzU_XLod5UTgXI-a_KgITaq4AegIFW376OPPoHH9467En574kNNWTvM6FJgKzD6TYnmgNh-r1JW44TCyl9qzGn8jPCiHjt4EcR_5aRi6UcVP5RtEK6jD7Q7IFiw%3D%3D)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Katie Porter
subject: “Reclaiming your time”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
In the interest of reclaiming YOUR time that you spend reading fundraising emails and thinking "get to the point"
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)
If you’ve ever watched a Congressional Hearing, you know that I’m often saying _"reclaiming my time"_ as witnesses try to avoid answering questions about how they’ve taken advantage of taxpayers, shortchanged employees, or lied to Americans.
**So in the interest of reclaiming YOUR time that you spend reading fundraising emails and thinking**** _get to the point_****, here’s just a few facts about why you should donate, and why I’m seemingly pleading for your $5.**
* I’m running to represent California in the U.S. Senate because in my few years in Washington, I’ve seen how those with power are too beholden to special interests. I’ve spent my career standing up to big corporations and fighting corruption, and I’m ready to take our fight to the U.S. Senate.
* I’m the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime from corporate PACs. I’m one of the few Congresspeople to reject federal lobbyist money and contributions from Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Bank CEOs.

Winning in a huge state like California takes serious resources. As a single parent, I know a thing or two about planning ahead—and I’m putting that same energy into our campaign. **[Can you donate $5 today to help us hit our $150,000 end of month goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230131-4?refcode=EMAF31_4_EOM_20230131_V1_F&refcode2=16904_3422442_Ho4sJ9&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230131-4?amount=5&refcode=EMAF31_4_EOM_20230131_V1_F&refcode2=16904_3422442_Ho4sJ9&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)**
Your contribution will help us prepare and plan for the competitive race ahead. Hitting our first end of month fundraising goal is one of our first steps to winning this race.
Thanks a ton,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF31_4_EOM_20230131_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=16904_3422442_Ho4sJ9&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=16904%2E3422442%2EHo4sJ9)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We’re so close now, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Making sure you saw Pramila’s message:
#
Peter, we have good news — and we’re cautiously optimistic.
Just a few days ago, we reached out about our $50,000 End of Month goal. Thanks to supporters like you going all in, we’ve closed the gap and we’re less than $5,000 away from reaching this goal. **But with 7 hours left to go, we’re hoping you can help us out with a last minute donation to power our grassroots campaign.**
[**Can you dig deep and contribute $3 -- or any amount at all -- to help Pramila?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)
These goals allow us to set the benchmarks we need to set Pramila up for success through the entire next cycle -- and ensure our advocacy and organizing work can continue year-round. **Your support right now will make all the difference to us, Peter.**
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)**
Thanks for supporting Pramila through thick and thin.
-- Jayapal HQ
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Pramila Jayapal**
Date: Monday, January 30, 2022
Subject: Will you be one of the 700 supporters we need?
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter,
The end of January marks our first fundraising deadline — and my team has set a goal to reach 700 more contributions by the end of the month to stay on track with our fundraising projections.
As a fierce advocate for the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, **_I don't accept a dime in corporate money —** I never have and I never will. _There’s a better way forward and it starts with folks like you, Peter.
[**So today I'm asking: will you be one of the 700 supporters we need to power our progressive movement before the end of the month?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)**
By living our values and expanding our people-powered coalition, we are building a movement that invests in improving the lives of working people across the country — ** _and not just the one percent**_.
With Republicans now controlling a small minority in the House, it's on all of us to do everything in our power to secure our progressive future we've fought so hard for. We can't allow our hard-fought victories to be reversed — and I will fight tirelessly to make sure that doesn't happen.
We've seen what happens when we're able to build a new political consensus around the issues impacting our communities and advocate and organize around the bold solutions we need. So when I say _**every donation matters, I truly mean it, Peter._**
With one day left in the month, [**will you be one of the 700 supporters we need at this critical moment?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)
Thank you for being an important part of the people-first movement we're building together.
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/27794?refcode=em20230131-2117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=2117%2E420207%2ENZFP2W)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

clean_body: Making sure you saw Pramila’s message: Peter, we have good news — and we’re cautiously optimistic. Just a few days ago, we reached out about our $50,000 End of Month goal. Thanks to supporters like you going all in, we’ve closed the gap and we’re less than $5,000 away from reaching this goal. But with 7 hours left to go, we’re hoping you can help us out with a last minute donation to power our grassroots campaign. These goals allow us to set the benchmarks we need to set Pramila up for success through the entire next cycle -- and ensure our advocacy and organizing work can continue year-round. Your support right now will make all the difference to us, Peter. Thanks for supporting Pramila through thick and thin. -- Jayapal HQ \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Pramila Jayapal Date: Monday, January 30, 2022 Subject: Will you be one of the 700 supporters we need? To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com] Peter, The end of January marks our first fundraising deadline — and my team has set a goal to reach 700 more contributions by the end of the month to stay on track with our fundraising projections. As a fierce advocate for the progressive values that unite our grassroots movement, I don't accept a dime in corporate money — I never have and I never will. There’s a better way forward and it starts with folks like you, Peter. By living our values and expanding our people-powered coalition, we are building a movement that invests in improving the lives of working people across the country — and not just the one percent. With Republicans now controlling a small minority in the House, it's on all of us to do everything in our power to secure our progressive future we've fought so hard for. We can't allow our hard-fought victories to be reversed — and I will fight tirelessly to make sure that doesn't happen. We've seen what happens when we're able to build a new political consensus around the issues impacting our communities and advocate and organize around the bold solutions we need. So when I say every donation matters, I truly mean it, Peter. With one day left in the month, Thank you for being an important part of the people-first movement we're building together. In solidarity, Pramila | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Friend, No one loves America like I do, and I don’t say that lightly either. Being a refugee at 4 years old after escaping communism makes you appreciate every single moment in life, **especially here in America.**

In a place like America, you’re not put on a kill list for having a different opinion like my father was in Vietnam, and his only crime was working in the South Vietnamese Government when the Communists took over.

Now, I didn’t serve in Combat operations fighting terrorism throughout Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia just to sit by watching Joe Biden and the Washington Democrats turn their backs on American Values.

My family didn’t escape communists and their brutal dictatorship just to watch America be torn apart from the inside by those same radical ideals that are now being forced on us today.

**That is why I’m working with Unleash America PAC to help elect REAL leaders who will defend our American values once and for all, and[we need your support.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEtvhCAUhX-N7jB4fVAXLqa109V0N5PuDMJVSQUdxBj_fXHqdNGEkHDO4T4-LOOcZUChoBDKMgUetyJUpVcSGicxAI0zGrE0lkVMGYMkf5EiD1KKmqshai2i65X5Riv9e4vEqMO-zETaQNuwBosUWSEbRJnLWMiGipzmRTiUvXPTHCSnAM7-zCgWi9GqjEW5F_HaYgbkc0-4RqsEJxMXe9JxI8mqXE80Eh9MzovT9TwuVmCQVK2TAeS7pFGqxfvVY9RDFFxPXHXGy78bkqPN0aWWo-FOjaYejcZ55h3W_5eszeh8DOvGjl7bI09ezy6jcWicb2LEQLbPy1wk9_NX4-3aDEp645_YK-lpVF3x3usO0tCWclrVMKg5Z55296C9w_XzD6rdyoC9BgCPbwAPjrC45Mav14vdyP20ko_sBt1uwpu_3TbhX_IoEh1kIGDVD8Q0qZs)**

Team,

With January coming to a close, we're proud to announce that Bob is already hard at work countering the far-right Republican agenda to further restrict access to reproductive health care, to make it easier for the corporations and the wealthiest 1% to avoid paying their fair share of taxes, and to end Social Security and Medicare as we know it.

clean_body: | Team, With January coming to a close, we're proud to announce that Bob is already hard at work countering the far-right Republican agenda to further restrict access to reproductive health care, to make it easier for the corporations and the wealthiest 1% to avoid paying their fair share of taxes, and to end Social Security and Medicare as we know it. This fight will undoubtedly be a tough one, and these next two years will certainly be a challenge if the first month GOP control of the House are any indication, but that's never stopped Bob before. That's why as part of Bob's finance team, we're hard at work ensuring the grassroots support that got Bob elected in the first place is ready and set up to support his fight to protect our progress. Team, we're still just $7,284 away from hitting our end-of-month goal. With your support, we'll be able to keep up the momentum and continue bringing real change to the hardworking families of New Jersey and all around America. = | = = Our nation is at a turning point. This moment is your chance to make a difference. We know this fight won't be easy, that's why Bob needs your support now more than ever before. = Thank you, Menendez Finance Team = = *

name: AdamSchiff.com
subject: A Senate full of Trump acolytes
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Mitch McConnell. Rick Scott. Josh Hawley. Tom Cotton. Marco Rubio. Rand Paul. Lindsey Graham. Ted Cruz. Ron Johnson.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1738%2E5257348%2EPZQSHt)
Mitch McConnell. Rick Scott. Josh Hawley. Tom Cotton. Marco Rubio. Rand Paul. Lindsey Graham. Ted Cruz. Ron Johnson.
Derek, Donald Trump’s biggest enablers are sitting in the United States Senate.
Where they attempted to overturn the results of the 2020 election, abetting a deadly insurrection that very day.
Where they fought tooth and nail against sensible and desperately needed pandemic relief.
Where they tried to get rid of health care for millions of Americans.
Where they acquitted Trump not once, but twice in Senate impeachment trials — paving the way for the presidential campaign he’s running right now.
And where we need Adam to stand up for our democracy.
To ensure that in the United States Senate _right matters. Truth matters. Decency matters. And Democracy matters. And members of the Senate take their oath of office seriously, once again._
**[Derek, will you pitch in $10, $25, or even $50 to become a Founding Donor of Schiff 2024 before midnight tonight? We’re going to need the largest grassroots Senate campaign in the history of this country to help Adam stand up to Trump’s acolytes in the Senate.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=jan2023_abs_em_launch.idgV_R&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_LAU_EOM_AC_20230131_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1738%2E5257348%2EPZQSHt)**

name: Roy Cooper

body:
Can you help me out? | Hello Peter, It’s the end of the month, so my team and I have been asking for your support a lot recently. At the end of every month, we have to make sure any fundraising gaps are closed so that we can keep on budget. And right now, we’re falling short of our $10,000 January goal. Peter, I need your help to raise the last $3,432 before our deadline at midnight. Please, use the link below (exclusive to you!) to give. **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc_email?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093122/389996453/435245919?refcode=ea.840eb643-b3a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.840eb643-b3a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDBlYjY0My1iM2ExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JCShBtEbSUJQ062N86KN7tbxlO60SIaEgvbbrXbfh8=)** The generosity of grassroots folks like you is critical to all we’ve accomplished for North Carolina, and I’m humbled that so many of our team of supporters step up again and again to help us out. Friend,

_**The NRA is the ONLY organization standing in the way of widespread gun confiscation.**

Gun controllers in Congress want to severely restrict or completely eliminate the right to keep and bear arms. And, it's no secret that we can't trust most politicians in Washington to protect our Second Amendment rights when the going gets tough._

Our team is working tirelessly to protect the American people from the gun-grabbers in the government, but we can't do it without your help. We rely on input from real firearm owners like YOU, Friend, which is why I am asking you to complete the **Official Gun Registration Survey** IMMEDIATELY.

**[Take the OFFICIAL GUN REGISTRATION SURVEY to tell the NRA how we can best protect your Second Amendment rights.>>](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c9b5b93ab084418ac17e40541e4bb01&_e=mPFqNLpJjioSA7HDtrkRV3IEksEqJT8FFYoWC0PZFZo7HUFaGrdPR6Y0tlMQxW8HkKhJFhjd8EQohkToqI9rFJW97jkx1hAdi65FOhFsWmjeKjPk9izFtchAVxIKCK7KNLEfw_ZWkU0V9rCdUGMe0oal8mVFncCd6l36qlzPa8iCNkLF48hafy7jEi-9W5gx8LSmniTbdDTeAxqKGJ_C-a1LdKHQU-S5VfKnuEh5crnBkm7bpYRqKiXs9BG-lCU1n5c6Ox_35mrV2JKRng_wHcQUGkvRNd35WYKOxJ3kBSr7HVSmvsIRcQtwlnb0_HlDDJDvxN-64phz1XcbE5NXUiVP0V1Pd6U-s_uFXEo8t02JA29wEM_7lTH93bWtXKeysdkEqwGXRMfxl0TW6MD_aYPSYb5pPF2v5trWW-85aT-0ppqqjJo0alaGG0v04fU4lWgA4CKxZGb7vgdPxGau8FFXMoIar853kjULi3Mz3M4hs17jN9qc6dtlVhLZ9ZCMLS4wJt79_Pw4JrJR4z2zcpLsCmQBjLZlD4Ey4et6x10%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9c9b5b93ab084418ac17e40541e4bb01&_e=mPFqNLpJjioSA7HDtrkRV3IEksEqJT8FFYoWC0PZFZo7HUFaGrdPR6Y0tlMQxW8HkKhJFhjd8EQohkToqI9rFJW97jkx1hAdi65FOhFsWmjeKjPk9izFtchAVxIKCK7KNLEfw_ZWkU0V9rCdUGMe0oal8mVFncCd6l36qlzPa8iCNkLF48hafy7jEi-9W5gx8LSmniTbdDTeAxqKGJ_C-a1LdKHQU-S5VfKnuEh5crnBkm7bpYRqKiXs9BG-lCU1n5c6Ox_35mrV2JKRng_wHcQUGkvRNd35WYKOxJ3kBSr7HVSmvsIRcQtwlnb0_HlDDJDvxN-64phz1XcbE5NXUiVP0V1Pd6U-s_uFXEo8t02JA29wEM_7lTH93bWtXKeysdkEqwGXRMfxl0TW6MD_abJIJSOVP8nZPuhSBQXm7KuWea0QiYKuH5H7asZ6HChAxwsuV8dNgcW3WlLLdiL_yaORjENrinNQ1o1cj9pPcx_GW767GW3qL7Dmtidmpb4hvRIZB2Dd6PIUzO3I4r56FTnFMeBueIbr5RuYAavZEYk%3D)

Hi there,
In less than 12 hours we’ll reach the deadline for [_**our very first end-of-month fundraising goal of 2023, and to start things off strong in the new year, we really need your help.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58093696/389998528/-691002839?refcode=E20154-20230131-RenewalFINAL-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MWGiDXCOC7U5KGq9GZpXedb3UrugrjtOpM_vBQQenw=)
[RENEW YOUR SUPPORT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58093697/389998529/-691002839?refcode=E20154-20230131-RenewalFINAL-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MWGiDXCOC7U5KGq9GZpXedb3UrugrjtOpM_vBQQenw=)
Since 2016, we’ve dedicated ourselves to fueling and funding ballot measure campaigns that change the lives of working people across America. We’re proud that in the face of partisan gridlock, we’ve won 31 of the 33 campaigns we’ve worked on, bringing real change to more than 18 million Americans.
As we enter a new year on the heels of a historic midterm for passing progress at the ballot box, it’s become evident that extremist officials are scared. So, we turn our time, attention, and resources to our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign — a $5 million effort to protect direct democracy from attacks on the ballot measure process.
In the first 31 days of 2023 — when many state legislatures have been in session for less than a month — **over a dozen bills have already been introduced to restrict the power of ballot measures. **
[_**So, between the next slate of ballot measure campaigns we’ll run in 2023 + 2024 and the continued execution of our Ballot Measure Rescue Campaign, we set a goal to bring in 500 more 2023 supporters before midnight tonight. Will you renew your 2023 support for our work to defend direct democracy with a donation of $10 or $15 to the Fairness Project today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58093698/389998530/-691002839?refcode=E20154-20230131-RenewalFINAL-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MWGiDXCOC7U5KGq9GZpXedb3UrugrjtOpM_vBQQenw=)
[RENEW YOUR SUPPORT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58093699/389998531/-691002839?refcode=E20154-20230131-RenewalFINAL-SB-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzE3YTBjYS1iNmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7MWGiDXCOC7U5KGq9GZpXedb3UrugrjtOpM_vBQQenw=)

subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0CUK7eQ-NhLqlxEzo2VWFIm8LiBfLue0IO_JVDb7eL-FJ9ogcVuXYsUo-25EnFMTczpwqAS5jrwoi8bGkO4TayP6MV0LDJYJ37A2BAzAQmMeuRdjukpWt1oeL8raIinciTy-wqA0--UqeCRU2wvz448%3D)

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0GOXx6OBugFv4E-2d6zzKie24-62prKkdwcq6S-grHu-wkHOSIICOosvGJK0eLBSZAbtPr1vfpG0a35K9Gq9gw0TykpONzaAllZlqtfivHwFYFjxe-eyExJOmZC4OenzOcfA87wrXCWzwoVJYatvzfE%3D)

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0B9m6fJbaubi0y4gqExBNIZdN-qFlcuw3O9lIox7WmZ54fS90fjGByWbyzbMPx3lF5wpuHl1A3SaaKtVZ-eQMNhpxRIxBMl7LItYJdMAY9ujp1aS4IXaUhGQJADTC-5wg5ZBWIaQo2EzWRK2xMk4nIQ%3D)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0PQP-_cRXxR1ONzILDZk3ni6X7nO6Y37KGOGG3XTyCScC38hTm2Z4w3rjuU92Xi3yrCwJ5AXVrhJqL1iS2sIqzBfwvGlgqPZMUjMwkRFz7eeG3Kfa80EdXnYx-pCsVXTwu64WCZxR1tFnXHFWW7AGr0%3D)
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0LbC11iV4THSNsFIP_BSGLeZDrvdYDbI5KRxshpxG51Z1_0ejgCkWxp_L_nUOQrZo-W7tlX7frgbhk3sc2J35HMHJ9GgyyDSi80Zbc6OLhA0z_VVVTcknsUiNzd8HN1LA6wHX8qVqDWC8xUg9NuznCI%3D)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0CDJV1JkVk7sHjoq_fV5VyVlF5AZ6H7dr7U2cG2GSCZ-m-FtwoRoTXsbom3IuZoAkUrKHiVwut8HmpQK-wkAyksbSyZZl5wK1cJ-JYAtcxTZ21aX5VPDs38upSKTn0aUJctTBnOC4ZJxX4t3-qog2X0%3D) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0M5LioG3Xf1wPvvR0TlDw6qyLlP0EXm-CjlAhgO-LMcjUhfI8gabW7DaUamewDhY27_5xIPc7tuoZMT7L90D9kybiRZPEmuNc8P7287aKfBsJ2QQ3S_DkRzUECru_vuPEEMpHoBzJ5vlBkOXWbldc8o%3D)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6aeb19ed7d504cfb91403b7bbf5ab32e&_e=PyBqEkFkWPWDshg76ciA-BsNgSBoy5Vs00FuSRDy7iPRiwsgoaiXOeCyc10Xp51vOrV61OsYuPOMmvpfyc5bZpq5gwhIPbwBijl9F_lraUc3wEb7iB17Y_rjlJTrPPc-ZZBVMS7WbKjQTD-BP27V0I4iGRkXYOyJSkcrTynXvxaV5qKzvbzq4X2Yb_4frP9oJuS3GwL0yxwTfv8s5nkAy1mlGcw7zQ9_YCKdJJEjRtBzsXOUYidaQyDh5qA_TGOutLTGs-MxoHcQduoXyM0szEWASdq4hqUfJKPz-Peehwo%3D) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

## Public and mental health are among top priorities this session
Improving local mental health services and increasing access to mental health care are among the top issues being discussed during this budget session. Indiana ranks 45th in the nation for public health spending and 43rd for prevalence of untreated mental health needs. This underinvestment has led to even worse overall health outcomes for Hoosiers and costs our communities across the state. That’s why I am committed to advocating for a budget that invests in our local public health departments and ensures that Hoosiers have access to mental health services.
[Read More](https://lnks.gd/l/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJidWxsZXRpbl9saW5rX2lkIjoxMDYsInVyaSI6ImJwMjpjbGljayIsImJ1bGxldGluX2lkIjoiMjAyMzAxMzEuNzA3NzM3MzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2luZGlhbmFjYXBpdGFsY2hyb25pY2xlLmNvbS8yMDIzLzAxLzI3L2h1bmRyZWRzLXJhbGx5LWZvci1wdWJsaWMtaGVhbHRoLWRheS8ifQ.XIxZuQqw7zb7MCbj1kTOsJ0q9sM1x1sfGxuLRDsgiS4/s/2950175210/br/153756004718-l "Read about this article")

## Indiana must address our pressing education needs this session
Education issues are among the most pressing in Indiana—1 in 5 third grade students currently do not read at their grade level. It is crucial that we focus on the issues that matter to students, parents and teachers this session, including our low per-student funding, our lagging teacher pay and addressing Indiana’s continuing attainment gaps. I am working to secure the best future possible for all Hoosier students and families by supporting common-sense bills that will help Indiana build exceptional schools and students.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| Peter, can I have a moment to explain what is happening right now?

Last week, I announced my campaign for the United States Senate. **And then Republicans started piling on. Immediately.**

In reality, it started when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

But it’s continued. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress — called the _PENCIL Act._ Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo joined the act attacking me.

No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united in one cause: **Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s why they are coming after me.**

Peter, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy _anyone_ who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. That’s why I need you to stand with me today.

[Rush a $25 donation to Upset the Setup and our campaign to help me fight back against the vicious Republican attacks that they’re unleashing to stop our movement to save our democracy. clean_body: | Peter, can I have a moment to explain what is happening right now? Last week, I announced my campaign for the United States Senate. And then Republicans started piling on. Immediately. In reality, it started when Kevin McCarthy unilaterally removed me from the House Intelligence Committee. But it’s continued. McCarthy posted a video on social media calling me a liar over, and over, and over again. Matt Gaetz introduced a resolution to prevent me from receiving classified briefings in Congress — called the PENCIL Act. Go figure. Even presidential wannabe Mike Pompeo joined the act attacking me. No matter how much these MAGA Republicans hate each other, they are united in one cause: Complete and total opposition to my efforts to provide oversight, demand accountability, and protect our democracy. And that’s why they are coming after me. Peter, this is bigger than me. They will try to destroy anyone who stands up to them, and their leader Donald Trump. That’s why I need you to stand with me today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks for your support, — Adam | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. body:
I’m personally asking for your support, Derek.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58093975/389999412/-1511406121?refcode=em_fr_2023.01.31_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDAzMmRlNS1iOGExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Flgg-3d4BwUMYXgMaAD6LUcxWK12AhqnSZxPjzL3Sdk=) Hi Derek, I’ll keep this short.

**Tonight is a big night for our campaign because this is our first fundraising deadline of 2023, and our first one with me in Congress.**

The same outside groups and MAGA Republicans that targeted me before the election will be watching to see if our grassroots team is still standing together, so that’s why it’s so important to me that we put forward the strongest showing possible.

Derek, we only need to raise $1,565 more to hit our goal and kick off the year on a strong note. Chris __ | | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. name: Josh (personal)
subject: I need your support
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hi there, it’s Josh. I wanted to reach out personally and remind you that our first major fundraising deadline is tonight, and I need your support now more than ever.

Tonight is our first chance to prove to the NRCC that we have what it takes to put up a strong fight in 2024. It should come as no surprise that the NRCC is already finding ways to unseat Frontline candidates like myself – but, with the help of early investments, and proving our grassroots strength, we won’t let that happen.

Last year, your tremendous support and generosity allowed me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions in Congress. But, our work is far from over. If I have any chance at holding my seat in 2024, it is critical we keep our momentum going.

We’re just a few hours away from closing our books on January finances but are still 30% away from reaching our finance goal. So please, if you haven’t done so already, chip in $ to help us get there: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2301?amount=]

Thank you,

Josh

Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=013123 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?refcode=013123]
Friend,
We have just a few hours to go until the end of January and our first fundraising deadling of the year, but we still need your help. If we can get 23 more DFLers to contribute using their Political Contribution Refund we can meet our goal!
Through the Political Contribution Refund program, Minnesotans can contribute $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year to a participating political campaign and get it refunded by the state. Will you make your contribution today and help us meet this key goal?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Contribute $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=013123]
Contribute $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=013123]
Or, another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hdfl-jan23?express_lane_other=true&refcode=013123]
Friend, thank you for your support. We really can't do this without you.
Katie Young
Deputy Finance Director
Minnesota House DFL

From: Mark Warren < house@dflhouse.com [house@dflhouse.com] >
Date: Mon, Jan 30, 2023 at 5:49 PM
Subject: Deadline approaching
Friend,
Our first fundraising deadline of 2023 is almost here. This January 31st fundraising deadline is crucial as we look ahead to 2024. Our fundraising in a non-election year is key for being able to hire great staff when the campaign ramps up and run the programs we need to in order to keep our progressive House DFL majority.
We’ve still got a ways to go to meet our monthly fundraising goal, friend. We’re $2,316 away from this goal, but I know we can do it with support from DFLers like you. Will you help us meet this critical deadline goal?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Mark Warren Finance Director Minnesota House DFL Contribute [] Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus We are prohibited from accepting contributions from PACs and lobbyists during the legislative session. DFL House Caucus 255 Plato Blvd E Saint Paul, MN 55105 United States [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Team AOC
subject: We’ll be straightforward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230131-3846-header&t=1&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)
We’ll be straightforward with you: with hours left before our end-of-month deadline, we’re coming to you with an important ask.
**Below we’re going to lay out why a $3 contribution from you — especially before tonight’s deadline — would make a significant difference for our work together, but if you’re ready to chip in now, please make a contribution below to your personal link:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230131.qQkCgn&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20230131-3846-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)
Here’s the work your contribution is funding:
* **Building resources to make local and community-focused impact:** From supporting Starbucks workers in New York unionizing for the first time, to raising funds for relief efforts in California after weeks of rainstorms displaced over 10,000 people, Alexandria has always been laser-focused on improving the lives of working people.
* **Standing up for accountability in Congress:** Alexandria is officially the #2 Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, where she will continue to call out contractors and corporations for their gross misuse of taxpayer money. But with the assignment of right-wing extremists like Marjorie Taylor Greene to the same committee, Alexandria noted last week just how much harder holding these contractors accountable may become.

Alexandria can’t do this work alone. She needs a movement alongside her. And when we’re able to post strong fundraising numbers during big moments like the first end-of-month deadline of 2023, we can carry out our full strategy to expand our movement, elect more progressive leaders like Alexandria, and keep her in Congress fighting for us all.
**If you’re able, will you use your personal link below to make a $3 contribution before our end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight?**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220131?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230131.qQkCgn&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20230131-3846-P_FND_EOM_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)
Together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230131?refcode=em20230131-3846-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=4&refcode2=3846_2526796_LFlRof&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230131-3846-P_FND_EOM_GFM&t=5&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=3846%2E2526796%2ELFlRof)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: LucasKunce.com
subject: We’re running out of time.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Is there anything we can say?
#
Peter,
**Is there anything we can say to convince you to[make your very first donation toward Lucas Kunce’s end-of-month goal](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27628?refcode=em20230131-2804&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2804%2E614464%2EdhOjQm) before our deadline at midnight tonight?**
What if we said that — thanks to Josh Hawley’s crumbling in-state support base + a recent poll that showed him with just a 39% approval rating — Missouri is Democrats’ top chance to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024?
What if we told you that for the last three election cycles Missourians proved they know how to take back their power at the ballot box by approving Medicaid expansion, raising the minimum wage, rejecting an anti-union “Right-to-Work” law, and legalizing weed?
Or what if we told you about the millions of dollars national Republicans and shady GOP mega-donors will spend to keep Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate, which could stand in the way of electing Lucas and taking this seat back for everyday people?
**How we build this movement from the very start is going to make a huge impact on the results we see in November 2024. We need grassroots support from people like you _right now_ so that we can build a strong foundation for a winning campaign.**
**[So Peter, can we count on you to make your first donation of $10 (or more!) before our midnight deadline so we can elect Lucas, defeat Josh Hawley, and flip this seat? Our campaign doesn’t take any money from corporate PACs, we rely on support from real everyday people just like you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/27628?refcode=em20230131-2804&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2804%2E614464%2EdhOjQm)**

name: Chair, Travis Bull Johnson
subject: Your CRP newsletter
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTQ4JmQ9aDNsN2s0dA==._DzJQbWiehfSIsTWGH7rFIbqo2DEDViGw7OSY8EZ5WI)
| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTUyJmQ9ZDdmN2k5eg==.CA43qKv-S__HBw18YIBGzZB0k-tud15bL53o2u_MW_k)
---
| CRP Newletter / January 31, 2023
---
Welcome to the First Newsletter of the Constitutional Republic Party
In the past couple months we’ve set up the party website, bank account, and online donation platform. We have also formed our executive, platform, and convention committees. Whew! The Constitutional Republic Party will be structured to ensure that checks and balances are restored on a national level giving power back to _you_ , the people.
---
| |
---
| |
---
**Save The Date!** June 3rd, 2023
Thunder Lodge in Long Prairie, MN At our first convention meeting, we will elect board members and vote on items to be included on the platform. This event will truly symbolize the birth of the Constitutional Republic Party.

---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **For those of you who are new to the party, here is an overview:**
* The Party will focus on bringing the country back to its roots–small government and limited governmental interference.

* The Party’s guiding documents are the Constitution of the United States and the Declaration of Independence–simple documents about freedom and liberty, which is what the Party will aim to restore.

* We will hold those in power and political office accountable for their actions–good and bad.

---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **This week the Party released a statement, as well as a press release** calling for the impeachment of Joe Biden for the mishandling of Government documents. We also made an appeal for member of congress to go through the same vetting process that everyone else needs to go through to have access to such documents. As it stands, clearance is simply based on winning an election.
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| **To grow this party, we need your help!** Share the Constitutional Republic Party website far and wide: [https://www.constitutionalrepublicparty.us/](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTU3JmQ9cjNmMnU2bA==.cfmJBeyjI14327jSyiot6QkvSz0H2j6XUgJevEo5QNY) **Join or donate to the Party** ****There are two types of memberships available. Whichever you chose, it will not affect your level of access: **Regular Membership: $50 a year** **Plank Membership: $100 a year** The Plank Membership is limited to 100 members. No additional Plank Memberships will be offered after the first 100. This group will be tasked with safeguarding our principles and the Party. This group is responsible for approving any change to the Party principles. This group will have veto power if there is an attempted hostile takeover from another party, so it is very important to get those slots filled as quickly as possible! If you are interested in a Plank Membership, but are short on funds, you are welcome to request Membership by Volunteer Action. Five hours of volunteer work will earn you a one year Plank Membership. Please get in touch should you wish to request this option!
---
---
| |
---
| | | [Membership](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTY4JmQ9ZjZsM3owbQ==.vJ-SpEpqiekH43xUucn174FLX8USuMReXZ7eRz3WyJ4)
---
| [Donation](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTc3JmQ9dTR2M3ExYQ==.MFnyEI_-0oEXs0TGF-_eb1lSVIV2idu7XErhG4RHm90)
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Finally, I would like to thank all who have reached out about growing the Party. We have had inquiries from 5 different states and are actively working on getting set up in those states! This movement is going national. This is not a quick or easy process, so thank you for all your help. Without it, this wouldn’t be possible. Thank you, Travis “Bull” Johnson
Chair, Constitutional Republic Party
2022 House of Representatives Candidate, MN-07
---
---
| |
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTgzJmQ9aTBqOHk5cA==.r08A5AZCxKTGglIYD-wvH4xw7EMnHUecNc38iORH85s) | | [ Share on Facebook ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTkwJmQ9cjJqNng4bQ==.IOJk74TPKW3vTjzy9_su35Mdmbm3Bl9wJ3UyewUlB2o) | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAyOTkzJmQ9ejRzNnU5Yg==.PFWFKUwgPGX4pkDN4ygzE9sH2v6Pt16YdMCPcpHIBt4) | | [ Share on Twitter ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAzMDAwJmQ9czZ0NGM2eQ==.rchquBERqxznpYKwoTcC3WCcc76S9A4oAzCARkk6DDw) | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAzMDAyJmQ9cDhxM2w4cg==.bYhAyuBIyJaubvBAtGTlAt07fU7sn3kMjnxo2m1foAQ) | | [ Forward email ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0yMTQwMjAxNDIyODEyMDkzMzcwJmM9czdtOSZlPTAmYj0xMDc0NTAzMDA3JmQ9cjV1N2MzZQ==.lGSdtBUDBA7lLqDPM2qeukheywY3djtaC1d2MnQD3zM) |

name: Giffords.org
subject: Reaching out one last time before the month ends
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We’re still short of our goals
#

Hi team -
Yesterday, Congressman Maxwell Frost reached out personally because he knows a future without gun violence is possible if we work together.
And this morning, Gabby reached out herself to drive his message home and help us start this year off on the best note possible.
Now, we need to reach out to you one last time because our January fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and we’re still short of our goals.
This first fundraising goal of the year is crucial to the success of our work. The road ahead of us this year won’t be easy, and we need to be prepared to take on the challenges we’re going to face.
Just yesterday, extremist Republicans in the Florida legislature introduced permitless carry legislation. This legislation is incredibly dangerous—it would allow almost anyone to carry a gun in public without a background check, any training, or having ever fired a gun. It’s going to take a lot of resources to fight back against Florida Governor Ron DeSantis and this dangerous legislation.
If you’ve been thinking about making your first online contribution of the year to Giffords PAC, there’s no better time than right now.
We need one last surge of support to help us close our fundraising gap before the month ends, and your donation could truly help push us over the top.
[**Please, click here to make a contribution before midnight and help us reach our January fundraising goal.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230131-4-15&t=1&akid=4196%2E3935704%2EevwnWm)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan23.1ic_u0&refcode=em230131-4-15&t=2&akid=4196%2E3935704%2EevwnWm)**
Thank you for stepping up. Let’s cross this finish line!
\- The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=4196%2E3935704%2EevwnWm) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Peter, trying to reach you (via moms in office)
subject: 20 billion reasons
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
We got 20 billion reasons to elect moms and women to Congress who will put people over corporate profits. Can we count on you to chip in? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]
The Build Back Better Act, would establish paid leave for workers. The program would cost about $20 billion a year. Instead of families, oil companies receive $20 billion a year in federal subsidies.
We have the funds to help families and Congress has the power to change this.
Exxon Mobil, Chevron, BP, Shell and TotalEnergies are reporting a record smashing combined profit of $190 billion for 2022.
We must eliminate unnecessary subsidies and fund policies families long deserved.
Congress needs to find the moral courage to fight for people over profits.
Imagine the political landscape if elected seats were filled by qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day—especially moms, raising the children of our future.
Can you chip in today to help us elect women who have the moral courage to stand up to corporations? Time is running out before the first big fundraising deadline tonight and we're still $3,654 short of our End-Of-Month goal. Every dollar makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsinoffice]

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Bring Constitution 101 to your home
body:

The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=12dd48c07f5f4fe6999b360f5850153c&_e=eDKipB5qBlz-O6v62IYOZ-kzs7uDdN5LhDog02qySLdmfCC4ELMAuK7BP2WUOz-tq5SiZIf9FNHKAHN7J9obbDfPHSqaM2XXlWtLkyhn2HsidySIy7PZD0NMktmxBFaVGVxXp-dy1wytS1Cnn7WOTZ1fbr1WoFZ9YUld_35nQtrf1O1hSmIchAlz563TmCMBgAdRTL8KvRPiPipv4a79eNqcRRJAb2qwc6c5egALj-c8SpcCyVYNK6O2JYTc9KVKwYfLanEm6T-PCpD4ZBaRMilK4jpbsb7BzToZ9JE0rGb_s-hXp--MODNp0LMUh9DUNnReDyh-IBqS2VANSMY5mMBpk0h43B5o15Dd-Lyo5XwiVzNGkbFYvDgPlg7Vlf_NcRjS08-aMcqGKiR2kw_eFQ%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. _I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edec442982d4192869b77950e851f95&_e=IPrU08ypS_kVl8Bivknr6ENLdpWI3iLbLNsFekjXWjNYa_fkHPGflAkw2-CfxZ0wNwNZJAk-FBbuf1rdD6teK2xV4CLudKvgLrA5QJYgM49HdCXnq-MsiGDHXAIVgc6cEbRmZRy0qvf_GWJX7ER0GcsqYUd7I--ZBTC0b9Gqihv8jYwkPjNDpOJTJb6PdfELuChSNrttH1fe7D4Nh4jk4V6h08IgHbdmbkndCT0dUSXtAaP-Zy4uNCFzt_c9FtpJLbH_O3kA4JyFq5_MajcxWKdfFY1n7TxiwK2vaWVx5MWwqvt8nlCuLvsWql8hJ0c5)
---
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edec442982d4192869b77950e851f95&_e=IPrU08ypS_kVl8Bivknr6ENLdpWI3iLbLNsFekjXWjNYa_fkHPGflAkw2-CfxZ0wNwNZJAk-FBbuf1rdD6teK2xV4CLudKvgLrA5QJYgM49HdCXnq-MsiGDHXAIVgc6cEbRmZRy0qvf_GWJX7ER0GY8LQiO-yJJwCaCJ4VVS_fiArM_0l_DMxVr4P1A5e9B0g3SfQIKWjukzpJGQKlp2gCJhQOEpUl0EaZFczBThHFSowpmy7N06ITrIE1opD4jv2vR8kPG24GrOJUqSseZ6vVDOTnBxW1EhBwnVsbP2PiF1WCvUsLBJDYiGTGuWl0QJ)

* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8edec442982d4192869b77950e851f95&_e=IPrU08ypS_kVl8Bivknr6ENLdpWI3iLbLNsFekjXWjNYa_fkHPGflAkw2-CfxZ0wNwNZJAk-FBbuf1rdD6teK2xV4CLudKvgLrA5QJYgM49HdCXnq-MsiGDHXAIVgc6cEbRmZRy0qvf_GWJX7ER0GVhXh0-eXeO7Qt_dkPDYSwbrmCBDGopvdGNmuMpDKILjZ2FlC-G2t6aPt2ZMaR0b9Cg1paX3jQjwewsV5CKGdUtuukR9nwQQXKf_IsDEOxl4-chUmsTjKNXFZ1kk8smV7Gy1TQbs5G1xmdyyqgZe2oP6N9OzzowBtsfJjp4D7-A-) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!

name: Grassroots Army
subject: Elementary School Hires ANTIFA Member
body:
Gross lle Schools Hires ANTIFA Super Soldier as a Teacher
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | |
# SHOCKING Elementary School Hires Antifa "Super Soldier" For A Teaching Position
---
|
---
|
### I know! I was just as shocked as all of you when I read this.
---
| Hey folks,Yeah, I am with you. When the young lady first sent over some of this information to me, I didn't believe it. I immediately thought to myself, “There is no way that a school would be this irresponsible and hire a person who belongs to a terrorist organization.” Unfortunately, they did. What is even more mind-boggling, is that she was hired as an ELEMENTARY SCHOOL TEACHER! This young woman, who obviously has some very extreme views, will be teaching these young, impressionable minds.
---
| **Here what a local Police Officer 's response was, when he found this information out****READ BELOW**
---
| A local Police Officer said it best........ First, let me make clear that teachers have every right to have political opinions and express them. I don’t care if a teacher has Biden wallpaper in their home, travels the country attending Trump rallies, or holds and expresses any other strong political opinion as long as those opinions are left out of the classroom. I do, however, have a problem with a teacher who is part of a fascist organization (ironic considering what the acronym ANTIFA stands for) that furthers its political agenda through violence. You know those six individuals arrested for Domestic Terrorism in Atlanta last week - all ANTIFA members. This group goes from protest to protest around the country and turns them violent. Violence, or the threat of violence, is not an isolated tactic of a few fringe members of ANTIFA, it is their main tactic.
As if the mere association with a group of this nature should not have been sufficient to eliminate her from consideration for a teaching position anywhere, her title within the group certainly should have. Soldiers are individuals who defend or further the interests of their organization through violence - As an Army veteran, I can assure you, that is exactly what a soldier does. This new teacher doesn’t classify herself as a “member” or “supporter” of this violent organization she’s a “super soldier” – per her own social media posts. If this “super soldier” is fine with promoting political beliefs through violence, it is not a leap, at all, to think she would do it in a classroom, unsupervised, with impressionable children.
If the affiliation and role in this violent group was known to those who hired her at the time the job was offered, then those responsible have failed the residents of Grosse Ile, parents and, especially, the students they are entrusted to educate. If it was not known, the information has now been brought to light and it is time to take action to remedy that glaring mistake. All the reasonable people of Grosse Ile should be watching the Grosse Ile Board of Education to see how they respond. If they refuse to correct it, they need to be held accountable and parents need to know that there are plenty of private schools and schools that offer School of Choice in the area that will be happy to have your child as a student.
---
|
---

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You’ve seen Marine One on TV countless times, I’m sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn’t charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that’s it.

His alleged crime is called “obstruction of an official proceeding.”

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn’t even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That’s why I ask you to stand with me before it’s too late.

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years.

You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.**

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents – AND WIN!**

And now I’m pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden’s rotten criminal regime in court.

I’m suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxdkVFvgyAUhX-NvmnkXgX74EM312Vp0odlSbenBgErjYilWtd_P3TdsiwhJHzn3HvhoApCWQZJTmgayoJTXisZ6gISwIQgAcQkw1jJFAXJE1QoJRN5kCbKcN3GnEzcOWtNLKwJmyIHpDKp0kqQlIoqYylShiu1IlxWwDBsi2YY-kuA6wA2ftVOKWnNxAfRxE5dr76RxyfbdBHvpNPqElkT4GYczOFiRydUgOVfOQA6a0ZJPXpj6d3fRHDTc33sPDPVnfVj1epLo5yHkwNPubFjN_gjZD91thvUgjrRRvu31-q4W9fnvZcPXaulF_7BRkv_ovJz-_QC6wlDV8h-0q2fRJmP6rhENQfkb9Tq-lYE7CEAWMoAlizg_DEZN57M9jnKs_foTHcmm0V49Ptw69Wv894kXn5gpqz8AmAVj2c)

name: Jason Crow
subject: My tracksuit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Hey folks, it’s Jason. What a year it has been — and we’re only a month into 2023! Here’s how I started January: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58095673/390006443/1460550574?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230131_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWYwYzQ2Mi1iZmExLWVkMTEtOTk0Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QfsrZDliSKOOcnxBiWL4Jh6mDijL2PVNuPnxWLdysKQ=) _Day 2 of the Speaker vote, after Republicans adjourned for the night._ I’m pretty used to the chaos by now. There are rarely any normal days on the Hill. I started in 2019, when we had our nation’s longest shutdown. Then 2021 came and there was the insurrection. Now we’re in 2023, and Republicans were unable to elect a leader and convene a Congress for more than 4 days. It took much longer than expected — and happened in the middle of the night — but Congress was finally sworn in. My mission is the same: Cut through the noise and represent the people of Colorado’s 6th District. Throughout these past three terms, I’ve been ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I have a whole host of priorities I’m ready to get to work on for Coloradans. **Let’s get it done.** [**Will you make a donation to help kickstart the new year?
