clean_body: | Hey folks, it’s Jason. What a year it has been — and we’re only a month into 2023! Here’s how I started January: = Day 2 of the Speaker vote, after Republicans adjourned for the night. I’m pretty used to the chaos by now. There are rarely any normal days on the Hill. I started in 2019, when we had our nation’s longest shutdown. Then 2021 came and there was the insurrection. Now we’re in 2023, and Republicans were unable to elect a leader and convene a Congress for more than 4 days. It took much longer than expected — and happened in the middle of the night — but Congress was finally sworn in. My mission is the same: Cut through the noise and represent the people of Colorado’s 6th District. Throughout these past three terms, I’ve been ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work. I have a whole host of priorities I’m ready to get to work on for Coloradans. Let’s get it done. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We have work to do. Onward! — Jason | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us? | = Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress

Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a c Hillsdale College | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aa80d92c97d14890b42fd02c2352f5e4&_e=Dy8XpCmTVrh8YPwVIfETCC_N_zKEJ_LOILEMv8Phat8k7q4lhiTWmZjjBDSaoAiCXlvNclawphMc50gREj1vF0IBDjFOvk8hcrYs1u8oDIWqL92kM8qz0fvuSNeIQaxFUWtsliTZ3PZ1wML3SFy5NFJKnvqpYa3QAP8qsSuHJMdViLlX93JBs0MCcdvtXGjEAG44AWpTfnjtqAy7j_w-pRowJXDv_C0vH4GinfKNasljNBr9XX0p8Uamq5F6ChnbuSCySNCheGWAEttsctUpxKYxi_zwETfD3Dc_uBDikthKGT3pe3R86snC98LP4bxh5yvlKOd1r0jy_100r_Oyi2N7S_ED_egxZgEHWwvgT1Wjf-ZiKmPpl9JIw9a9xXsKn5qvKx-GSwZndvDqKWIQQQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aa80d92c97d14890b42fd02c2352f5e4&_e=Dy8XpCmTVrh8YPwVIfETCC_N_zKEJ_LOILEMv8Phat8k7q4lhiTWmZjjBDSaoAiCXlvNclawphMc50gREj1vF0IBDjFOvk8hcrYs1u8oDIWqL92kM8qz0fvuSNeIQaxFUWtsliTZ3PZ1wML3SFy5NFJKnvqpYa3QAP8qsSuHJMdViLlX93JBs0MCcdvtXGjEAG44AWpTfnjtqAy7j_w-pRowJXDv_C0vH4GinfKNasljNBr9XX0p8Uamq5F6ChnbbKTexP0hebYN-1fDPvSJGmwbeTnqohnICLxllhBdlzLw11f5hi7zSsqI75zibQ3zTMjfdPIpjJfDX9N7IOzoutw_f4VTlWHqXmVepH6ki8ecbW-dnMwgksCdXMHYdzhC_TW7MYvQPs76wOBApMX3Bg%3D%3D) I hope you’re having a great day so far. Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s excellent faculty — the same professors who teach here on campus. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. “Constitution 101” is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=aa80d92c97d14890b42fd02c2352f5e4&_e=Dy8XpCmTVrh8YPwVIfETCC_N_zKEJ_LOILEMv8Phat8k7q4lhiTWmZjjBDSaoAiCXlvNclawphMc50gREj1vF0IBDjFOvk8hcrYs1u8oDIWqL92kM8qz0fvuSNeIQaxFUWtsliTZ3PZ1wML3SFy5NFJKnvqpYa3QAP8qsSuHJMdViLlX93JBs0MCcdvtXGjEAG44AWpTfnjtqAy7j_w-pRowJXDv_C0vH4GinfKNasljNBr9XX0p8Uamq5F6Chnb9M0nUhyaUQcbWCYAjSmKB4ZAejHC-mECBIoHFOYrYcXonWODnFjBPWEzi0j5Cp0KLucP1OlUScXCIbpaB0h-nUX8CCqoyVJhiDEH5KFUPAIgA06QNc4-FE6OzTQVpZvNmYaoYK0XDa5h3ebm4SlE6w%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new “Constitution 101” DVD box set are limited, so I hope you’ll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth—Defending Liberty since 1844

Friend -- Today marks the second anniversary of Country First, which I founded in the wake of the attack on our Capitol. And while we've made big strides in awakening and activating the Reasonable Majority, the threats from two years ago persist.

Just this month, we witnessed the U.S. Congress descend into chaos as it failed for days to elect a Speaker for the first time since just before the Civil War. Then, we watched key positions and committees traded away to the most toxic and reckless MAGA extremists in Congress, with Donald Trump getting all the credit. Then, just yesterday, Donald Trump moved to consolidate support from top Republican leaders for his presidential campaign, despite being a huge threat to our democracy. And now, emboldened by their majority and recent Biden controversies, Trump and his MAGA extremists are doing everything in their power to take full control of our government in 2024. We all know what they think of American democracy -- Trump even said we should "terminate" the Constitution if it's necessary for him to be in power. What happened to the Grand Old Party of Lincoln? What happened to our country having two healthy, sane political parties? The current situation has become so dangerous, and none of us can afford to bury our heads in the sand and just hope it goes away!

I, for one, have refused to be silent, and was even willing to sacrifice my own re-election to put everything we've got into defeating those who betrayed our country. We had great success in 2022, but we've got even more important work to do in 2023 and 2024. [Country First has a bold cutting-edge plan to take on and take out the most toxic partisans in Congress and ensure Donald Trump gets nowhere near the Oval Office ever again: In the primaries.](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=2)

And while I know it feels like the last election just ended, the foundation for success in 2024 will be built in 2023. That means educating more voters, getting more voters registered in the party where they can have the biggest impact in their primary elections, and recruiting and training strong, viable candidates to beat the most toxic partisans in the primaries.

My promise to you: Those working to undermine our democracy will NOT like what we have planned. That's why I need your support right now, at the beginning of this critical year where we lay the foundation for 2024's victories. Our numbers must be so strong that there is zero doubt that the good people of this country will prevail over Trumpism in 2024. Country First plans to play a major role in that. I hate sending emails like this, but with a mission like ours, funds are needed to keep the momentum going and to put our audacious plan into action. We are so close to reaching our big fundraising goal. **I know you've been supportive of our mission** , and I hope you'll be open to this:

[Would it be crazy to ask you to make an investment of time **OR** money in our movement to help us reach our big year-end goal? We need both donors **AND** volunteers to fuel Country First.](https://www.country1st.com/plan?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=3) Every contribution -- whether of time or treasure, and no matter how big or small -- adds up to making a real difference. The funds donated today will go toward our MASSIVE effort to unseat those in Congress who put Q Anon, Lies, Conspiracies, and the Trump Family before our Country. The money also helps build our community, marshal an army of thousands of volunteers, create space for reasonable people of goodwill to solve our greatest problems, fund a candidate academy that's helping candidates run in '23 and '24, and provide a fresh, optimistic vision for our country. | [](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=4 "MAKE A REAL IMPACT") [MAKE A REAL IMPACT](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=4)
---
I do not take for granted the trust you've placed in me to usher our movement through this storm, and I'm humbled by your continued support. Donating is an investment in our democracy and a down payment for a better, brighter America for our kids and grandkids. I have faith the good we do today will be compounded over time, and I'm excited by what we can do together.

With great appreciation, I remain yours in service.

Country First,

Adam
[](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=5 "Chip in whatever you can today") [Chip in whatever you can today](https://www.country1st.com/primaryfirst?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=5)
---

[Shop your values. Wear the Cause.](https://www.country1st.com/shop?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=primaryfirst24_ndnv&n=6)
